[**Hardly ANY local Democrats have stepped up! Do your part and rush $7 by MIDNIGHT to help pass D.C. Statehood »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88642?t=8&akid=19438%2E878179%2Ez2yGQW)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19438%2E878179%2Ez2yGQW). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19438%2E878179%2Ez2yGQW).**

clean_body: Peter, Under President Trump's decisive leadership, our nation's borders are more secure than ever. Through robust policies and unwavering commitment, we've significantly curbed illegal immigration and fortified our homeland. This is just the start, Peter. President Trump needs allies in the Senate to enact his plan to MAKE AMERICA GREAT. But this fight is far from over - Senate Democrats are going to do whatever they can to obstruct and block our reform. Our team is conducting an to gauge where real America First patriots stand on this issue. But time is running out - We need from every Republican in every state to send a message loud and clear: 🔽 🔽 This is a private poll. | [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6V7ysAqQAXgttWnfvEts3SZl_TBQsZl6bVwJ6x4wITMICvZ8X0ZG5XbD0C4FqJMIEQACbhxB8KKpUmGppZFn6eeerbW0XYn_kce9sbF1fjtTZpx7NiLaRpr4txhKaUdInSyQk3gGEt6Ho1lMF7kcwZ6g7lgIk3zp1EVbpFVZLBkd965S9z8Uuuxc4QfpJLzF9nz3llppiBI8YgNcfnWlWjHIJDckKCpSDpwAp4q-tEif/4ff/R-qj2KM7RU2uXW-cuScxkQ/h1/h001.Kyr1Cywf09YFpXdb3cm01FwWBE4NUQNOTHt1v5maDBo)

| Hi Friend -
---
A reality check is in order. On the Wisconsin election, the election integrity Executive order, DOGE findings in the voter rolls, and what we have to offer the Trump Administration ... I’ll try to keep it brief.
|
---
## On Wisconsin’s election
Tuesday’s election delivered a mixed message: voters passed a constitutional amendment to codify Voter ID—while also electing a Supreme Court Justice who opposes Voter ID and other key pro-liberty principles.
Social media exploded with blame:
“Voters need to vote harder!”
“Chasers need to chase harder!”
“It must be fraud!”
But after years of work in Wisconsin—training Election Challengers, supporting Election Day operations, engaging with the WEC, and fighting for election integrity—here’s the hard truth: the biggest problem facing the pro-liberty movement is inconsistency on the ground.
You can’t just engage voters when it’s time to vote or fundraise. Real impact requires year-round connection—relationships, communication, and community. Democrats do this. Republicans don’t.
I’m not suggesting that we shouldn’t take a hard look at patterns in the vote rolls, nor should any grassroots group stop working in their area of focus, but ... if your local party is asleep at the wheel, tell them: lead, follow, or stop sending fundraising texts every five minutes and get out of the way. There’s too much at stake to keep pretending we’re playing the same game.
|
---
## The Awesome Executive Order
President Trump’s Executive Order [_“Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections”_](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4n6aWBcMC8ry3MP8bGZ9oijmVt2vekhx2U6rXIw6jZI57qBqA-jFLzgM45PQlW10Vk4zZNxKkE2r0wSTkx8cOT5c6B83vqhFGjZVVWfVM3pIQYP9OKnaUWSiC5jkWdO4aMEDZ0k-Bw00e7ZOJVXxXTAscv42Mv12I1MH6dzPgBi7GdN9IZoUJtD5CjLJSG6TqFzXWFL-WGsBtKIzsJYyhMpLHBYKhm2qaQRpU8I6SMrhs_6inTqMbsROwXOuivrh46AXZnrHnTdUD67d1X0qQJatA3X8hSmpo_y6AaYSEEPTI1EULslyiKTrSlbysWd416hi_H9eqqPdKFa9blviWz4n6Z1i-yprVqag8BTXhx-S/4ff/R-qj2KM7RU2uXW-cuScxkQ/h2/h001.QKSgCucu-FLShzI-XyXORR95-L59BZMf2yZk95FBkCk) is a thing of beauty.
It opens with: _“Under the Constitution, State governments must safeguard American elections in compliance with Federal laws that protect Americans’ voting rights and guard against dilution by illegal voting, discrimination, fraud, and other forms of malfeasance and error.”_
Yes. Exactly.
This order ends the voter registration chaos caused by Biden’s E.O. 14091, directs DHS to provide states the citizenship data needed to help clean voter rolls [(a key goal of our 611 Project—thank you to all who supported it!)](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6XnSdcrSmzbZQfStcjy751i-Ux7pGZZnGS3_QkKO6_ELjC5yHL05Cxwb3cle8YQ6yKtVkcypgOA0jUcNT7veafcBt32r4VXADhckHug6UWEKhYIR7sg19nlnmZvzM5_hcWtxU0nCgoroC08RhhZGyOQi_SXryPsecyfBVFGKNU88t4bkdhDIPHhI6rgVldiD4xywDC_67GElhCrkRTjvq_XNBDxsAktJ7DHhwe5K61XqLJZcx80zK_fEffPO8iRkZg/4ff/R-qj2KM7RU2uXW-cuScxkQ/h3/h001.yHgWe7yRQkTK8hDlZR7myMTmp5biIdl3xTNDH7n4jgA), and much more.

This is a huge step forward. But make no mistake: [the lawsuits are already piling up.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4h42CGf-_GVVWb7S3hDo4aXScAX4kE1y04U4rluZuSbqjZY9hLZRyUvOetIlsFYVrpeo6XTg9kkffNBMOT5AIVz5jiHZnWw6fV3LKFuS8HiYjfF_4KX2Yq2-Z6PFbgHtOx6QnMsjWQb_FTWW9Ps3s_DKFpGutUAPNYFRCK1bqNInmsV1AlICpaUoQ0jAtlIDvIQjX6qkYiWqtJA5xdDsItzvKPqkppyd4j1Y4ITPM9n0cpTXnlR9jg4-0GFm_sgPLsBh9vdmHbtXG6hUl4gIOiOSTQJtyoBv5scvqWNlePEe/4ff/R-qj2KM7RU2uXW-cuScxkQ/h5/h001.fxsWSpEUAOaUG5o5TP560ViyZ76Onp_dKc9ofz4Es9s) So far, 19 states and activist groups are lining up to fight it—and more will follow.
We must hold the line. Support these standards. Settle for nothing less.
True the Vote is assessing how best to engage in the legal battle ahead. This is a hill worth fighting to hold. Stay tuned.

**We couldn’t agree more. To that end, we offer the following ....**
## **To the Trump Administration —**
#### We stand in full support of your efforts to improve election processes and expose election fraud. Here’s what we can provide:
* A detailed list of government databases, recommended queries, code, and supporting data to help in your efforts to identify illegal voters.
* Information on the non-citizen database first reported by Gregg Phillips—buried under whistleblower protocols that were never honored.
* Evidence provided to (and buried by) the FBI between 2020–2022, including geospatial data showing ballot dropbox abuse.
* Details from the multi-state Konnech investigation, including the timeline leading up to my imprisonment and Gregg Phillips’— while the FBI, who knew the truth and could have helped us, instead just watched it happen.
* Copies of banking information and supporting research tied to a suspected multi-state ballot trafficking operation. We tried to bring this to the FBI, too, then we learned that, in fact, **it was us the FBI had been targeting all along.**
* Complete text and email records with FBI agents—names, contacts, everything.
* Full detail on the lawsuits against us by Elias Law and Skadden. One involves active DOJ participation. The other smears President Trump throughout.

And that’s just the beginning.
David Sacks is right: he’s only seen the tip of the iceberg. We know what lies beneath.

clean_body: Plus ...what we saw in Wisconsin, the election integrity Executive Order, and more... | | | | April 05, 2025 | | | Hi Friend - A reality check is in order. On the Wisconsin election, the election integrity Executive order, DOGE findings in the voter rolls, and what we have to offer the Trump Administration ... I’ll try to keep it brief. | On Wisconsin’s election Tuesday’s election delivered a mixed message: voters passed a constitutional amendment to codify Voter ID—while also electing a Supreme Court Justice who opposes Voter ID and other key pro-liberty principles. Social media exploded with blame: “Voters need to vote harder!” “Chasers need to chase harder!” “It must be fraud!” But after years of work in Wisconsin—training Election Challengers, supporting Election Day operations, engaging with the WEC, and fighting for election integrity—here’s the hard truth: the biggest problem facing the pro-liberty movement is inconsistency on the ground. You can’t just engage voters when it’s time to vote or fundraise. Real impact requires year-round connection—relationships, communication, and community. Democrats do this. Republicans don’t. I’m not suggesting that we shouldn’t take a hard look at patterns in the vote rolls, nor should any grassroots group stop working in their area of focus, but ... if your local party is asleep at the wheel, tell them: lead, follow, or stop sending fundraising texts every five minutes and get out of the way. There’s too much at stake to keep pretending we’re playing the same game. | The Awesome Executive Order President Trump’s Executive Order is a thing of beauty. It opens with: “Under the Constitution, State governments must safeguard American elections in compliance with Federal laws that protect Americans’ voting rights and guard against dilution by illegal voting, discrimination, fraud, and other forms of malfeasance and error.” Yes. Exactly. This order ends the voter registration chaos caused by Biden’s E.O. 14091, directs DHS to provide states the citizenship data needed to help clean voter rolls , and much more. This is a huge step forward. But make no mistake: So far, 19 states and activist groups are lining up to fight it—and more will follow. We must hold the line. Support these standards. We tried to bring this to the FBI, too, then we learned that, in fact, it was us the FBI had been targeting all along. Complete text and email records with FBI agents—names, contacts, everything. * Full detail on the lawsuits against us by Elias Law and Skadden. One involves active DOJ participation. The other smears President Trump throughout. And that’s just the beginning. David Sacks is right: he’s only seen the tip of the iceberg. We know what lies beneath. | Lastly, I invite you to join me on Monday night’s, where I’ll discuss all the above in much greater detail. Should be fun. 😉 Never quit. Keep the faith. Ephesians 6 FTW! Ever onward - | P.S. We have lawsuit hearings coming up in May and June, plus we are launching in a week and finishing the build on a new app that will help track Election Integrity legislation. Any amount you choose to donate will be immediately deployed. Thank you, again and as always. | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) 2025 True the Vote 3120 Southwest Frwy Ste 101, PMB 19128 Houston, Texas 77098-4520, United States of America

These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).

It’s official: Lt. Gov. Winsome Earle-Sears is the Republican nominee for Governor of Virginia and Abigail’s official opponent in the November 2025 race.

The stakes couldn’t be higher this November. Sears has spent her entire political career pushing extreme right-wing policies and backing Donald Trump at every turn. She’s repeatedly voiced her support for anti-choice measures to restrict women’s reproductive rights — including a near-total abortion ban — and just this week spoke at an anti-abortion rally in Richmond.

She’s not looking out for the people of Virginia. While Virginia's federal workers are facing instability and chaos from the Trump-Musk administration and DOGE’s cuts, Abigail’s opponent is standing behind Trump 100% and “doesn’t understand why” it’s a big deal that Virginians are being fired from their jobs. She literally told Virginians “don’t fret.”

Sears is just another rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda, and frankly, Virginians deserve better. Abigail will always put the people of Virginia first – she’ll work to lower costs, protect our fundamental rights, stand up for Virginia jobs, strengthen our public schools, and so much more.

But this race is set to be the most competitive in the country this November — Cook Political Report is calling it a total TOSS UP. Right now, Abigail Spanberger and Winsome Sears are neck and neck — and with Trump’s MAGA machine ready to flood Virginia with dark money, we can’t afford to fall behind.

name: Crystal & Jason  via ActionNetwork.org
subject: 🌿 Help Us Grow: Spring into Action with 7 Directions of Service
body:
Help us raise $50,000 by April 30 to fund Indigenous youth journeys, land-based education, and cultural restoration. Every gift plants a seed for future generations. | | | Dear Relative, Spring is a season of renewal—and for **7 Directions of Service** , it’s a time to plant seeds that will grow into **sovereignty, healing, and future leadership**. We’re launching our[**Spring Giving Campaign**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38i7o39551FUb7Ig8O766qgXVYdFq0B_2WROqUDTXAZZs7u_n-8Ql4b_04YSrZiGj8EHlZl8u9Jb6yd6uN2emMcnQP71DnyJsL0V48x4BJigsKa0EW2OxpRUuryEG8EkP-rIU-uxZlh_eVa-BaSf8XcuDz9FdWMOYY4-uFZIHD6BaOaM_GCyfLzQHIU73HxaB7Ahm78yvykR2rgDsSHwR5FKegk2awN5M7K9T5HlU9TF54UwKLvyN4dcEOrU5SF7rFE3RMXym8bxbzN7VNdXhLg9Y-wN2ypCkpSFZutWFO2ZnTkCB054crCFeBvUb8jr5Fi6gVRM8y_VApuesHS4R5eOIPl5JMzP78qdaPDmVL48gWLbr_nziY1GSrdLilxVhk/4ff/aY-mVG0uTQCywwNgS-JGeg/h0/h001.l1cTDMZ4B1WZGqA5SiKgiKyFZMPULgTBNUrozRI70Tc)as part of our 6-month fundraising plan to support our youth programs, river journeys, and traditional ecological knowledge initiatives. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38i7o39551FUb7Ig8O766qgXVYdFq0B_2WROqUDTXAZZs7u_n-8Ql4b_04YSrZiGj9-neQ6nT5eGphnRRowI56OrmSV-C4n4Ihj9BPJDT_C1BRyZ6iKT7G5ZpbQxSU86VtskHNtxJgU_FdHCToxIlLW50_ZfJ-epVN88NtgVTEEzO3OjxsZKvxzxS1eeD3l9hW4iu6OnG6bwKGhWHiS-IFdAFP7yUYhAkpWGpK3wZo7VoYybqG-es4SSHmHNr_PP4OJX27JPabgfUS_L_6fYZ242NmxshRQiGVPcwXACvcAICYqnJmSaA_tXbIhtFhIpD1mqGxm8vNYA74wasCw95qe6tO9vfs2PyAMBHz5n0czXsk1F5kxsdxGjYILooB7alg/4ff/aY-mVG0uTQCywwNgS-JGeg/h1/h001._FUexXbaQ5btwyfu8YvIsSDgWMHrGACelh1-zh0tBGM) 💧 Why Give Now? At 7 Directions, we are:
* 🌱 **Teaching Indigenous youth** land-based life skills rooted in ancestral knowledge
* 🔥 **Fighting fossil fuel projects** and protecting our sacred waters
* 🌊 **Preparing for our next youth river journey** —connecting cultural identity with environmental stewardship
* 📚 **Supporting cultural education and community****resilience** through storytelling, plant walks, and elder teachings

Your[ support ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38i7o39551FUb7Ig8O766qgXVYdFq0B_2WROqUDTXAZZs7u_n-8Ql4b_04YSrZiGj87MFbk-0aquO5T6bamaD65AZHZAFsMhWWs_FNQjCNWl9nZbA6FSNnzOK4dNuMts7mnsyhjgWuQiddRrJQUCFsKkZ43bfcY1_tX3vNVHirJedsEFj0iSzSZKJB6vCyMjh2WuUZ0Y-re0TIRhJnfhjwwSUs9DPJFM5y-9dBFtp00iYbl8HEO1VhN8iYbjjw9sgssj-c2DFGGY2yQTAnXHnZoPcDcDpj7KzeFH4NAz0Epff2hqx26s7C2sP0p2Zx5SBK-MUkwJhVWhhnNW8FcXBzf-WTRyUabCsrYC8tcClE-1p5KUUvwynmL87UfBvbs-30/4ff/aY-mVG0uTQCywwNgS-JGeg/h2/h001.HMvgnhZIU9gRZ6ssqaKxgg-CpRC-WnTGimyNQzdzSnI)helps us **defend what matters most** —our people, waters, and ways of life.
### 🎯 Our Goal: $50,000 by April 30
This campaign will help us:
* [Fund](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38i7o39551FUb7Ig8O766qgXVYdFq0B_2WROqUDTXAZZs7u_n-8Ql4b_04YSrZiGj_j-a7gP4gfwFmZ5nq3VGcnMmGQjtUuwRwmW7gRJu0sWyMnNRwzWXl_V_JVsnomWi1o_Y0W0S0PMMdFjRDPO44cs3SL4jeNMZNsL47H7et_UJCSdOBdZcmFSdWsmRfWCqNpeZe9VrY2by4VP8kE4h4M_RcEGvLc7L1rxweLq1xd7G9EjFFWYiYabCm9NjSTakYQSwb_Au8iqeflhT1b9dZiobOrql6v8YeHk4N6r6A-5fEhTzr1R-vg-z_RHVz0dXhRuyLMzhjloHqlBPFzkcSyn2xso_R0sYtQ0Y790yA1xUPNz6RNKDleI7WJbTS6CmA/4ff/aY-mVG0uTQCywwNgS-JGeg/h3/h001.QskeRLzEf1-cEivBYUpBhdY_kMBYncxXQSqW3G3KhtU) scholarships for youth to attend the **2025 Maui Journey**
* Sustain our **land-based educational programming**
* Support families, elders, and Indigenous teachers leading the work

clean_body: Help us raise $50,000 by April 30 to fund Indigenous youth journeys, land-based education, and cultural restoration. Every gift plants a seed for future generations. | | | Dear Relative, Spring is a season of renewal—and for 7 Directions of Service , it’s a time to plant seeds that will grow into sovereignty, healing, and future leadership. We’re launching our part of our 6-month fundraising plan to support our youth programs, river journeys, and traditional ecological knowledge initiatives. 💧 Why Give Now? At 7 Directions, we are: 🌱 Teaching Indigenous youth land-based life skills rooted in ancestral knowledge 🔥 Fighting fossil fuel projects and protecting our sacred waters 🌊 Preparing for our next youth river journey —connecting cultural identity with environmental stewardship 📚 Supporting cultural education and communityresilience through storytelling, plant walks, and elder teachings Your us defend what matters most —our people, waters, and ways of life. 🎯 Our Goal: $50,000 by April 30 This campaign will help us: scholarships for youth to attend the 2025 Maui Journey Sustain our land-based educational programming Support families, elders, and Indigenous teachers leading the work 💚 Ways You Can Support: ✅ Make a one-time or monthly donation ✅ Share this campaign with friends and community ✅ walk with us through all seven directions Together, we can continue to a future guided by our ancestors and protected by the next generation. subject: Karoline Leavitt just left the CNN host speechless in her stunning defense of President Trump.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Iowa**
body:
Karoline Leavitt, President Trump’s remarkable Press Secretary, just went on CNN to set the record straight.

---

Karoline Leavitt, President Trump’s remarkable Press Secretary, just went on CNN to set the record straight.

Her stunning defense of President Trump and his tariffs left the FAKE NEWS CNN host speechless.

**“President Trump is doubling down on the economic agenda from his successful first term where we saw growth, low inflation, a significant increase in real wages, and American workers put first.**

**With historic tax cuts, massive deregulation, and our energy industry unleashed – we will see an economic BOOM in the months ahead.**

**Don’t bet against President Trump!”**

President Trump promised **YOU** that he would do everything to Make America Great Again.

Right this minute, President Trump is facing attacks from every single side.

In Wisconsin, a liberal Democrat just won a Supreme Court seat that will shape redistricting in the state against Republicans. Democrats have vowed in the state to **IMPEACH** President Trump.

**Even Republicans in Congress have gone on the record and stabbed President Trump in the back.**

With important legislation coming up and **CRITICAL** nominations still needing to be confirmed, we need every Republican to stand strong and defend President Trump.

If the Democrats succeed, their anti-American plans will only get worse, and their tyrannical rule will only get stronger.
**[Before the end of the day, will you please, PLEASE, please go on the record and demand all Republicans to STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP NOW.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfedmsthepeo8j86pkbtsng7qmh6jldh3ptau66g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6cor6cth2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via American Defense News
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za8ondl1bm4mab4vbih49tetdmcaj169qdsb5v68_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6cor7clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztqiecu53jk2ml68i15c51eeuolsklpe39klbp7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6cor7clh2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9ji9g5hh22867et86hbm3304n0p6lc1afa8oqag_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6cor7clh2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv9kkoo7hjo10il6ckcj521d8td7hio801rt6i90_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6cor7clh2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl63qek9v4hn28cnj9a187lav62p0j31v6mlndoo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6cor7clh2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

name: NRSC Election Strategy Team
subject: We cannot afford to get this wrong, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The GOP is getting CRUSHED by the Democrats right now

Friend,

The radical left is mobilizing their base, using every tool at their disposal to outspend and outmaneuver Trump Republicans. _**[This is a dire situation.](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv2pjpfs1pn92pvngge3drghgqvo4f35sa1a20p8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6cor5c1h2bs)**_

Next year's midterm elections will be here before you know it. In the months ahead, it's imperative that **[EVERY grassroots conservative](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zk5iglr4hnvkflec18qnqfaijkvgg6vn806aa93o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6cor5c1h2bs) **steps up and does their part in the fight for America's future.

**[✅ Where we allocate resources

We cannot afford to get this wrong. Your participation is what separates victory from defeat, and we're counting on you to lead the GOP to success.

**[Fill out the Strategic Voter Engagement Survey NOW. The deadline to respond is midnight tonight.>>](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpa2brahr5ib4vtaastih1or2ke7qmt49rbd1eeo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6cor5c1h2bs)**

The Democrats are ALREADY organizing against us, pouring millions into their get-out-the-vote machine. Just look at the results of recent special elections across the country, or their victory in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race. _**[We NEVER would have suffered those losses if we had had you guiding our strategy.](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z05kno87aghbm20pc6oa3pqnglu2o1rphr8eviv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6cor5c1h2bs)**_

Patriots like YOU are the backbone of this movement. But we need your input before it's too late to stop Democrats from wrestling back control of our country.

**[Fill out the Strategic Voter Engagement Survey before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. Don't wait any longer to take action, Friend.](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znn7mpic4iculcjp70b0bt1slpeuvnld5qk4dh6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6cor5c1h2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr7mcf3tiuiae4bg7lq67obmjt7l3q9bs4615h6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj62pb2cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm10sn8rl7q4a4elkh9alhp4lkdt8i9a3c0ph96g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj62pb2cjh2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc5bu43o58ob45mv8q1sm9fdvpbg46gb926f530o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj62pb2cjh2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zen0b5s0keqgifeek46974i3kce5rkv1a18pj5go_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj62pb2cjh2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zah8941eg4tnbkcaov70v9ba3nf0iejjee6ouhj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj62pb2cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---

name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: Support Ancient Christianity
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zt376d5tfsk173d0ahg7409rcc1omcvgefmf3320_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6aob4cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zffa5q7qf88oblo007jvs4obrnpi924k86hnlhq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6aob4cjh2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc05kqt05qviodlrnad6paucq1lir0bdda8k76u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6aob4cjh2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkdh4a1875kl9ekb1l24jcm79luusb6vshl4ln48_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6aob4cjh2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze1ucksmfjbqng66fspacidii7ig7ndmd4h4db3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6aob4cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Byron Donalds
subject: Thank you for your support, Speaker Johnson
body:
This is critical for my governor race

| | | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zr0s1e5ftf39kr50h0d8s7c5p4etagn1o6j0obvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6eoj4c9h2bs)
---
|
---
It’s Byron Donalds, Speaker Johnson just endorsed me in my race for Governor, please take a moment to read his historic statement:
“In Congress, Byron has been tenacious in standing up for Florida and President Trump’s America First agenda. I have no doubt he will bring that same fighting spirit with him as governor.”
I can’t thank Speaker Johnson enough for his kind words and his _**total support**_ of my run for Governor of Florida.
Speaker Johnson has stood by me since DAY ONE, placing his trust in me to enact President Trump’s MAGA agenda.
I would also like to thank _ALL_ of you MAGA Patriots, your support has empowered me to never stop fighting for President Trump’s agenda, and now, _keep Florida Free._
The Democrats are FUMING that Speaker Johnson placed his trust in me; they’re already preparing to **spend millions** against me.
Keeping Florida Red is the most important priority; Democrats know how important the great state of Florida is to taking down the MAGA agenda.
Speaker Johnson’s support is critical for my race, but the Democrats are only adding more fuel to the fire. It’s an uphill battle, _**[so please, can you chip in and join Speaker Johnson and my fight to Keep Florida red?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zi993kgc9mpplcdfgn1pfjp6fkq1592igkchhntg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6eoj4c9h2bs)**_

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: “Totalitarian Novels” | Brave New World
body:
Sign up for our free online course, “Totalitarian Novels,” taught by Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn.

This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh9lu2664ghe2dhnha9kp4vvnh45f6ul0e2arg48_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6eoj4c9h2bs)
---
Sign up for our free online course, "Totalitarian Novels," taught by Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn.

In this course, Dr. Arnn explores the oppressive nature of totalitarian governments by looking at some of the best literature on the subject: George Orwell's _1984_ , Aldous Huxley's _Brave New World_ , Arthur Koestler's _Darkness at Noon_ , and C.S. Lewis's _That Hideous Strength_.

In the third lecture, Dr. Arnn examines the regime in Aldous Huxley's _Brave New World_ , which relies on pleasure and consumerism to keep its citizens docile.

Click the secure link below to start today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/totalitarian-novels**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zn6rot6m5eob6fa5rs4onoa2a1c892e17p0kj9o0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6eoj4c9h2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7dim93rao88i9vk3u2anr8jgacr91dtq9o8cf30_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6eoj2cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlpmq48i4kf0a78a5jus9bbh9rct5utqdf83d8q8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6eoj2cth2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0dtct4askh3f02gv6ltvfitu2niolo0fq2db7cg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj6eoj2cth2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvphlioeppibi45d4cui7mkg8q67fni8p3c9psmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj61p32cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp39btujkfhhvko000dq3c21aa3i07fpfk4oktsg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj61p32cph2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf0gomh470rngnfs0iubvnf3kj1df9rvefhqaoug_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj61p32cph2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztlhsvivu9qtk4h56vqtmjvol5ua8b22ockg79fo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj61p32cph2bs)[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt3m6u50m3ja654103csj32dqbob264paa11dbj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj61p32cph2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

body:
Sign up for our free online course, “Totalitarian Novels,” taught by Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ze6tm68n1sstrj9u0pjb9ls6vjdk2egncsoec4l0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj69o34cph2bs)
---
Sign up for our free online course, "Totalitarian Novels," taught by Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn.

In this course, Dr. Arnn explores the oppressive nature of totalitarian governments by looking at some of the best literature on the subject: George Orwell's _1984_ , Aldous Huxley's _Brave New World_ , Arthur Koestler's _Darkness at Noon_ , and C.S. Lewis's _That Hideous Strength_.

In the third lecture, Dr. Arnn examines the regime in Aldous Huxley's _Brave New World_ , which relies on pleasure and consumerism to keep its citizens docile.

Click the secure link below to start today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/totalitarian-novels**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zd2rbtcplglompmg242oorcp799p4vrnurhjek58_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjj69o34cph2bs)

name: Byron Donalds
subject: Thank you for your support, Speaker Johnson
body:
This is critical for my governor race

| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztchantp446horq5mri67rk7i9b1cn2m8lk1duao_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjgm0o74chh2bs)
---
|
---
It’s Byron Donalds, Speaker Johnson just endorsed me in my race for Governor, please take a moment to read his historic statement:
“In Congress, Byron has been tenacious in standing up for Florida and President Trump’s America First agenda. I have no doubt he will bring that same fighting spirit with him as governor.”
I can’t thank Speaker Johnson enough for his kind words and his _**total support**_ of my run for Governor of Florida.
Speaker Johnson has stood by me since DAY ONE, placing his trust in me to enact President Trump’s MAGA agenda.
I would also like to thank _ALL_ of you MAGA Patriots, your support has empowered me to never stop fighting for President Trump’s agenda, and now, _keep Florida Free._
The Democrats are FUMING that Speaker Johnson placed his trust in me; they’re already preparing to **spend millions** against me.
Keeping Florida Red is the most important priority; Democrats know how important the great state of Florida is to taking down the MAGA agenda.
Speaker Johnson’s support is critical for my race, but the Democrats are only adding more fuel to the fire. It’s an uphill battle, _**[so please, can you chip in and join Speaker Johnson and my fight to Keep Florida red?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0j2d7i7t1o2m3q6hu8ujsori6i95sorlb2otr9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjgm0o74chh2bs)**_

|
---
There will be millions of dollars being spent by Democrats _**AGAINST**_ my race for governor, they want nothing more than to turn Florida blue.
So today, I’m asking you to join Speaker Johnson and me to help us _**[Keep Florida Great!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkde707r6k9ehbhbrvhqd8ef2le16tjn8bos8ge8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cjgm0o74chh2bs)**_ _****_

|

Thank you and god bless,
Byron Donalds _****_

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1906, the first animated film recorded on standard picture film, _Humorous Phases of Funny Faces,_ was released. Running 3 minutes, the silent short includes a dog jumping through a hoop and a man playing with a hat. ## Tariff Collection Begins
President Trump’s unilateral [10% baseline tariffs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2P4yAUAH8N7rCegfijoLjGXa690gL8SN6JDwtIvP73q2y__Wg0mn_37W4oUHr8NRF183kTIG4cFIdx2w2Fa1Pdrj2iQNmhHiYlFymnQXZP7W8zOCeNVX4BuUux4zThMinrAGAeOtIfGygYBwAYZG-kEvNs5eKMtXZEpgB3arn0_zOl9kQfrvzG0rscu6CfrR2VyT9MrEys53n2Pn_ZV6WEtX4YJlZ0OeV4MbG28opH5QNwayoGSsibKeR95RSPXFrlvuTIo0kXd_mVWiGsPOWTo_foWlf0fpwUAtVxYgoe0VD4SWm_rXlr8R0AAP__E79pFw) on imports went into effect on Saturday, with U.S. customs agents beginning to collect the tariffs at seaports, airports, and customs warehouses. Higher tariffs on 57 larger trading partners are set to start next week. The administration released a list of [more than 1,000 exempted product categories](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAUhJ8GOiP_xUDh4jZ0ue2W6ICPwStjR_ZJUN5-RZqttp1vNPo0X_f5DiGGtP2HAy35PEsub4xrxs3sIMT3rFtnPaJE1aIVvVajUr1Q7W65keto3HDTTgo0ptcgBui9kGYQHvo22GuNa24E51yoDpSWw7CocYVlWQw2mqMLlEv3nUOiHX185xeWbs1HG-1O9KiN-tfIqZHTeZ4d7fixqgSlS0iNnBKe9aK5RNfI6VnhN3xWdjWpsjXHiCuFtDEqz-NRWcKTCc4ISvCe1QPqftEt5gUiowIOWcrlqEwNRo3GtMW6xxliDNX0jebbASF-TOmv515W_gQAAP__ciRxxA), including crude oil, petroleum products, and other energy imports. Other excluded categories are pharmaceuticals, uranium, titanium, lumber, semiconductors, and copper. President Trump maintains the tariffs will spur companies to forgo foreign goods and return manufacturing to American shores, among other benefits. Experts say it could take years to [train workers and rebuild infrastructure.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAYAJ8Gb1j8BeKBoYu3dO1o8Wt_EQYLcKy8fZXunU86ne7nsTwMJMjrt9mD7rEsjLAbJgITuXgD6b2IwesYAgt8CJoqwSfOFeXDppmXfJKKO6YEccTdPA2WSKqUdzRGOYD-2IggkhJCKB8NF-x-t3xyxlorAxIkeOiljs8CuW8hpnd5hTq6sg9Jb70fDfEvxGbE5uu6xmxdDlf7cMRmb7rBazXHBq4hNvd67gfupkKMDe8mn9G4flbIKz4btmeDHFrDz2IbDq7ksr9xddnQaVKMDlX744KUoEmFBFl3A-kvpf-35qXZbwAAAP__qKNoCg)
## Houston, Florida to Meet for NCAA Title
The Houston Cougars and Florida Gators [advanced](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFurDAQRb_GdEaDbTAULl5Dt69NicZgllkGm4CzaP8-2jSp0t4rHR2dj9twQ2KK9_-4BZfnNChQtQQjoRkmJH4NppjcHIIKugiuskZ3WttKF4ubrRqbubbYVS3Uuh67urXW-tFD03TQFeTeNDDQVABQ6RK1UW3rdTei974JwkCYKKejfCSKeQkzv9IzHOWYtoLdkvN-Cv1PqF6o_rqu8qT3JVQ_JuZwD0L1M6eDJhSq93iuIXtk_p1lTnJnfMklfZ05RUlR5iXIiJlSRJbjgttOKZ4L7RKqx2HW5_YJ61ocbtovYqazscLAfUPiH7H8V6inU98BAAD__9lHbF4) to the NCAA men's basketball national championship game with wins on Saturday. The teams will play Monday in San Antonio. Houston [went on a 25-8 run at the end of the game](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDHToyAUAH8Nds9BMAYLimvscu2VzgOekQuKAyiTf3-TXP31Ozuz--cxP9AHvz9_40a6LHEWXNyA98CH2aEP77lvnF6IBMmGdHfv5SjlvZPNqpWUHaKi28hHp5QayQq0i0ExSjVw23j9sfGeDx3nvJMtyl4oZeRo0RgzEOs5OV9iav9Gv5eVlvCOF6XWxq0Jei3lyEz-YmJiYqq1ttbkfMRU8odgYrIxBHoSGMwvKgZDYGLaqWYmJne-CK4MazxziTtkGxNB8BfBeTgslOEbu_gdAyzxTP-RDBsmu8KGbqecwSS0LypQV0oEJULFYlcmpo-KialJ2h3Vh-DzcGc9f27ow7eg_HT00uJfAAAA___eE3vh) to defeat Duke 70-67 on Saturday night. Florida beat Auburn 79-73 earlier in the day. All-American Walter Clayton Jr. [scored a career-high 34 points](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO4yAQxvGnwd1EeGCdpHBxjbu99spowEMyt2OIgNjatz9l--s__aTv_-fz9kmiku-_aeO5p3JDix9gPdjptpLo980P65yYkd3A83j27urceXTDY8YLIk9xJItxIp9CvASOfkpX6_CDaJD5rVlvp9FaO7oTOY-XS3DXSCGEiY23vEov9fS3SO4PTvpddq6nWLZB50fvz2bcL4OLweU4jlMMrT1L7e29MLjEosp3hkDti3sgVYNL5qMZXJKWKitBoPgFkiFHIujSleFOG0MqFZLU1qHLxtAkRwa09gyUOlc4RFeIZeMf4JAMewN6hVfNby5JJoVUXtXgorKzwWWo8_o8RFXadDbe3jcS_TnT_xd3n_FfAAAA__9VBX9V) to help the Gators overcome a nine-point second-half deficit. Also on Saturday, Duke's Cooper Flagg became only the fourth freshman [to win the Wooden Award](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAYAJ8Gb1jwgX8yMHRhS9eOFpjPNg0GC2hQ3r5K984nnU73dV_uxgcf909zoqpbWoDBQJmkbFyc8eG1yM6pDRFQdKj4JMVNiImL7lACgM8SxQBidCMDZ5kT0-jmjRnknHdevW1MspEzxrjojZAwz1bcVmOtHZFIhs7XlPvv5GM9cAuv9MTcr-nsgjpqvQoRHwQ0Ad1a67Fc8Q0J6BNjoWsKAXek1pQHVmtCIKBLTflFQC8EtHcEtJSDHGY-E9Du54F0TenCTLdg9p1aXNOJhcp60C1jOU4TafORtpQcRmqaya7Lyl3Nh-DLOBHJ9tP48FdZ_7v2VPAbAAD__41Lbt4) as the most outstanding men’s college basketball player.
## Senate Adopts Spending Plan
The U.S. Senate [adopted a budget resolution](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAUBb8GOiwM2A4FxWvc5bVbWhe4JKwwREBs5e9X3n67Ix1pRpqv-3aHmGJ-_IcdTQ9lE1xMjCvG581DTJ9NUW8CokBJ0YyLklrKZZT0aRROVt9CwMmFRU8WlNJagMXgXYDZ0WguGld8HjnnoxxAKnG7WakdWGtnJIqjj73U4bvE3J8Y0qccWAdXdprMs_dXI_IfESsR63meg7Mt49mun4j1mkSsDTN0ZEfpyIBV2IFVfL1tig4ys2__wM4qtpLePZZMxEqr8a8zphTbvBDFHzvE9Cvtf0U4jPgJAAD__-5zYUs) on Saturday, putting Congress one step closer to enacting President Trump's legislative agenda. The resolution still needs to be adopted by the House before the two chambers can begin negotiations on a final bill. The spending plan aims to make tax cuts enacted during President Trump's first term permanent, and [raise the country's borrowing limit](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L1urDAQxfGnMZ3R-APDFi5uQ7e3TYnGMCxOBpuAWbRvH2361Ef6Hen_cR_uGDmmx39cyZc5Dxp0I8FKcMOEkV-DrSY_E2kyFXnVWnMzplWmWvwtBNuObraNbdXUKiCYOkAKDlXTOayif2tgwSkAUKZGY3XXBXMbMYTgSFigKZa81585prLQzK_8pL0e81qxX0rZDmH-Cd0L3V_XVb9wyfm9Ct0nug6h-522M3AcMR3y-D4xBCb5RmTgk7Y9piLPxHn8ksoqZxsFpl7KytXup-2KzPFwrbDwWDHy73P5q8TT658AAAD__56jYOw) by $5 trillion to avoid a debt default. The measure also would beef up border security, expand oil and gas drilling, and increase defense spending.

The debate over the proposal revealed [the biggest looming fight](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8GNiJ8L7HxwNDFW7p2tPi5jm-FTWRIorx9lXbu-n3SOdL5uswXz5n366ffyLWlzKDhrLRRup-T5_yajUxuIQJCSa4bDI6IQ4dyddHGIRn0mGzq4nkk0mS8t1aPIS5jkOzeNG1032mtOzx5NGBtwDH6EEJPwmhK3Mpx-i68t5WW_CoPOk6xbDK7tbVbFfghYBIwtZVWzvn9CZjWstFOzypgqrT7RgKmMyAOdlB_gzrodg-Zo9-repRGKtzTlZo6qJZ8b1x2AZM8XLo9OWeu_SCMvm6efx2y_dfj4eAnAAD__2yFY7s) between Republicans, who control both the Senate and House, may be over Medicaid.

Today’s sponsor is Check out their 9 Hidden Perks of Your Amazon Prime Membership. | Tariff Collection Begins President Trump’s unilateral on imports went into effect on Saturday, with U.S. customs agents beginning to collect the tariffs at seaports, airports, and customs warehouses. Higher tariffs on 57 larger trading partners are set to start next week. The administration released a list of , including crude oil, petroleum products, and other energy imports. Other excluded categories are pharmaceuticals, uranium, titanium, lumber, semiconductors, and copper. President Trump maintains the tariffs will spur companies to forgo foreign goods and return manufacturing to American shores, among other benefits. Experts say it could take years to Houston, Florida to Meet for NCAA Title The Houston Cougars and Florida Gators to the NCAA men's basketball national championship game with wins on Saturday. The teams will play Monday in San Antonio. Houston to defeat Duke 70-67 on Saturday night. Florida beat Auburn 79-73 earlier in the day. All-American Walter Clayton Jr. to help the Gators overcome a nine-point second-half deficit. Also on Saturday, Duke's Cooper Flagg became only the fourth freshman as the most outstanding men’s college basketball player. Senate Adopts Spending Plan The U.S. Senate on Saturday, putting Congress one step closer to enacting President Trump's legislative agenda. The resolution still needs to be adopted by the House before the two chambers can begin negotiations on a final bill. The spending plan aims to make tax cuts enacted during President Trump's first term permanent, and by $5 trillion to avoid a debt default. The measure also would beef up border security, expand oil and gas drilling, and increase defense spending. The debate over the proposal revealed between Republicans, who control both the Senate and House, may be over Medicaid. body:
Don't miss your chance to make an impact

Friend,

The future of the Republican Party is being decided **[right now](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=30d02011fe604807aaf1009884fd8288&_e=I13lH8vI37M6uGJ13Q4tCIpYOYyDwT3EvpoEATDW_L0netfmh1a8K5S4EHE-ecbh3qEq_NI_XwRAsGS4lhRaB149owWfprFXtzZE1XxGKwmVZp4GVxzn4BMfaRla-tqHA3wSgdiKJHtD-ExI3jcN1ouGGfx6Ihl4zywLvE1gcONuG2Hfq0-DugAYiHA8g99ts6l22uCjWbyycekMDScXnTxv8DXAJj65cqWq9ELAUazI6IAETagqF-Tlrmu0GneugY9SicCIMw5XNscriVSaVBh2RKKuNlq0ro2bqn_6ez21L99GT08P7gLKz-V5bfTji1gAr9pnpvRz5R_Ly7hm7Vt0oH9_sXu12M3p3svmctngMDx29clHpDKT80dbhSxDak7AUFaUaMsgnv8fL8fNMqsvbMYm74Mbjpd1vackGHcTUx88g2WNWpTtddFB1_8mxR3sw9iSy55_DiZ_QpiED3QVmJbe0Cy_D3RW85mnGs0%3D)** -- and we need YOUR input.

We're launching the **[GOP Party Pulse,](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=30d02011fe604807aaf1009884fd8288&_e=I13lH8vI37M6uGJ13Q4tCIpYOYyDwT3EvpoEATDW_L0netfmh1a8K5S4EHE-ecbh3qEq_NI_XwRAsGS4lhRaB149owWfprFXtzZE1XxGKwmVZp4GVxzn4BMfaRla-tqHA3wSgdiKJHtD-ExI3jcN1ouGGfx6Ihl4zywLvE1gcONuG2Hfq0-DugAYiHA8g99ts6l22uCjWbyycekMDScXnTxv8DXAJj65cqWq9ELAUazI6IAETagqF-Tlrmu0GneugY9SicCIMw5XNscriVSaVBh2RKKuNlq0ro2bqn_6ez21L99GT08P7gLKz-V5bfTjWx00y70XPAxRyljhiZUPgMNmUqtahsOOcnLy-vlCZ0OO_qJabIiuKmK4f3Ivj2Wcq_mAmGA553tpb8mPhVLUPd0Y_u4wXJov4IMkzSRsSzj7L7jBlq9Q5TPOOIWGvvukAANwOtmkWbKMkmvbbj264dFdeUMHj_TupgU7uEYD1S4%3D)** a critical survey designed to help shape the Republican platform for 2025 and beyond. This is your chance to tell us what issues matter most, what battles we must fight, and how we can _**[build a stronger, more conservative America.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=30d02011fe604807aaf1009884fd8288&_e=I13lH8vI37M6uGJ13Q4tCIpYOYyDwT3EvpoEATDW_L0netfmh1a8K5S4EHE-ecbh3qEq_NI_XwRAsGS4lhRaB149owWfprFXtzZE1XxGKwmVZp4GVxzn4BMfaRla-tqHA3wSgdiKJHtD-ExI3jcN1ouGGfx6Ihl4zywLvE1gcONuG2Hfq0-DugAYiHA8g99ts6l22uCjWbyycekMDScXnTxv8DXAJj65cqWq9ELAUazI6IAETagqF-Tlrmu0GneugY9SicCIMw5XNscriVSaVBh2RKKuNlq0ro2bqn_6ez21L99GT08P7gLKz-V5bfTjmBGjpMzK-_dEuawp2ymYtsCcuP2A51eQQK00BZoUKdVoeZu9dhSjDOF4TOru8pJAaqacdhc26DCmk3RhjDTpkGuMABNRM-UWv09BrSfFE_VFgO0j1TD8fRHAoCrB6HicMthX8JYFhXvaSz2SwXyF2veDoidAE8SYhbZacTsCfw8%3D)**_

**Will you take 2 minutes to share your thoughts with us?**

******************************************************[👉 Take the GOP Party Pulse Survey Now>>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=30d02011fe604807aaf1009884fd8288&_e=I13lH8vI37M6uGJ13Q4tCIpYOYyDwT3EvpoEATDW_L0netfmh1a8K5S4EHE-ecbh3qEq_NI_XwRAsGS4lhRaB149owWfprFXtzZE1XxGKwmVZp4GVxzn4BMfaRla-tqHA3wSgdiKJHtD-ExI3jcN1ouGGfx6Ihl4zywLvE1gcONuG2Hfq0-DugAYiHA8g99ts6l22uCjWbyycekMDScXnTxv8DXAJj65cqWq9ELAUazI6IAETagqF-Tlrmu0GneugY9SicCIMw5XNscriVSaVBh2RKKuNlq0ro2bqn_6ez21L99GT08P7gLKz-V5bfTj4L0LrP6om33VtKs0VQR8BBlNUSGzLW13C17xO2Cw6gOrkrE-A5Y3WgpAxmjoz8PuLxfQ8o9eEmq--GVlpTnds66urAd4PmXdpjFulrNkqVoMQdn0aZJcoMqoIhsFL0phsrJWUSRIC5lEtSBFxBH3ITYMFuQf1dnzUf9llkj5aZA%3D)******************************************************

"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." Pop Acta Media | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/WQ85Bpoagmy0ea3KynyW8Ln5RamL4ErbpYiGwYPWEqkacNuemb7KhBiKabG9d4yozv02FdC3gsXqduaIpDHcvFABHBZZOV-iV0EE_W0tiZMkwPPZ4qwvDmJJdR_6HXZ8CAyqazB2WnQf5UFnjPg58Ird5nznLUPfEAAmEBCPPK-d1gKXqrRLTwWPJN4oAoddq7IJPpkOOkuxdSLrdnqBICf9FHjUkUorHHbq9QEtwRQTcCc_rTKxBikgf-mApFVKBTbCTrRIgWrkMAyUQGRjqY6HGSQG0lWPOuh0vKgxOXXy5Kf-YQEojolyHe3yLaKtkbogczoa4yvBdyuKeylH_QKmW2LW7H74960qY9Bj8OrUI8g_exUv7cJAXmVDCZ4-kcCVWXYFvwaOpiOopJUDXzsnDviR3NtA6zmbCrLiJC7b2qxHWNThadPckTX8Qs39nVKqznf7s7Njb3RxtDcGmUjRVbgVQPlPb-06tkKcFaULg4o6s-B4I1wrCg/mTGPRXIT3GRVFhCZjWRJiz5HN0uVwqwc/7)

| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/UJ_70ee0lKjGARljVh4K8y3h8pXwTpjjmYbG232sV0HUjTJeg_ubGVrNuIWVF3DXF9itIIHK-dOXTy9PpF_5dPjguGcKcINt8N1ojNS-bstqOE4NaIJV0AQ5H8dA6ula3CttMoImB7CeOcP-VZAbedVOa7Mbppl-WJjIu-r-KxoqsMY2QtkGUKAMQOrs3aE_SvQVO2tYdQOcrhhQbPWSrT_DUMyVc6tO8ZN1d_iyrmf079z7bL4IHNOeVR_aNJBgd_s-p6gEfqdcMtXYNS28Dx_GBKTmWJXFyOyvJtAbgXZrffoUieB5aH8hFow0jzFZgVS_hz3Nhf7mSIdS3yIudDRkUEkJG0dpscyoSJjiqAqs0SUTFwkhLpTSBnSqScz-uWURx7mZbhJoI40cRN2XfmgrNiNGUZmsYs3flj-hcxfV1REsU6Kd7_u15vYiJ_5lvHreGyBQLnYUJ4m_bWOHLnF1rZcN4kmNEcZ9LU4iaEtDDFMH5IKR6rsdnw/Ig-bDL4WVbHAjT2vj4n_e1T6bc3h4dFJ/7)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Protect our girls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Principles Project](https://go
body:
Stop Federal Funding for Radical School Policies

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ai5l/?__vbtrk=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, something MUST be done about this.
Across America, the Left is pushing aside young girls to make way for the woke mob’s radical trans agenda.
**And now, young girls are being compelled to share locker rooms and private spaces with biological males, violating their fundamental right to privacy and safety.**
Just recently, at Shepard Middle School in Illinois, a disturbing case emerged where school staff forced girls against their will to change clothes in front of a biologically male student “identifying” as female.
Let me say that again, despite the girls’ objections,** the school's staff FORCED these girls to change in front of boys.**
Friend, _it’s sickening_.
This policy not only compromises their safety but constitutes abuse, attacking young women's dignity and privacy during one of the most vulnerable times of their lives.
**But the American Principles Project (APP) isn’t just going to sit around and let the woke mob and their leftist lackeys take our girl’s innocence.**
That’s why we are fighting to ban federal funding from Shepard Middle School in Illinois and any other school that pushes this radical trans agenda onto students.
To ensure that any of these schools that are knowingly endangering our daughters and violate parents’ rights to oppose this DO NOT receive a single taxpayer dollar.
_And now we need pro-Family Americans like you to join us in this fight._
**_[So please, take a moment to sign your petition to Defund the Trans Agenda in our schools and stand with APP to stop federal funds from going to any school enforcing these vile policies](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ai5l/?__vbtrk=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ai5l/?__vbtrk=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
You see, these policies violate the rights and safety of the 99.9% - all to cater to the whims of a tiny minority.
And with your help, we can show weak-kneed politicians in Washington that the American people are fed up.
Because nobody has a right to use the wrong bathroom, locker room, or changing room.
NOBODY should be forced to undress in front of members of the opposite sex.
**But that’s exactly what these young girls in our schools have been forced to do thanks to the woke mob and their leftist allies.**
That’s why I’m asking you to sign your petition TODAY so we can put an end to this insanity once and for all.
**_[Join the fight today and help APP protect our children from the Left’s radical Trans agenda](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ai5l/?__vbtrk=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

[DEFUND THE TRANS AGENDA](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ai5l/?__vbtrk=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Together, we can defend our daughters, uphold privacy, and restore sanity to our schools.
Thank you for your support and immediate action.

_Warm regards,_

**Riley Gaines** American Principles Project

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ai5l/?__vbtrk=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**P.S.** Across America, young girls are being compelled to share locker rooms and private spaces with biological males, violating their fundamental right to privacy and safety.
**Your APP is taking a stand and we need your help.**
**_[Please sign your petition to Defund the Trans Agenda in our schools and stand with APP to stop federal funds from going to any school enforcing these vile policies](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ai5l/?__vbtrk=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
And if you can, after you add your name, please help APP even further by **[chipping in $10, $25, or more today](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ai5l/?__vbtrk=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzOTkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)** to help us keep fighting to protect children, defend family values, and push back against the Left’s radical anti-Family agenda.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Unleashing excellence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
It's simple: if you're not performing, you're not getting paid

It's simple: if you're not performing, you're not getting paid
It's simple: if you're not performing, you're not getting paid
| |
---
| | | | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---

Peter,

The failed education bureaucracy in America had its chance to get it right. And what do we have to show for it? A system that rewards tenure over performance, promotes victimhood, and lowers standards to paper over failure.

Meanwhile, our children are left to suffer the consequences.

**Today, 70% of U.S. 8th graders are NOT proficient in reading. That 's unacceptable. As Governor, I'll take a wrecking ball to the entire system. **

I won't play nice with the entrenched special interests holding our children back. It's time to build a new system that rewards EXCELLENCE. Ohio will be the first state in the nation to implement merit-based pay for public school teachers.

Teaching is a noble profession. And if you're a rockstar educator who's getting results, you can expect to be compensated handsomely for your excellence. On the other hand, low performers will no longer climb the ladder like everyone else.

This isn't a partisan issue. This is a common-sense revolution that will change the future of education.

But the education bureaucracy won't go down without a fight. Neither will the corrupt teacher's unions. They'll throw everything they've got at us to try and stop this reform from EVER happening. That's why I need your support.

Will you help us fix our education crisis?
**[SIGN MY PETITION: Institute merit-based pay for public school teachers!](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews. "SIGN MY PETITION: Institute merit-based pay for public school teachers!")**

---
| | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---

And if you're as fed up as I am with the failed status quo, **[consider making a contribution to our campaign today.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-4N2bxYqmPg0KHO21-OQw "consider making a contribution to our campaign today.")** We're not just fighting for education reform - we're fighting for the future of our state.

It's time to take a stand and fight for what's right. Join me in this revolution to transform our system and give our children the education they deserve.

God Bless you and God Bless America,

Vivek Ramaswamy
Candidate for Governor of Ohio

---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
---

350 E 1st Ave Ste 100
Columbus, OH 43201

[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)

| To unsubscribe from this mailing list [click here](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)

subject: Your priorities. Your party. Your voice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The GOP Party Pulse survey closes soon

| BREAKING: "The fate of MSNBC could be in Trump's hands" [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70ec0c8b-134e-412a-a6c0-368907f9b380/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We need to know, Peter: Do you support MSNBC?

|
---
| | | Trump has made it no secret that he is set on dismantling news media channels that are holding him accountable – like MSNBC! He's gone so far as to say, "They're really corrupt and they're illegal." What?? Peter, we can't let Trump or his MAGA allies attack our right to free speech. We'll need to stand with our journalists who are fighting for the truth and to hold this administration accountable. [That's why we're checking in our team with a 1-minute poll that closes at midnight tonight:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81001adf-ded4-446d-8377-44a5655f0d2d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Do you support MSNBC?

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta12cf4f8-ecc9-44ab-8697-a5917fff2e50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: History Facts
subject: Meet the bear that fought in WWII
body:
Standing in the shadow of Scotland’s Edinburgh Castle is a statue of a man and a bear.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68ep9inxlm54ntf1ikav4so0mf2k0wooq8tkl9bfuwfrx7n6mehuhmv7a8xdmv6au9bzoicrey724a3n73gbdnc02xy46vw3n0wa5gw643oy5tzczv52pf0jnc5dyr96x3434vjtum15txp93&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suakqy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [A brown bear became an army corporal during WWII.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suakqy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suakqy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suakqy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| S tanding in the shadow of Scotland’s Edinburgh Castle is a statue of a man and a bear. The placard next to them reveals they are Polish soldiers and World War II heroes — yes, even the bear. Named “Wojtek,” the Syrian brown bear spent years in the Polish army before his journey ended in Edinburgh, where his statue’s nose now gleams gold from friendly pats. But that journey began thousands of miles away in Iran, in 1942.
---
Wojtek arrived at the 22nd Artillery Supply Company of the Polish II Corps by happenstance, when a young Iranian shepard [traded](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suakqy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) the orphaned bear for a Swiss army knife, some chocolate, and canned beef. The Polish soldiers received a tiny cub in a burlap sack, who was placed under the care of a soldier named Peter Prendys. To everyone’s delight, the animal quickly assimilated, and in 1944 he became Private Wojtek, meaning “joyful warrior” in Polish. He was fed double rations, often washing it down with a beer.
Wojtek’s antics provided much-needed entertainment, but he was more than just a pet. The bear proved his worth on the battlefield when his company was reassigned to Italy. Eyewitness reports from May 1944, during the Battle of Monte Cassino, purport that Wojtek bravely carried artillery shells and ammo crates across the battlefield. After the battle, the company changed its insignia to a bear holding an artillery shell, and Wojtek was promoted to corporal. When the war ended, Wojtek said goodbye to his compeers and retired to the Edinburgh Zoo, where he lived from 1947 until his death in 1963, and where a statue now honors his extraordinary life of adventure and achievement.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suakqy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suakqy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---

## The British Empire established an Imperial Camel Corps during WWI.
The scorching deserts of the Middle East and Africa are no places for horses, so during World War I, the British military [looked](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suakqy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to a more self-sufficient desert dweller: the camel. Thanks to camels’ unique ability to conserve water, they can last up to a week without water in extreme conditions. Having been domesticated for thousands of years, these dromedaries were a natural choice to serve as a reliable mode of transportation for soldiers during World War I — without depleting valuable water supplies. The camel brigade was established in 1916, and proved so valuable that by the war’s end it grew to four battalions (mainly of British, Australian, and New Zealand troops). Well trained and agile in desert terrain, the camels were indispensable during regional engagements, including the culminating battle of the Sinai and Palestine campaign — the 1918 Battle of Megiddo — which ended in an Allied victory against German and Ottoman forces.
---

subject: Around the World: April 6th, 2025
body:
This week, global markets took a hard hit — and it all traces back to one man.
| | | | | |
---
**_Around the World_**
---
Hello, friend! Welcome back to _Around the World,_ your weekly analysis of how global events are shaping U.S. politics and policy. This week, we're looking at the real impact of Donald Trump’s new tariffs; from rising consumer costs to destabilized trade alliances. These moves aren't just bad economics, they're a direct threat to American workers and our global standing. Let’s get into it.
---
| | | | **Trump's Tariffs**
---
|
---
On April 2nd, Donald Trump announced sweeping new tariffs on imports from almost every country on Earth. Stock markets immediately tanked. Global supply chains recoiled. And countries around the world are making one thing clear: the United States is no longer a trusted economic leader. Let’s start with Canada. Prime Minister Mark Carney publicly announced that if the U.S. won’t lead, Canada will. That’s not just a soundbite — it’s a fundamental realignment. The world sees the power vacuum Trump is creating, and other countries are stepping in. Across Europe, the response is even more stark. European officials are refusing to cooperate with the new U.S. trade policy, calling it dangerous and irrational. Germany is taking it a step further: leaders there are now openly considering removing all 1,200 tons of their strategic gold reserves from the Federal Reserve Bank in New York. That’s €113 billion in gold — nearly one-third of Germany’s entire reserve — being pulled out of the United States. The reason? In their words, **Washington is no longer a reliable partner.** Then there’s China, which hit back just hours after the tariffs were announced. Their response? A brutal 34% tariff on American exports — targeted specifically at the sectors that power the MAGA economy: agriculture, energy, semiconductors, and cars. These are not symbolic measures. They’re calculated, and they will hit American families where it hurts. Trump’s response?**He went online to declare that “CHINA PANICKED.** ” In reality, it’s the U.S. that looks unprepared and unhinged. But here’s where the story takes a darker turn: the two countries that are completely exempt from Trump’s tariffs? **Russia and North Korea.** Now you might assume this exemption is due to sanctions — that we’re not importing much from those countries anyway. But that’s not true in Russia’s case. In 2024, the United States actually imported more from Russia than from Iran. Russia sent us nearly $3 billion in goods. Iran? Just $2 billion. And yet Trump’s plan puts a 10% tariff on Iranian imports — and zero on Russian ones. At best, this is negligence. At worst, it’s coordination. Trump isn’t hiding his intentions either. He reposted a video claiming that he’s intentionally crashing the economy, claiming it’s all part of a strategy to lower oil prices. So what are we really watching here? It looks less like a trade policy and more like economic sabotage. We’re left with three possible explanations: 1.) **Trump doesn’t know what he’s doing.** He genuinely doesn’t understand the basic mechanics of international trade, global markets, or the long-term effects of a tariff war. 2.) **He’s doing this in service of foreign governments.** Trump has long admired authoritarian regimes — from Putin to Kim Jong Un to Viktor Orbán — and this policy disproportionately benefits their economies, while isolating ours. 3.) **This is part of a fascist coup.** When oligarchs want to seize total control, they crash the economy on purpose. If they take a hit, that’s fine — because they know the rest of us will suffer more. The goal isn’t stability — it’s power. And frankly, it could be all three. This isn’t just about tariffs. It’s about what kind of country we’re becoming. A country where allies feel the need to prepare for our collapse. Where hostile nations are rewarded. Where economic sabotage is reframed as “strategy.” And where the people in charge act like the fallout is someone else’s problem. This moment is a wake-up call: not just for economists and diplomats, but for all of us. Because if we let this kind of economic chaos become the norm, we’re not just risking recession. We’re risking our standing in the world, our national security, and the basic well-being of millions of people. So here’s the hard truth: The global economy is crashing. Trump’s policies are pushing it over the edge. And the rest of the world is moving on, with or without us. We can’t afford to pretend this is business as usual. It’s not. It’s sabotage, and we need to call it what it is. With hope for a better future,
---
|
---
-Olya Makarova
---

But we need your input before it's too late to stop Democrats from wrestling back control of our country. Thank you, NRSC Election Strategy Team ******************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Pop Acta Media | Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

More than 30 nations participated in the six-month event, which attracted 6.3 million visitors. The 622-foot Tower of the Americas became a monument to the Southwest's first international exposition.
