---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/april-5-rallies-send-clear-message?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Something extraordinary happened on April 5. Days after voters in Wisconsin soundly rebuked a Nazi saluting billionaire's $20M in their State Supreme Court election, protesters held more than 1,200 rallies nationwide, led by more than 150 civil rights and nonprofit organizations, all to give billionaire oligarchs the middle finger. From coast to coast, Americans of every background marched with one united message: get billionaires out of our elections.
It was a powerful, hopeful, urgent moment. But we are not done yet. To truly save our republic, this work must go further and also recognize what some might consider a hard to swallow pill. **Let 's Address This.**
**I am doing everything in my power to raise awareness on human rights and justice. I cannot do it alone. I hope you consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..zgNjrJ6slOrXe34UO5F2O2rO5vvswG7z8re_z7RSeVo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=160704749)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3c4f0db6-e56c-4dc3-8096-9d8ba2f55e73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hands Off Protest: NEW YORK CITY [Credit: Seth Harrison/The Journal News]
## Citizens United Was the First Domino
The protests targeted the growing influence of Elon Musk, Donald Trump, and the billionaire class that has used their wealth to distort our democracy beyond recognition. Protestors demanded a democracy that works for the people--not for those with private jets and political puppets.
This crisis didn't begin overnight. Ever since the catastrophic 2010 Citizens United decision, billionaires have been free to pour unlimited money into elections, buying influence, drowning out everyday voices, and essentially handpicking politicians to serve their interests. When Joe Biden was elected, I--and millions of others--urged him to abolish the filibuster, pass federal voting rights, and overturn Citizens United. He refused.
Now, the Republican Party--yes, the same one that once claimed the filibuster was sacred--is openly considering to abolish the filibuster themselves to ram through a massive billionaire tax giveaway that will:
* Gut Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security
* Slash SNAP, public education, and infrastructure
* Funnel even more wealth to the top 0.1%

Economists estimate this disastrous plan [would increase the national debt by $37 trillion over the next 30 years](https://substack.com/redirect/6516009e-19d5-408e-b546-57607bb13eef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). In the meantime, consumer confidence is cratering, the stock market is tumbling, [and the likelihood of a global recession has jumped to 60%](https://substack.com/redirect/f0c33c9a-a774-4686-8867-2fd813ba24f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
This is not fiscal policy--it's financial warfare on working people.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/49a02bd4-7eb8-47df-9d4d-d6909bae55ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hands Off Protest: PORTLAND [Credit: Joni Auden Land/OPB]
## The Hard To Swallow Pill: Corporate Complicity in Both Parties
But here's the truth that too few are willing to say aloud: this is not just a Republican problem.
Yes, Musk and Trump are openly attacking our democracy. Yes, MAGA extremists want to dismantle every protection working families rely on. But we cannot ignore the corporate Democrats who enable them. The politicians who show up at protests against Elon Musk while quietly taking checks from Jeff Bezos, Mark Zuckerberg, Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Big Health are not allies of the people.
You cannot claim to be fighting fascism while your campaign is funded by the very oligarchs fueling that fascism.
Over 90% of Americans support banning corporate PAC money in politics. The people are clear. The politicians are complicit.
Democratic leaders who claim moral high ground while still pocketing checks from billionaires must understand: _these protests are also against you_. This is not a "both sides" statement. It is an affirmation of the fact that you cannot claim to be the opposition party to fascism, when you accept funding by the same billionaire oligarchs funding fascism. Does that make sense?
Let me illustrate to show how real this problem actually is.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/77d56aa1-4e34-4381-b9ce-6830f21a0fba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hands Off Protest: CHICAGO
## I Know This Fight Personally
In my own campaign for Congress, I ran a 100% people-powered campaign, refusing all corporate PAC money. My opponent, Rep. Bill Foster, a corporate Democrat in Illinois' 11th District, ran a campaign funded by the very same corporations bankrolling MAGA Republicans.
And his votes reflected it:
* He voted with Trump to deregulate banks--enabling the SVB collapse.
* He voted with Republicans to expand offshore drilling, gut climate protections, and promote fracking--giving MAGAs cover to advance climate destruction.
* He co-sponsored a Republican bill to weaken the Americans with Disabilities Act--giving MAGAs cover to justify stripping civil rights from the largest minority in America (disabilities impact 1 in 6 Americans).
* He voted with Republicans three separate times to weaken the Affordable Care Act--including gutting protections for people with pre-existing conditions.

And he did all this after accepting money from big banks before voting to gut bank regulation, money from Exxon before voting to destroy our climate, money from business lobbies (including Bezos) before voting to gut ADA protections, and money from big health before voting to gut the ACA. If I didn't tell you Bill Foster is a Democrat, you'd absolutely believe he's a MAGA fascist. And that's the point. Democrats will not defeat fascism when their own electeds are voting like fascists.
**If you find value in these critical updates that corporate media ignores, join our movement for justice and subscribe.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..zgNjrJ6slOrXe34UO5F2O2rO5vvswG7z8re_z7RSeVo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=160704749)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e3f7b8f9-91d5-4848-8472-427890850b2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hands Off Protest: HOUSTON
## A Path Forward--Only If We're Honest
The April 5 protests are a positive step. They mark a critical inflection point. Hundreds of thousands of Americans took to the streets to demand that billionaires stop buying our elections. But if we are serious about saving democracy, we must have the courage to look inward as well.
That means:
* Rejecting all billionaire money, no matter the party affiliation.
* Ending corporate PAC funding, full stop.
* Running people-powered campaigns built on justice, not wealth.
* Electing leaders with the courage to fight, not just perform.

Because we will not stop MAGA with a Democratic Party that continues to be complicit. We must be honest about that. And we must demand better.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/92c0a3fb-c119-4d0e-b16c-c1cb8099a4c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hands Off Protest: WASHINGTON D.C. [Credit: WTOP Jimmy Alexander]
## Let's Build This Together
True reform will come when we dismantle the billionaire grip on politics from both sides of the aisle. This fight will be long and difficult, but we are not helpless. The April 5 protests are a powerful step forward. It shows what we are capable of if we rise up for justice in a united front. Now, we must build on that momentum.
Here's what you can do:
✅ [Call your Members of Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/8cde180c-6d20-429c-9fbe-61e7bf883b0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and demand they refuse all billionaire and corporate PAC money. Tell them you will not vote for them if they choose billionaires over democracy.
✅ Support people-powered candidates in your community who run on justice, not wealth. When they ask you for support, ask if they are 100% people funded. If they're not, they don't deserve your support because they are telling you they won't listen to you anyway.
✅ Share this message with your networks--and don't let corporate media bury the truth. Especially if you attended a rally (even if you didn't) make sure everyone you know has these next steps in mind.
Let me be explicitly clear--I am not suggesting you don't vote. On the contrary, I am proudly and loudly calling on you to vote in every single election without exception, but do not give away your vote to politicians funded by the very billionaires and billion dollar corporations destroying our democracy. Vote for the people funded candidates working hard to protect our democracy. That's how we save our republic.
Finally, subscribe to independent voices like mine who speak truth to power and refuse to be bought. As billionaires continue to buy out major media, voices like this platform can continue to speak truth to power--but only with your support. My platform, _Let 's Address This_, is proudly people-funded. I don't take corporate money. I write daily on human rights issues that corporate media refuses to cover. You can [subscribe for free or support with $6/month](https://substack.com/redirect/0131f5e2-4dc1-4586-ab13-85555ded775a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--whatever works for you.
But more than anything, I'm grateful for your trust, compassion, and commitment to justice. Let's keep building this movement, together.

clean_body: But there's another deeper message that Americans must recognize if we truly hope to stop billionaires and fascists | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! But there's another deeper message that Americans must recognize if we truly hope to stop billionaires and fascists | | | Apr 6 | | | | | | | | | | | | Something extraordinary happened on April 5. Days after voters in Wisconsin soundly rebuked a Nazi saluting billionaire's $20M in their State Supreme Court election, protesters held more than 1,200 rallies nationwide, led by more than 150 civil rights and nonprofit organizations, all to give billionaire oligarchs the middle finger. From coast to coast, Americans of every background marched with one united message: get billionaires out of our elections. It was a powerful, hopeful, urgent moment. But we are not done yet. To truly save our republic, this work must go further and also recognize what some might consider a hard to swallow pill. Let 's Address This. I am doing everything in my power to raise awareness on human rights and justice. I cannot do it alone. I hope you consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | | ---|---|--- Hands Off Protest: NEW YORK CITY [Credit: Seth Harrison/The Journal News] Citizens United Was the First Domino The protests targeted the growing influence of Elon Musk, Donald Trump, and the billionaire class that has used their wealth to distort our democracy beyond recognition. Protestors demanded a democracy that works for the people--not for those with private jets and political puppets. This crisis didn't begin overnight. Ever since the catastrophic 2010 Citizens United decision, billionaires have been free to pour unlimited money into elections, buying influence, drowning out everyday voices, and essentially handpicking politicians to serve their interests. When Joe Biden was elected, I--and millions of others--urged him to abolish the filibuster, pass federal voting rights, and overturn Citizens United. He refused. Now, the Republican Party--yes, the same one that once claimed the filibuster was sacred--is openly considering to abolish the filibuster themselves to ram through a massive billionaire tax giveaway that will: Gut Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security Slash SNAP, public education, and infrastructure Funnel even more wealth to the top 0.1% Economists estimate this disastrous plan . In the meantime, consumer confidence is cratering, the stock market is tumbling, . This is not fiscal policy--it's financial warfare on working people. | | ---|---|--- Hands Off Protest: PORTLAND [Credit: Joni Auden Land/OPB] The Hard To Swallow Pill: Corporate Complicity in Both Parties But here's the truth that too few are willing to say aloud: this is not just a Republican problem. Yes, Musk and Trump are openly attacking our democracy. Yes, MAGA extremists want to dismantle every protection working families rely on. But we cannot ignore the corporate Democrats who enable them. The politicians who show up at protests against Elon Musk while quietly taking checks from Jeff Bezos, Mark Zuckerberg, Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Big Health are not allies of the people. You cannot claim to be fighting fascism while your campaign is funded by the very oligarchs fueling that fascism. Over 90% of Americans support banning corporate PAC money in politics. The people are clear. The politicians are complicit. Democratic leaders who claim moral high ground while still pocketing checks from billionaires must understand: these protests are also against you. This is not a "both sides" statement. It is an affirmation of the fact that you cannot claim to be the opposition party to fascism, when you accept funding by the same billionaire oligarchs funding fascism. Does that make sense? Let me illustrate to show how real this problem actually is. | | ---|---|--- Hands Off Protest: CHICAGO I Know This Fight Personally In my own campaign for Congress, I ran a 100% people-powered campaign, refusing all corporate PAC money. My opponent, Rep. Bill Foster, a corporate Democrat in Illinois' 11th District, ran a campaign funded by the very same corporations bankrolling MAGA Republicans. And his votes reflected it: He voted with Trump to deregulate banks--enabling the SVB collapse. He voted with Republicans to expand offshore drilling, gut climate protections, and promote fracking--giving MAGAs cover to advance climate destruction. He co-sponsored a Republican bill to weaken the Americans with Disabilities Act--giving MAGAs cover to justify stripping civil rights from the largest minority in America (disabilities impact 1 in 6 Americans). He voted with Republicans three separate times to weaken the Affordable Care Act--including gutting protections for people with pre-existing conditions. And he did all this after accepting money from big banks before voting to gut bank regulation, money from Exxon before voting to destroy our climate, money from business lobbies (including Bezos) before voting to gut ADA protections, and money from big health before voting to gut the ACA. If I didn't tell you Bill Foster is a Democrat, you'd absolutely believe he's a MAGA fascist. And that's the point. Democrats will not defeat fascism when their own electeds are voting like fascists. If you find value in these critical updates that corporate media ignores, join our movement for justice and subscribe. | | ---|---|--- Hands Off Protest: HOUSTON A Path Forward--Only If We're Honest The April 5 protests are a positive step. They mark a critical inflection point. Hundreds of thousands of Americans took to the streets to demand that billionaires stop buying our elections. But if we are serious about saving democracy, we must have the courage to look inward as well. That means: Rejecting all billionaire money, no matter the party affiliation. Ending corporate PAC funding, full stop. Running people-powered campaigns built on justice, not wealth. Electing leaders with the courage to fight, not just perform. Because we will not stop MAGA with a Democratic Party that continues to be complicit. We must be honest about that. And we must demand better. | | ---|---|--- Hands Off Protest: WASHINGTON D.C. [Credit: WTOP Jimmy Alexander] Let's Build This Together True reform will come when we dismantle the billionaire grip on politics from both sides of the aisle. This fight will be long and difficult, but we are not helpless. The April 5 protests are a powerful step forward. It shows what we are capable of if we rise up for justice in a united front. Now, we must build on that momentum. Here's what you can do: ✅ and demand they refuse all billionaire and corporate PAC money. Tell them you will not vote for them if they choose billionaires over democracy. ✅ Support people-powered candidates in your community who run on justice, not wealth. When they ask you for support, ask if they are 100% people funded. If they're not, they don't deserve your support because they are telling you they won't listen to you anyway. ✅ Share this message with your networks--and don't let corporate media bury the truth. Especially if you attended a rally (even if you didn't) make sure everyone you know has these next steps in mind. Let me be explicitly clear--I am not suggesting you don't vote. On the contrary, I am proudly and loudly calling on you to vote in every single election without exception, but do not give away your vote to politicians funded by the very billionaires and billion dollar corporations destroying our democracy. Vote for the people funded candidates working hard to protect our democracy. That's how we save our republic. Finally, subscribe to independent voices like mine who speak truth to power and refuse to be bought. As billionaires continue to buy out major media, voices like this platform can continue to speak truth to power--but only with your support. My platform, Let 's Address This, is proudly people-funded. I don't take corporate money. I write daily on human rights issues that corporate media refuses to cover. You can works for you. But more than anything, I'm grateful for your trust, compassion, and commitment to justice. Let's keep building this movement, together. Let's Address This is made possibly by you --the thoughtful person reading this. Add your email below and subscribe to our movement for justice. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

We need to mobilize our Conservative movement right here and right now. That 's why we're reaching out to our best grassroots leaders. That includes you, Peter. Frankly, we urgently need your help to change course and set us on a path to victory. We're not asking you to cut a huge check. All we're asking is for you - and every one of our grassroots leaders - to "pitch in +/- 25 bucks" this week. That will REALLY help refill our warchest and catch up to the Democrat Machine. If that's too much, we completely understand. Would you be willing to "send in 10 or 20 bucks" instead? If that 's also too much, it's okay. We NEVER want you to donate more than you can afford. We know how much you've already done to elect President Trump and Republicans to Congress. But if you can spare any amount, it'll go a long way to help us defeat the Democrat Machine once and for all. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Help immigrant youth renew their DACA status >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Dreamers were brought to the U.S. as children, and they have lived and worked in our communities for an average of 24 years. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW0mjS_hE0PCTVOITQWCGuMJPV1MgB1g7QDAJaMpmYfSvjAorO2uLK4OkUqYj7mTgwW-M14uo1KAN5x-cMhelR34ZDwTx-RtIS0Bm26nrKNkAVGzRBHkgMeiYuYh8AiY1TuoBt0ui42cmW6dyWzQSXDpXKJDQBEhh6cSPwqkP9ccR11lk6aqrmAkR1c44dTgCg/4ff/5WSc3cy0Qj6AxJMQtLFa1w/h0/h001.QBchcTNxZsMJBXqtTS6yx9phB1oiJkqMUDHiVcWEs2U)
---
Friend, Last month, a federal court opened up first-time DACA applications across the country for the first time in years. DACA recipients, known as Dreamers, were brought to the U.S. as children. For many, this country is the only home they’ve ever known. The DACA program (Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals) protects these undocumented youth from deportation and allows them to get government IDs so they can drive, go to school, and hold jobs. The new court ruling—which also affirmed current DACA recipients’ ability to renew their protections—is a hard-fought victory. However, these applications must now get processed through Trump’s U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services department, which has not yet confirmed if it will follow the court’s ruling. **We can’t trust Trump’s administration to follow the law, and they could move to end DACA at any time. So** **the immigrant youth-led group United We Dream is urging people who are currently protected to renew their DACA status as soon as possible—while they still can.** The cost for renewals went up by $60 this year, from $495 to $555, creating an even bigger financial barrier for many immigrants. With fees increasing, our support is more important than ever. [**Will you rush a contribution to United We Dream’s DACA Renewal Fund to help cover the $555 fee for DACA recipients who can’t afford to renew their critical protections?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquWKGDGBxlkFqEx_8pz9U7p49CmS7XYKP-pnPf-3o5QEDikYyJ1_6RGXJl91hEZYmrefpoacuk1faiSFV-iMd7YO0_3QVnsBtkH2qffknyUK-nNwIuj3w1LuPvJ34SL2iaPaZ_Dn4QhLKGWMMGjlgmjQ05XOlmgXTKyikMpAVY6JDny0SAUaDdwHoO6QdlyG7HvN1KOpd-1UgNIDxjxfS-NOQkrN4aQrGojY8mESvgj_He7Y9b8cAwTwoFuRD1FKKViPFEsESrDAlvKyo8n40gTAbvlhJxIY-SMcElWdreFFBSjQolEdC7fGdR6ECC7eZ1gzvuu9-fu97PUzzf495BZTfe5hMb-bR_rIGfRQUXCMlPswzjEXhA4ljRg_DmMhpE/4ff/5WSc3cy0Qj6AxJMQtLFa1w/h1/h001.pfd3-8jkvtq2N-pAQu66zTyeHTtNgPVWnMdZs5-xGf4) | [RUSH A DONATION FOR DACA RENEWAL](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquWKGDGBxlkFqEx_8pz9U7p49CmS7XYKP-pnPf-3o5QEDikYyJ1_6RGXJl91hEZYmrbD5yzoXhvwhE1v8nB2XLy8QBRmNa6jU1oivjWZvNNdI9C65yPLm3V2xFmWyuCzTVh9jLXT46MUWOX6_23_sBEVgGSEUDdiGVcrUA23RjP_6L1IXVOKjt7f4MHFZ_9RGP0e0BkJ1jZvFvYedCZABzPl0X3qpbSFNTgJcPSSVnVl5bsXQEEe9YwCsnEJxeR7tpwCeXNX3atch1ARuefiXl3pbjwBRdF76M27iwTivmTWWyMjG8hQeS07XDtr6Ot7sPwZDVeEfTcpck5Szh04sxA4GsrBqzcKlzx3OOiOgaq5yObVkaQDu8RFFi40SfO7jE/4ff/5WSc3cy0Qj6AxJMQtLFa1w/h2/h001.8OUaUH-eRfnniYE4TDD9r9iVkpEl6jYzMDChS6kHn_U)
---
United We Dream successfully pushed the Obama administration to enact DACA. The group has continued to push for expanded protections and fight back against deportation raids and racist laws, winning sanctuary resolutions and state policies that limit cooperation with ICE.
For years, the DACA program’s status was in limbo due to court decisions. Hundreds of thousands of current DACA recipients’ lives were in upheaval, and over 90,000 first-time applications have been waiting to be processed.
The latest court decision affirms that DACA recipients in all 50 states have protection from deportation, but the ruling could put work authorization at risk for DACA recipients in Texas, leaving that up to a Texas judge.
I’m a proud cosponsor of the newly reintroduced _American Dream and Promise Act_ , which would give DACA recipients (also known as Dreamers), a pathway to citizenship. This could protect more than 5 million of our neighbors who have built their lives here, and keep millions of families together.
I will never stop fighting for permanent protections for immigrants, who make our communities stronger. In Congress,**** I will keep demanding human dignity and safety for all human beings, and pushing for everyone’s rights. We need to use our collective voices to speak up for our rights, our shared humanity, and dignity for all people. Dehumanization harms us all.
Right now, you as an individual can fight back against Trump’s mass deportations and protect some families from being torn apart—by chipping in to help DACA recipients renew their protections to stay in the country and stay with their families.
[**Please rush a donation to United We Dream’s DACA Renewal Fund today. 100% of your contribution will go to covering the cost of renewal fees—$555 per person—so immigrants brought to the U.S. as children can stay here with their families and in their communities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquWKGDGBxlkFqEx_8pz9U7p49CmS7XYKP-pnPf-3o5QEDikYyJ1_6RGXJl91hEZYmp4OUdsjiWZag6WIZFzpy5Rnjj9qG9I6nChVWTO-F1A51kHMEp1gx6wImcA0mPXWTegui4owNgfCYjJs-orNktmGLrpIOMKolAYcYG5OUg3yn2Fznc4-NBaTpsiRlPeDw8fhtlJ1zN_SZm_DhpK9VSjOEw_wv79bClT4ZPZxc5NafeZXe38ZnziF2xGugplOKqfKlChUn0NxWwlsfbJqBxHyV18yoc0ykrukI8ka4ywAjhUltgie17GPipBv7U2aKjCCXpaTVNvkNwKfafRthjjjsqNeXrXR7hDl1qpiUO37oDejnnysh5NKH-DFgoJhPg/4ff/5WSc3cy0Qj6AxJMQtLFa1w/h3/h001.XffdMLep233g9aMSEB_t2QrWwN9UIwKYAFrhCf7KLEY)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to DACA Application Fund_

clean_body: Dreamers were brought to the U.S. as children, and they have lived and worked in our communities for an average of 24 years. | | | Friend, Last month, a federal court opened up first-time DACA applications across the country for the first time in years. DACA recipients, known as Dreamers, were brought to the U.S. as children. For many, this country is the only home they’ve ever known. The DACA program (Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals) protects these undocumented youth from deportation and allows them to get government IDs so they can drive, go to school, and hold jobs. The new court ruling—which also affirmed current DACA recipients’ ability to renew their protections—is a hard-fought victory. However, these applications must now get processed through Trump’s U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services department, which has not yet confirmed if it will follow the court’s ruling. We can’t trust Trump’s administration to follow the law, and they could move to end DACA at any time. So the immigrant youth-led group United We Dream is urging people who are currently protected to renew their DACA status as soon as possible—while they still can. The cost for renewals went up by $60 this year, from $495 to $555, creating an even bigger financial barrier for many immigrants. With fees increasing, our support is more important than ever. | United We Dream successfully pushed the Obama administration to enact DACA. The group has continued to push for expanded protections and fight back against deportation raids and racist laws, winning sanctuary resolutions and state policies that limit cooperation with ICE. For years, the DACA program’s status was in limbo due to court decisions. Hundreds of thousands of current DACA recipients’ lives were in upheaval, and over 90,000 first-time applications have been waiting to be processed. The latest court decision affirms that DACA recipients in all 50 states have protection from deportation, but the ruling could put work authorization at risk for DACA recipients in Texas, leaving that up to a Texas judge. I’m a proud cosponsor of the newly reintroduced American Dream and Promise Act , which would give DACA recipients (also known as Dreamers), a pathway to citizenship. This could protect more than 5 million of our neighbors who have built their lives here, and keep millions of families together. I will never stop fighting for permanent protections for immigrants, who make our communities stronger. In Congress,** I will keep demanding human dignity and safety for all human beings, and pushing for everyone’s rights. We need to use our collective voices to speak up for our rights, our shared humanity, and dignity for all people. Dehumanization harms us all. Right now, you as an individual can fight back against Trump’s mass deportations and protect some families from being torn apart—by chipping in to help DACA recipients renew their protections to stay in the country and stay with their families. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to DACA Application Fund | | | | | | | | | Thank you. I will keep fighting for and alongside you. -Rashida P.S. If you’re eligible for DACA and considering applying for the first time, United We Dream recommends speaking to a trusted attorney or community organization before submitting your application. * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Hi folks, it’s Deb Haaland. The campaign to become the next governor of my beautiful home state of New Mexico means so much to me — and I’m so proud to have Lisa Blunt Rochester on our team. Right now, we’re building a fierce, people-powered, community-centered movement to change the game for New Mexico. But, we’re also facing a big challenge: **April 7 marks our _first_ public reporting deadline. And it’s a really important one. ** You see, we’re facing a competitive and expensive race, with MAGA forces trying to flip control of this state and our state government. **If our first fundraising report is weak, it’ll invite far-right smear campaigns, outside spending, and potential right-wing opponents. And with Donald Trump in the White House, we need a fighter who’s fierce enough to stand up for New Mexicans.** That’s why my team and I set a **_very_ ambitious goal of raising $150,000 online by April 7** to show that momentum and grassroots support are on _our_ side — and it’s why I’m humbly asking: [**Can you split a donation of $5 or any amount between my campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester? Your support today will help us post the fiercest fundraising report possible. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105314744/537945302/286726818?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.06_Haaland_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTA4ZGE2NS1mYzEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IsG78VzFQHP2NN9PDC-FtkH7iBYYquP-0UdWr_GHchU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ****[CHIP IN $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105314745/537945303/286726818?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.06_Haaland_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTA4ZGE2NS1mYzEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IsG78VzFQHP2NN9PDC-FtkH7iBYYquP-0UdWr_GHchU=)****

name: SIGN THE THANK YOU CARD (via VPP)
subject: your signature is the only one we're missing…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we’ve reopened our letter for one more hour!
| | **_TIME-SENSITIVE FOLLOW UP FOR: YOU_** Hi there, you were personally chosen as a top Democrat to represent your state in our letter to Rep. Hakeem Jeffries!

Unfortunately, our records indicate you’re the only supporter left who hasn’t responded – we’re hoping this is a mistake!

**We’ve reopened the letter for ONE MORE HOUR to ensure you have a chance to sign.** [**Add your name ASAP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88756?t=6&akid=19467%2E878179%2ErUYydZ) | [**LAST CHANCE TO SIGN THE LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88756?t=7&akid=19467%2E878179%2ErUYydZ)
---
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
**_Hakeem Jeffries Launches Day of Action:_
“Push Back Against the Diabolical Republican Scheme to Enact the _Largest_ Medicaid Cut in History!”**
Leader Jeffries is calling EVERY Democrat to action — but we’re still missing critical support in your state.

**So we’re giving you an exclusive chance to join the fight:** [**Sign our letter thanking Hakeem Jeffries for his hard work and answer his urgent call to action NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88756?t=8&akid=19467%2E878179%2ErUYydZ)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88756?t=9&akid=19467%2E878179%2ErUYydZ)
[**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88756?t=10&akid=19467%2E878179%2ErUYydZ)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

House Republicans have been nothing more than puppets for Donald Trump: GUTTING Medicaid, THREATENING Social Security, and making Trump a KING!!

I’m so grateful to have you leading the charge to defend our democracy, and for never backing down in the face of MAGA attacks.

**So today, I’m answering your call to action to make sure we flip the House in the midterms and STOP Trump in his tracks!**

[**I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to join your critical fight and to help Democrats flip the 3 seats we need to take back control! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88756?t=11&akid=19467%2E878179%2ErUYydZ) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88756?t=12&akid=19467%2E878179%2ErUYydZ) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88756?t=13&akid=19467%2E878179%2ErUYydZ)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
Thanks so much for signing!

\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19467%2E878179%2ErUYydZ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19467%2E878179%2ErUYydZ).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19467%2E878179%2ErUYydZ) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=19467%2E878179%2ErUYydZ). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19467%2E878179%2ErUYydZ)

name: Alert
subject: Your inbox has received private intelligence from Donald Trump Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Hagerty
body:
Click to access

| |
---

body:
| | | **BREAKING:** **Republicans and Elon Musk to team up to _DEFUND_ NPR! **
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21378?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250406-BreakingNews-DOGEDefundNPR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250406-BreakingNews-DOGEDefundNPR-Pros-sl1&akid=19953%2E9716520%2EBOs-g2)
**[We've launched an EMERGENCY petition to fight back, but it closes at midnight! Sign on NOW to support NPR>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21378?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250406-BreakingNews-DOGEDefundNPR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250406-BreakingNews-DOGEDefundNPR-Pros-sl1&akid=19953%2E9716520%2EBOs-g2)**

---

Team, Republicans and Elon Musk are _already_ retaliating against institutions that won't fall in line behind Trump **\-- and now they're planning to _DEFUND_ NPR!**

It's clear: Trump and his administration will go after ANY media institution that dares to provide accurate, non-biased reporting to the American people.

**We can't stay silent while Musk tears down long-trusted sources of critical information and reporting, so we've launched an URGENT Live Petition to prove where Americans stand.** But right now, your signature isn't on our list!

**Please add your name right away:****[Sign on to back NPR against Musk's revenge attacks>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21378?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250406-BreakingNews-DOGEDefundNPR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250406-BreakingNews-DOGEDefundNPR-Pros-sl1&akid=19953%2E9716520%2EBOs-g2)**

Team DSCC

body:
|

Peter, In a shocking display of disregard for hardworking Americans, Senator Jim Banks recently told a fired federal worker that he "probably deserved it" when confronted about losing his job. Banks comments are an insult to all federal employees who have recently lost their jobs. These comments are a direct insult to public employees who dedicate their lives to serving our country. **Many of these fired employees are veterans.** This employee worked on critical programs for people with disabilities and older adults through the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services. These are programs that help millions of vulnerable Americans. **Yet, Senator Banks dismissed him as a “clown.” His behavior is an embarassment to the state of Indiana.** **[It’s not just offensive—it’s dangerous. Sign your name today to our petition opposing these callous actions.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105315680/537947442/-75661559?refcode=250406banks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzMwMWMzMi1mZjEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkKxBJ-TKk93Gq6iz7CBYWuaVZ8R8Xij8BAEQDVgfCw=&emci=06383ef5-8412-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b3301c32-ff12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4925535)** Banks' comments are part of a broader agenda to dismantle essential government services and cut jobs without regard for the real-world consequences. **American workers are not “clowns”.** Senator Banks is showing us exactly what kind of leadership we can expect from him: behavior that devalues hard work and the people who do it. Don't stand by while our fellow Americans are treated with disrespect, especially by someone in a position of power. Senator Banks must be held accountable for his dangerous and divisive rhetoric. Join us in sending a message that we will not tolerate such behavior from our elected officials. _**Here’s how you can help:**_
* [**Donate today to fund our rebuilding efforts across Indiana for the 2026 elections.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105315681/537947443/1764064610?refcode=250406banks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzMwMWMzMi1mZjEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkKxBJ-TKk93Gq6iz7CBYWuaVZ8R8Xij8BAEQDVgfCw=)
* **Contact Banks' office about these comments and the dangerous direction he's taking our country. 202-224-4814**
* **Attend one of our upcoming People’s Town Hall events, starting on April 12 in[Bloomington](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105315682/537947444/1104229391?refcode=250406banks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzMwMWMzMi1mZjEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkKxBJ-TKk93Gq6iz7CBYWuaVZ8R8Xij8BAEQDVgfCw=&emci=06383ef5-8412-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b3301c32-ff12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4925535) and [New Albany](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105315685/537947445/721892363?refcode=250406banks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzMwMWMzMi1mZjEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkKxBJ-TKk93Gq6iz7CBYWuaVZ8R8Xij8BAEQDVgfCw=&emci=06383ef5-8412-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b3301c32-ff12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4925535).**

The merciless purge of the entire federal staff overseeing the Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP) threatens to cast millions of individuals with disabilities into a dire and dangerous predicament.
This indispensable program, crafted to aid low-income families and vulnerable adults in securing essential heating and cooling, now precariously teeters on the edge of collapse.
As the merciless summer heat looms on the horizon, the absence of dedicated program staff imperils the very survival of over 6 million families who rely on LIHEAP to endure extreme temperatures.
**At Able Dems, we are unwavering in our mission to elect Democrats with disabilities and their allies who will fervently champion the rights and needs of our community.** _

clean_body: | | | ** The merciless purge of the entire federal staff overseeing the Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP) threatens to cast millions of individuals with disabilities into a dire and dangerous predicament. This indispensable program, crafted to aid low-income families and vulnerable adults in securing essential heating and cooling, now precariously teeters on the edge of collapse. As the merciless summer heat looms on the horizon, the absence of dedicated program staff imperils the very survival of over 6 million families who rely on LIHEAP to endure extreme temperatures. At Able Dems, we are unwavering in our mission to elect Democrats with disabilities and their allies who will fervently champion the rights and needs of our community. **We desperately need leaders who will battle relentlessly to restore and fortify vital programs like LIHEAP. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Under the heartless policies of the Trump administration, this crucial lifeline has been cruelly severed, leaving countless families to suffer in silence, stripped of their basic human needs. Inaction could unleash devastating consequences, including the grim specter of death, for those quietly enduring their struggles. We must act decisively to avert this looming catastrophe. Join us in our relentless fight to elect leaders who prioritize the needs of the most vulnerable among us and work tirelessly toward a more equitable future for all. ** you for your support. — Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. name: Mark Jacob, COURIER Newsroom
subject: The New York Times is on the wrong side of history
body:
A newsroom built on “Neutrality Island” doesn’t serve democracy.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105316436/537950086/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGRlODhkMmItMDAxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aIkbCIPAuamgkNYW8om6oNZF_sgnT-U851yWzPvY8_0=&emci=f9b007da-6511-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=dde88d2b-0013-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14016711)

Peter,
Mark Jacob here — contributor at COURIER.
At COURIER, we believe good journalism is essential to a functioning democracy. And no media institution has more influence on that mission than _The New York Times._
**While the _Times_ has improved since Trump’s inauguration, too often its coverage still “sane-washes” Trump — portraying him as just another political figure instead of warning the public about the threat of a MAGA dictatorship.**
I wrote about this problem in a new piece you can read below. But before you do, I hope you’ll consider making a donation to COURIER.
Your support helps us call out legacy media when they fall short — and push them to treat this political moment with the urgency it demands.

Over the weekend, the _New York Times_ published a pompous editorial headlined, “The Democrats Are in Denial About 2024.” The editorial wasn’t wrong – much of the party’s leadership is indeed in denial – but the obvious, ignored fact is that the _Times_ is in denial too.
**[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105316443/537950099/-1581427288?refcode=20250406_MarkJacobs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGRlODhkMmItMDAxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aIkbCIPAuamgkNYW8om6oNZF_sgnT-U851yWzPvY8_0=)**
During the 2024 campaign, the _Times_ sane-washed Trump’s mental unfitness, downplayed MAGA fascism, and sometimes treated a political turning point for our country as a source of lighthearted amusement.
Vice presidential candidate JD Vance’s insult of “childless cat ladies” and his lie about immigrants eating house pets got peppy branding by the _Times_ as “combative conservatism.” When Trump bizarrely swayed to music for 39 minutes at a campaign rally, the _Times_ called it an “improvisational departure.” On MSNBC, a top _Times_ editor noted how “entertaining” Trump was.
A headline in September, “Harris Heads to the Border, Trying to Project Toughness Against Trump,” was an ugly example of the _Times_ ’ failings. According to them, Kamala Harris wasn’t projecting toughness, she was just trying to. And the _Times_ felt the need to stick Trump in the headline because he’s the star of their show – the “entertainment.”
There are many more counts in my indictment, but we’re short on time. My point is that the _Times_ covered the 2024 campaign with dangerous unseriousness, normalizing a political movement that is trying to plunge our country into a dictatorship.
_The Times_ has built its newsroom on Neutrality Island, clinging to its concept of objectivity so fiercely that its news coverage takes no clear position on democracy vs. fascism. A comparable scenario would be if the _Times_ ’ crime coverage decided to be objective on whether it was good or bad when people got mugged on the subway.
**[Support independent media](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105316450/537950105/-1581427288?refcode=20250406_MarkJacobs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGRlODhkMmItMDAxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aIkbCIPAuamgkNYW8om6oNZF_sgnT-U851yWzPvY8_0=)**
This weird distance from the consequences of news events was demonstrated by Publisher A.G. Sulzberger last year when he declared that journalists could be led astray if they worried about being ”on the right side of history.”
Sulzberger’s argument was especially odd considering that the _Times_ ’ coverage of the rise of MAGA has been written as if it were chronicling history rather than serving as a warning that could make a difference in present times.
It’s understandable, of course, that the _Times_ would dismiss the goal of being on the right side of history, considering how often it’s been on the wrong side over the years.
Such as in 1903 when they wrote that the invention of an operative flying machine would take the “continuous efforts of mathematicians and mechanicians” over “1 million to 10 million years.” The Wright brothers made their famous flight 69 days later.
Or in 1922, when the _Times_ assured its readers that Adolf Hitler’s “anti-Semitism was not so violent or genuine as it sounded.” Or in the 1930s when _Times_ foreign correspondent Walter Duranty spread Soviet dictator Joseph Stalin’s propaganda, including downplaying a Soviet-induced famine that killed millions of Ukrainians.
All news outlets make mistakes, and some of the _Times_ ’ visits to the wrong side of history have been relatively benign.
Caitlin Clark and Stephen Curry might be amused to know that the _Times_ panned the first known use of a three-point shot in basketball, writing in 1945 that the innovative rule “will be permitted to die a natural death.” The _Times_ thought most of the Beatles’ “Abbey Road” album was “an unmitigated disaster.” In 2016, a _Times_ critic reviewing Amazon’s “Goliath” criticized the “needlessly complicated structure of the initial episodes,” then later admitted he had mistakenly watched the first two episodes out of order.
But back to the serious stuff. Two of the _New York Times_ ’ major mistakes in modern times have had enormous implications.
One was shoddy reporting in 2003 that supported the Bush administration’s false claims about weapons of mass destruction in Iraq. The U.S. invasion led to hundreds of thousands of deaths, and the _Times_ later wrote a mea culpa.
The other egregious episode came in 2016, when the _Times_ went way overboard in focusing on Hillary Clinton’s private email server. In the closing days of the campaign, the _Times_ ran 10 front-page stories in six days about Clinton’s emails – an issue that pales in comparison to Trump security lapses since then.
Did the _Times_ give us Trump in 2016? Quite possibly.
Did the _Times_ give us Trump again in 2024? I won’t go that far, but it certainly didn’t do enough to warn the public about the danger of a dictatorship.
**[Contribute now to support more journalism like this](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105316458/537950114/-1581427288?refcode=20250406_MarkJacobs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGRlODhkMmItMDAxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aIkbCIPAuamgkNYW8om6oNZF_sgnT-U851yWzPvY8_0=)**
_The Times_ has been somewhat better since Trump’s inauguration, closing the barn door after it helped let out the horse. It has recently published strong articles about Team Trump’s lawlessness and lies, saying explicitly that the Republicans show “a disregard for the rules” and “are using false claims to justify their policy changes.” Reporter David Fahrenthold and his colleagues have aggressively debunked bogus information from Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency.
That said, many of the old bad habits remain. Threats to invade other countries are described euphemistically as desires "to expand America’s footprint.” Trump Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt, a professional liar, is called “steely and unflinching.” Trump’s address to Congress is credited with “game show flair.”
When I go off about the _Times_ , people argue that it doesn’t matter – that the voters who gave us Trump don’t read it. But the _Times_ influences how other media handle stories and what they consider important. For that reason, people who never read the _Times_ are influenced by it.
With the Washington Post’s owner destroying his newspaper’s credibility in fealty to Trump, the _Times_ has become even more important, which means its failures are more damaging.
_The Times_ may not care about being on the right side of history, but if it doesn’t get on that side soon, it may become a relic of history itself.

Friend,

Donald Trump’s latest executive order is an unprecedented attempt to seize control of how elections are run in this country — and Democrats just filed a lawsuit to stop it.

Here’s why: Trump’s order is a direct violation of the Constitution. Election administration is a power that belongs to Congress and the states — _not_ the White House.

This is a dangerous escalation. Trump and his MAGA allies want to strip states of their authority, undermine trust in our elections, and concentrate power where they can manipulate the outcome.

We cannot allow this assault on our democracy to go unchecked.

At DASS, we’re standing shoulder to shoulder with the leaders fighting back. But legal challenges, organizing, and protecting our elections in every state takes serious resources — and we need your help.

clean_body: | = = ➤➤ NEW: Democrats sue to stop Trump’s unconstitutional election order Friend, Donald Trump’s latest executive order is an unprecedented attempt to seize control of how elections are run in this country — and Democrats just filed a lawsuit to stop it. Here’s why: Trump’s order is a direct violation of the Constitution. Election administration is a power that belongs to Congress and the states — not the White House. This is a dangerous escalation. Trump and his MAGA allies want to strip states of their authority, undermine trust in our elections, and concentrate power where they can manipulate the outcome. We cannot allow this assault on our democracy to go unchecked. At DASS, we’re standing shoulder to shoulder with the leaders fighting back. name: The Squad
subject: We need you.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250406-1304-foote&t=1001&akid=1304%2E342411%2EABTxcI ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and AOC are leading the fight against Trump — both
in Congress and at rallies across the country, but this moment calls for
all of us to step up.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250406-movement.QPK_pD&refcode=em20250406-1304&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1304%2E342411%2EABTxcI ]Even $3 will make a difference in this
fight, Peter –
will you chip in?

In case you missed it, AOC and Bernie have been touring the country,
breaking their personal turnout records. In Tuscon Arizona, they made
history with the largest political rally in the state’s history with
23,620 people showing up – they expected 3000.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250406-movement.QPK_pD&refcode=em20250406-1304&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1304%2E342411%2EABTxcI ][IMG]

These rallies are an opportunity to bring people into our vision for
America. We are uniting people around values like peace, justice, and
equality. We are organizing hundreds of thousands of newly engaged
Americans against the fascist oligarchy.

Our Squad is leading the fight:

✅ For working people — championing fair wages, workers’ rights, and
policies that put working families and marginalized communities first.
✅ To protect public services — fighting back against attacks on Social
Security, Medicaid, and education.
✅ For human rights — standing up to ICE and DHS’s unconstitutional
targeting of immigrants, Palestinians, and people of color.

Being bold, progressive leaders against the Trump oligarchy means that
far-right Republicans, MAGA loyalists, and corrupt billionaires will raise
more money than ever to come after our Squad.

If everyone reading this gave just a little, we could fight back and win.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250406-movement.QPK_pD&refcode=em20250406-1304&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1304%2E342411%2EABTxcI ]Can you chip in with $3 to stand up to MAGA and keep our
Squad fighting?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250406-movement.QPK_pD&refcode=em20250406-1304&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1304%2E342411%2EABTxcI ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1304%2E342411%2EABTxcI

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Peter, Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and AOC are leading the fight against Trump — both in Congress and at rallies across the country, but this moment calls for all of us to step up. [ ]Even $3 will make a difference in this fight, Peter – will you chip in? In case you missed it, AOC and Bernie have been touring the country, breaking their personal turnout records. In Tuscon Arizona, they made history with the largest political rally in the state’s history with 23,620 people showing up – they expected 3000. [ ][IMG] These rallies are an opportunity to bring people into our vision for America. We are uniting people around values like peace, justice, and equality. We are organizing hundreds of thousands of newly engaged Americans against the fascist oligarchy. Our Squad is leading the fight: ✅ For working people — championing fair wages, workers’ rights, and policies that put working families and marginalized communities first. ✅ To protect public services — fighting back against attacks on Social Security, Medicaid, and education. ✅ For human rights — standing up to ICE and DHS’s unconstitutional targeting of immigrants, Palestinians, and people of color. Being bold, progressive leaders against the Trump oligarchy means that far-right Republicans, MAGA loyalists, and corrupt billionaires will raise more money than ever to come after our Squad. If everyone reading this gave just a little, we could fight back and win. [ ]Can you chip in with $3 to stand up to MAGA and keep our Squad fighting? [ ]Contribute ›› In solidarity, The Squad

clean_body: Peter, I trained my entire life to compete at the highest level. I put in the early mornings, the brutal practices, the sacrifices -- just like every other female athlete. But none of that mattered the moment ****************************************************************************************************** Senator Ossoff has a daughter. I hope he's ready to explain this vote to her. I hope he's ready to look her in the eyes and tell her that no matter how hard she trains, no matter the sacrifices she makes, or how many dreams she chases, -- This is the reality that Ossoff and Senate Democrats have created for women, and it's up to us to fight back. **************************************************************************************************** We can't let these radical Left-wing politicians dictate the future of women's sports. Not now, not ever. Thank you, Riley Gaines ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Zee
subject: what happened on Tuesday
body:
| |
---
We are proud to have played such a crucial role in all of these important elections: this team registered thousands of voters, sent hand-written postcard notes directly to voters, made thousands of phone calls, and countered Elon Musk's millions with our own hard-hitting ads. | [View in browser](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUwOTQ4MDA4MjY3MDg5MDQ4LFwiclwiOjE1MDk0ODA3OTUwMTA1MTQwN30iLCJzIjoiMTY1MThmMzRlYTNjY2NjNSJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUwOTQ4MDA4Mjc2NTI2MjQ1LFwiclwiOjE1MDk0ODA3OTUwMTA1MTQwN30iLCJzIjoiNGE0ZDM2MTg0NGIyYmQ0NSJ9)
---
| Team,

It is ok to feel hope, even in times of darkness and worry.

For 72 long days, we have had nothing to back up our hope for a brighter future — we put our heads down and got to work armed only with a sense of solidarity, knowing we were all in this together and could lean on and stand with one another in the fight.

After Tuesday's results across three special elections—two congressional races in Florida and a crucial State Supreme Court race in purple Wisconsin—we now have much more than that.

**We have proof that our message is resonating. **We have evidence that our momentum against Trump's creeping fascism is real and being felt everywhere in the nation, not just "blue" or liberal areas.

---
|
---
| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUwOTQ4MDA4Mjg0OTE0ODYwLFwiclwiOjE1MDk0ODA3OTUwMTA1MTQwN30iLCJzIjoiZjVlOGRjOWM5M2Q4N2EzMSJ9)
---
| In Florida, Democrats made huge progress closing a wide gap in two red seats that Trump carried comfortably by over 30 points—and in each race, we helped the Democratic candidates there **_shift their districts 15 points or more to the left_**.

---
|
---
| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUwOTQ4MDA4MjkzMzAzNDcwLFwiclwiOjE1MDk0ODA3OTUwMTA1MTQwN30iLCJzIjoiNmI1ZWU3NTg4MzY0MzkwMCJ9)
---
| **We are proud to have played such a crucial role in all of these important elections:** this team registered thousands of voters, sent hand-written postcard notes directly to voters, made thousands of phone calls, and countered Elon Musk's millions with our own hard-hitting ads.

**We even housed 20+ organizers in FL-06, a race that national Democrats weren’t willing to invest in or take a chance on - but we were.**

This is exactly what you can expect when we come together and use our power, our voice, and our collective strength to fight back as hard as we can—the road ahead is so much brighter.

And now every single MAGA rubber stamp in Congress is on notice: **_if you try to destroy Social Security and Medicare, defund Medicaid and harm single mothers and working people, and strip away our basic rights, you are not safe - we are coming for you.._**

---
|
---
[**Will you join us to celebrate the work we have done over the last four months and the incredible progress we have made? Now is the time to double down on the work that got us here and look ahead to _even greater victories in 2026_. We have MAGA worried, and now we need to press our advantage to keep the momentum on our side:**](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUwOTQ4MDA4Mjk5NTk0OTI5LFwiclwiOjE1MDk0ODA3OTUwMTA1MTQwN30iLCJzIjoiNGM1Mzc3YmIwZmM4NzcyZSJ9)

With President Trump's new tariffs on imports from nearly every country (and [uninhabited island ](https://substack.com/redirect/3eb87412-e249-45d4-80cd-8369fd1c77f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)on Earth), the response by global markets has been immediate and dramatic.
In just two days - from April 2 to 4, 2025 - the S&P 500 index dropped over 10%.
To put that into perspective, it was the 5th largest two-day decrease in the index since May 14, 1940.
The only recent 'events' that surpass it are the collapses of 1987 (Reagan), 2008 (Bush), and of course 2020 (Trump I).
But could the winning continue, and we experience a record-breaking three-day streak of historic losses?...

"We are going to take care of you!"

# **Latino republican SHUTS UP fear-mongering CNN hack for tariff alarmism**
GOP Rep. Carlos Gimenez **[shut down Wolf Blitzer for fear mongering](https://substack.com/redirect/94273251-b2ff-45f6-b543-793dbfc66dbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about President Donald Trump's tariff agenda during a heated live clash on CNN.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/94273251-b2ff-45f6-b543-793dbfc66dbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/94273251-b2ff-45f6-b543-793dbfc66dbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Blitzer asked Gimenez if he is concerned that people in his district, which includes Miami, Florida will be paying more for consumer goods due to Trump's tariffs.
"We need to decouple from China, and we need to do it now," the congressman said. "Every single dollar that we send to China is going to be used against us. So I think that is the price we are going to have to pay."
"I don't want my children and grandchildren living in a world dominated by the Chinese Communist Party," Gimenez explained after citing China's aim to be the world's economic leader by 2049. "Are we gonna have to pay a little more for Chinese products? I'm fine with that!"
Blitzer again emphasized that prices could go up, not marginally, but dramatically from the tariffs. "It's going to be a whole lot more!"
**["Why can they charge the heck out of an American car in Europe,](https://substack.com/redirect/94273251-b2ff-45f6-b543-793dbfc66dbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** but we can't do the same?!!" Gimenez fired back. "The whole thing is to try to balance things out, so that instead of buying European cars you buy American cars."
Watch the tense interview here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/94273251-b2ff-45f6-b543-793dbfc66dbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

In 2023, Biden's FDA _**rejected**_ Elon Musk's application to start human trials on his life-changing Neurolink project...

But now in 2025, the tables have turned. He and his DOGE team are now targeting waste and fraud inside the FDA and the top brass is TERRIFIED.

He'll likely gain access to everything he needs to reveal the **[FDA's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/39b1747b-80b8-42e9-bfe6-903b1f40fb04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.

It involves a hushed-up alliance with Big Pharma, as well as hundreds-of-billions in profits. And DOGE is on the verge of bringing the entire house of cards crashing to the ground.

But liberals and Big Pharma won't let **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/39b1747b-80b8-42e9-bfe6-903b1f40fb04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **be revealed without a fight, which is exactly why we're not waiting around...

We're exposing everything TODAY in **[this damning video](https://substack.com/redirect/39b1747b-80b8-42e9-bfe6-903b1f40fb04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.

Larsen** co-created Up w/ **Chris Hayes** and wrote for Countdown with **Keith Olbermann** , helped launch CNN's **Anderson Cooper** 360°, and has also worked at The Daily Show with **Jon Stewart**._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b30c67c6-a918-4694-8134-37775c8b82b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
