###### Continental Resources CEO Harold Hamm, a leading fracker and Trump fundraiser explained in a March 13, 2025, interview how Trump's policies are hurting his business, only without putting it that way. (Screengrab / Bloomberg [video](https://substack.com/redirect/55d39631-4800-419d-9d16-cded696f8038?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).)
Remember how Continental Resources CEO Harold Hamm was [revealed](https://substack.com/redirect/95441768-d522-42bc-a991-969c5fbc3885?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as the Big Oil guy who organized that Mar-a-Lago fundraiser where Donald Trump asked oil and gas execs for a billion dollars?
Trump said he'd lower their taxes and regulatory costs by even more than a billion. Regulations were Hamm's [big priorities](https://substack.com/redirect/95441768-d522-42bc-a991-969c5fbc3885?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
After the dinner, Hamm worked the phones and got even more Big Oil execs to pony up for Trump. He [hosted](https://substack.com/redirect/f657efa9-cd98-41f2-84f2-7588ff2f51ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a Vance fundraiser, too. Fossil fuel lobbyists started [drafting](https://substack.com/redirect/59ff5a65-5c35-4c27-af47-7a6380275f12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) executive orders for Trump to lower drilling costs, presumably by ditching rules that protect the rest of us.
On day one of his presidency, Trump [signed](https://substack.com/redirect/a1a27e5a-8513-4484-8a72-320ea52a3bf7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) executive orders in line with Hamm's three top regulatory complaints.
Hamm also [reportedly](https://substack.com/redirect/a1a27e5a-8513-4484-8a72-320ea52a3bf7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) got Trump to put his friend and fellow fracker, Chris Wright, in charge of the Energy Department. Hamm's [buddy](https://substack.com/redirect/f657efa9-cd98-41f2-84f2-7588ff2f51ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Gov. Doug Burgum (R-ND) got Interior, which oversees drilling on federal lands. Hamm [called](https://substack.com/redirect/5207e07d-2ac7-4875-aafb-9c1931899d29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) them a "dream team" and paid for a big inaugural bash.
With Pres. Joe Biden's rules out of the way, Hamm and his fellow oil billionaires would now be free to "drill, baby, drill," just as Trump promised. Never mind that under Biden they pumped [record amounts](https://substack.com/redirect/ad949f0d-575a-487b-87f9-3948da8b4c92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and saw profits higher than under Trump.
Less than three months into the second Trump presidency, things aren't working out how Hamm planned.
**Blue Amp 's a simple idea: Insiders turned fearless outsiders **_**telling you what others won 't**_**. We 're un-bought, so we need your support.**_**Please become a paid subscriber**_****
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_._2hrB536bfu5FtJpAcNgp0PAKQCIjpZplQfrOpRDIbY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=160667024)
Since Trump's been in office, oil prices have plummeted. Especially recently, thanks to Trump's newest tariffs.
That's more than just a ding to oil profits. If oil gets too cheap, it no longer makes sense to invest in producing more.
And if the cost of drilling goes up, too, that makes the math even tougher. With that in mind, let's review the year in Hamm so far, shall we?
#### January
Weak Chinese demand starts [dragging](https://substack.com/redirect/55d39631-4800-419d-9d16-cded696f8038?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) oil down below $80 per barrel. How cheap can oil get before it's not worth new drilling anymore? That'd be $80 per barrel, [according](https://substack.com/redirect/55d39631-4800-419d-9d16-cded696f8038?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to Hamm.
#### February
On Feb. 10, Trump [announces](https://substack.com/redirect/adc200f9-2c19-47a2-953d-2618966107f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) he'll slap a tariff on imported steel, adding 25% to the cost as of March 12. (Trump's first-term steel tariffs did boost the U.S. steel industry, but [hurt](https://substack.com/redirect/cec1c0c4-8c8f-4669-8d13-acdc59aee4be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the rest of the economy.)
On Feb. 28, the New York Times [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/a4fb3613-c524-4edc-9cc6-28185cae44f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the price of steel is already rising in anticipation of Trump's tariffs. And that oil companies are already revising budgets to account for higher material costs. Ruh-roh.
#### March
On March 12, Trump's steel tariffs [go into effect](https://substack.com/redirect/adc200f9-2c19-47a2-953d-2618966107f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
On March 13, Bloomberg posts an [interview](https://substack.com/redirect/55d39631-4800-419d-9d16-cded696f8038?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with Hamm. As Hamm explains, steel tariffs don't help you drill, baby, drill if you line the walls of your wells with steel casings to keep the passages clear. Which he does.
On average, steel accounts for about 10% of the [cost](https://substack.com/redirect/a4fb3613-c524-4edc-9cc6-28185cae44f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of drilling, baby, drilling a new well.
And steel is even more expensive for frackers. How come? Their wells aren't just more complex, they also don't just drill straight down. Frackers drill both deeper and laterally further than other wells.
Here's what Hamm tells Bloomberg about the steel tariffs the day after they kicked in:
> > "One thing that we use a whole lot of is steel and we'll have to see how this washes out with steel tariffs ... that's another thing that can add a great deal of cost to what we do...
>> "When you drill in a two-mile-deep well -- two miles out to the right; four miles of tubers, casing, and tubing to complete that well -- there's a tremendous amount of cost that goes into it, so seeing how these tariffs, you know, play out in the end is going to be important."
In other words, the cost of drilling is going up at the same time the return on that investment is going down with the falling price of oil. The low gas prices that his candidate promised turn out to be directly at odds with "Drill, baby, drill." As Hamm says:
> > "When you get below the cost of supply, you know, you can't drill, baby, drill. That shuts you down."
Apparently, Hamm missed the fact that, earlier in March, Trump trade adviser Peter Navarro [said](https://substack.com/redirect/7d5db3db-05c9-4138-8619-607b69f05b01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Trump's plan for inflation is to bring oil prices down to about $50 per barrel. Well below Hamm's $80 threshold.
And as for Trump's "dream team," Hamm's buddy Wright's [plan](https://substack.com/redirect/7d5db3db-05c9-4138-8619-607b69f05b01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for oil companies to drill anyway, despite the low return on investment, is that the companies would "innovate" ways to drill cheaper. In other words the Trump administration's plan at this point is to raise the cost of drilling, lower the price of gas, and count on oil companies to survive _and_ drill more, anyway, because...they'll invent stuff. In short: Magic.
On March 19, Hamm and other oil execs get a [meeting](https://substack.com/redirect/6246e3ce-d6ac-46cc-8c38-0f717b90c89b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with Trump. The agenda: Concerns about tariffs and falling oil prices. (Apparently Hamm hasn't innovated yet.)
While the U.S. only [imports](https://substack.com/redirect/2dc8811e-4f43-4212-a3d5-6e180b10b3e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about 13% of its steel, putting tariffs on those imports means domestic steel makers can raise their prices, too. Which they [have](https://substack.com/redirect/2dc8811e-4f43-4212-a3d5-6e180b10b3e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**Blue Amp are former insiders** _**telling you what others won 't**_**. We 're un-bought, so we NEED your support.**_**Please become a paid subscriber**_****
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_._2hrB536bfu5FtJpAcNgp0PAKQCIjpZplQfrOpRDIbY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=160667024)
#### April
On Liberation Day, April 2, Trump's new tariffs exempt steel -- but don't end the 25% steel tariff from March. And throwing up a bigger protectionist wall than the U.S. has had in a century rocks the global economy in other ways affecting Hamm.
By April 4, yesterday, oil prices are down even more. That's because traders are now expecting a broad-based global downturn -- which will depress demand for gas.
And other nations [decided](https://substack.com/redirect/30aff67e-706c-4f05-8f18-a67d027f887d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _not_ to cut oil production as expected. Meaning there's more oil supply than anticipated, so prices go down even more.
Hamm yesterday [told](https://substack.com/redirect/ded1634e-f5bf-48c0-8157-4e51d162584f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the Financial Times he still supports Trump's plans. For now:
> > "But it is also true that you cannot drill, baby, drill if you are producing oil and gas below the cost of supply. Shale producers hope the current market turbulence is a temporary situation so they can deliver on the president's agenda to unleash American energy dominance."
#### Today
Because Hamm's company is privately owned, stock tickers aren't tracking his daily suffering as a result of Trump's policies.
But we can look at his peers. Wright's old company is Liberty Energy. And yesterday, CNBC's [headline](https://substack.com/redirect/4a463383-6e9f-4733-8eed-21e49eb25eee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about Liberty read, "U.S. energy secretary's former company crushed by oil sell-off after Trump tariff escalation."
Liberty was [liberated](https://substack.com/redirect/4a463383-6e9f-4733-8eed-21e49eb25eee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of almost a third of its value in just two days after Liberation Day.
The benchmark crude-oil [price](https://substack.com/redirect/4a463383-6e9f-4733-8eed-21e49eb25eee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as of Friday was almost down to $60 per barrel, the lowest it's been since no one was going anywhere during the pandemic.
According to Saul Kavonic, who heads energy research for MST Marquee, frackers "have been very big supporters and have a close relationship with Trump, [but] are not going to be happy with this."
Kavonic [told CNBC](https://substack.com/redirect/4a463383-6e9f-4733-8eed-21e49eb25eee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "If you start to see further downward pressure here... that's going to put pressure on the folks down in Texas and Louisiana and elsewhere to pull off the rigs and not drill [baby, drill] as much."
#### Oil Blindness
Hamm's been a fan of tariffs in the past. When the pandemic cratered demand, Hamm [wanted](https://substack.com/redirect/33860202-8917-4864-9125-417878c5e5f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Trump to slap tariffs on imported oil to raise the price at U.S. gas pumps.
But Hamm doesn't seem to have thought much about tariffs on the materials he needs, or the power of broad tariffs to do just what the pandemic did and crater oil demand.
Consider Continental's regulatory [filings](https://substack.com/redirect/5277814e-848d-48a5-8134-1e302bdc5542?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The company's not publicly traded, but does have to disclose some information to the federal government -- more of those regulations Hamm hates. But those regulations also require Hamm to flag risks to his business.
Which he seems to have ignored.
Hamm's February 2024 [annual report](https://substack.com/redirect/dfcb342e-6b90-436d-80f5-0c95e13d753b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), however, did have multiple warnings about the threats posed by the Biden administration. Continental complained that past and possible future Biden legislation and regulations represented potentially "significant liabilities." Complying, or failing to comply, "could have a material adverse effect" on Continental.
"President Biden, in pursuit of his regulatory agenda, has issued, and may continue to issue, executive orders that result in more stringent and costly requirements." Brrr! Scary!
The alleged threats posed by Biden didn't prevent Continental from [clocking](https://substack.com/redirect/5207e07d-2ac7-4875-aafb-9c1931899d29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) $2 billion in profits last year as the nation's 13th biggest oil producer.
By contrast, the February 2025 [annual report](https://substack.com/redirect/6790a9ac-93d8-483c-9d4a-df21717632ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) had no mention of the risks to Continental posed by Trump. Even though Trump has _campaigned_ on imposing tariffs again.
...and even though _both_ financial reports warned _multiple_ times of the risks posed by, you guessed it, tariffs and trade restrictions.
But until last month, Hamm seems to have ignored the threat of tariffs that his own company was required by Democratic regulations to flag and that his own candidate was promising.
[Accounts](https://substack.com/redirect/95441768-d522-42bc-a991-969c5fbc3885?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Hamm's priorities during the campaign last year didn't mention tariffs, even though Trump did. Hamm's 2023 book [doesn't mention tariffs](https://substack.com/redirect/9336131e-9af9-498e-877b-80d54b606a97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Continental didn't [lobby](https://substack.com/redirect/5efb8cc2-2aea-4524-8b29-e814a56c96e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Trump about tariffs during his first term. (And didn't [lobby](https://substack.com/redirect/0fdeb130-e298-483b-ae4b-40e2be1f9c3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Biden at all. Presumably because of cooties.)
And when Continental [registered](https://substack.com/redirect/4207d112-a474-499c-9f3d-35d69954662e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to start lobbying again this year, its lobbyists disclosed that they'd focus on legislation and regulations (presumably rolling back Biden's). There was nothing about tariffs or even trade. That registration was filed Feb. 13, three days after Trump announced his steel tariff.
In other words, it's quite possible that Hamm saw Democratic regulations -- which didn't prevent record drilling and profits -- as a threat simply because he doesn't like hearing "no" from people who sometimes stand up for people who don't look or act like Hamm. So he went with Trump.
It didn't matter that Hamm preferred Gov. Ron DeSantis (R-FL) or former Gov. Nikki Haley (R-SC) as the 2024 GOP candidate. It didn't matter that Trump [mocked](https://substack.com/redirect/e1bba913-f066-45ce-9a35-9ac72e9526cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Hamm for paying his ex-wife $1 billion in their divorce.
For whatever reason, Hamm appears to have been blinded to the threats posed by a documented con man, even though his company's own filings warned of the dangers posed by the very tariff policies the con man ran on.
In Hamm's case, at least, maybe the operative word in "drill, baby, drill" isn't "drill." Maybe it's the implication that Big Oil executives aren't business geniuses, they're just babies.

That'd be $80 per barrel, to Hamm. February On Feb. 10, Trump he'll slap a tariff on imported steel, adding 25% to the cost as of March 12. (Trump's first-term steel tariffs did boost the U.S. steel industry, but the rest of the economy.) On Feb. 28, the New York Times that the price of steel is already rising in anticipation of Trump's tariffs. And that oil companies are already revising budgets to account for higher material costs. Ruh-roh. March On March 12, Trump's steel tariffs . On March 13, Bloomberg posts an with Hamm. As Hamm explains, steel tariffs don't help you drill, baby, drill if you line the walls of your wells with steel casings to keep the passages clear. Which he does. On average, steel accounts for about 10% of the of drilling, baby, drilling a new well. And steel is even more expensive for frackers. How come? Their wells aren't just more complex, they also don't just drill straight down. Frackers drill both deeper and laterally further than other wells. Here's what Hamm tells Bloomberg about the steel tariffs the day after they kicked in: > "One thing that we use a whole lot of is steel and we'll have to see how this washes out with steel tariffs ... that's another thing that can add a great deal of cost to what we do... > "When you drill in a two-mile-deep well -- two miles out to the right; four miles of tubers, casing, and tubing to complete that well -- there's a tremendous amount of cost that goes into it, so seeing how these tariffs, you know, play out in the end is going to be important." In other words, the cost of drilling is going up at the same time the return on that investment is going down with the falling price of oil. The low gas prices that his candidate promised turn out to be directly at odds with "Drill, baby, drill." As Hamm says: > "When you get below the cost of supply, you know, you can't drill, baby, drill. That shuts you down." Apparently, Hamm missed the fact that, earlier in March, Trump trade adviser Peter Navarro Trump's plan for inflation is to bring oil prices down to about $50 per barrel. Well below Hamm's $80 threshold. And as for Trump's "dream team," Hamm's buddy Wright's for oil companies to drill anyway, despite the low return on investment, is that the companies would "innovate" ways to drill cheaper. In other words the Trump administration's plan at this point is to raise the cost of drilling, lower the price of gas, and count on oil companies to survive and drill more, anyway, because...they'll invent stuff. In short: Magic. On March 19, Hamm and other oil execs get a with Trump. The agenda: Concerns about tariffs and falling oil prices. (Apparently Hamm hasn't innovated yet.) While the U.S. only about 13% of its steel, putting tariffs on those imports means domestic steel makers can raise their prices, too. Which they . Blue Amp are former insiders telling you what others won 't. We 're un-bought, so we NEED your support.Please become a paid subscriber** April On Liberation Day, April 2, Trump's new tariffs exempt steel -- but don't end the 25% steel tariff from March. And throwing up a bigger protectionist wall than the U.S. has had in a century rocks the global economy in other ways affecting Hamm. By April 4, yesterday, oil prices are down even more. That's because traders are now expecting a broad-based global downturn -- which will depress demand for gas. And other nations not to cut oil production as expected. Meaning there's more oil supply than anticipated, so prices go down even more. Hamm yesterday the Financial Times he still supports Trump's plans. For now: > "But it is also true that you cannot drill, baby, drill if you are producing oil and gas below the cost of supply. Shale producers hope the current market turbulence is a temporary situation so they can deliver on the president's agenda to unleash American energy dominance." Today Because Hamm's company is privately owned, stock tickers aren't tracking his daily suffering as a result of Trump's policies. But we can look at his peers. Wright's old company is Liberty Energy. And yesterday, CNBC's about Liberty read, "U.S. energy secretary's former company crushed by oil sell-off after Trump tariff escalation." Liberty was of almost a third of its value in just two days after Liberation Day. The benchmark crude-oil as of Friday was almost down to $60 per barrel, the lowest it's been since no one was going anywhere during the pandemic. According to Saul Kavonic, who heads energy research for MST Marquee, frackers "have been very big supporters and have a close relationship with Trump, [but] are not going to be happy with this." Kavonic , "If you start to see further downward pressure here... that's going to put pressure on the folks down in Texas and Louisiana and elsewhere to pull off the rigs and not drill [baby, drill] as much." Oil Blindness Hamm's been a fan of tariffs in the past. When the pandemic cratered demand, Hamm Trump to slap tariffs on imported oil to raise the price at U.S. gas pumps. But Hamm doesn't seem to have thought much about tariffs on the materials he needs, or the power of broad tariffs to do just what the pandemic did and crater oil demand. Consider Continental's regulatory . The company's not publicly traded, but does have to disclose some information to the federal government -- more of those regulations Hamm hates. But those regulations also require Hamm to flag risks to his business. Which he seems to have ignored. Hamm's February 2024 , however, did have multiple warnings about the threats posed by the Biden administration. Continental complained that past and possible future Biden legislation and regulations represented potentially "significant liabilities." Complying, or failing to comply, "could have a material adverse effect" on Continental. "President Biden, in pursuit of his regulatory agenda, has issued, and may continue to issue, executive orders that result in more stringent and costly requirements." Brrr! Scary! The alleged threats posed by Biden didn't prevent Continental from $2 billion in profits last year as the nation's 13th biggest oil producer. By contrast, the February 2025 had no mention of the risks to Continental posed by Trump. Even though Trump has campaigned on imposing tariffs again. ...and even though both financial reports warned multiple times of the risks posed by, you guessed it, tariffs and trade restrictions. But until last month, Hamm seems to have ignored the threat of tariffs that his own company was required by Democratic regulations to flag and that his own candidate was promising. of Hamm's priorities during the campaign last year didn't mention tariffs, even though Trump did. Hamm's 2023 book . Continental didn't Trump about tariffs during his first term. (And didn't Biden at all. Presumably because of cooties.) And when Continental to start lobbying again this year, its lobbyists disclosed that they'd focus on legislation and regulations (presumably rolling back Biden's). There was nothing about tariffs or even trade. That registration was filed Feb. 13, three days after Trump announced his steel tariff. In other words, it's quite possible that Hamm saw Democratic regulations -- which didn't prevent record drilling and profits -- as a threat simply because he doesn't like hearing "no" from people who sometimes stand up for people who don't look or act like Hamm. So he went with Trump. It didn't matter that Hamm preferred Gov. Ron DeSantis (R-FL) or former Gov. Nikki Haley (R-SC) as the 2024 GOP candidate. It didn't matter that Trump Hamm for paying his ex-wife $1 billion in their divorce. For whatever reason, Hamm appears to have been blinded to the threats posed by a documented con man, even though his company's own filings warned of the dangers posed by the very tariff policies the con man ran on. In Hamm's case, at least, maybe the operative word in "drill, baby, drill" isn't "drill." Maybe it's the implication that Big Oil executives aren't business geniuses, they're just babies. Peter -

I'm sitting down to write to you today with a heart full of gratitude and a spirit that's more fired up than ever. Since announcing my run for Governor of Virginia, the outpouring of support has been nothing short of incredible.

I've received thousands of messages from folks all across the Commonwealth - It's humbling to have the prayers and support of so many patriots.

As a Marine and a proud conservative, I know that I have the experience and the conviction to lead our great Commonwealth forward. I'm committed to protecting the promise of Virginia, where every child can get a world-class education, every business can thrive, and every family can live in safety and prosperity.

But I didn't expect the rush of enthusiasm that's swept across our campaign. _**From the bottom of my heart, thank you for being part of this movement.**_ Your encouragement, your volunteer hours, and your generous financial support are the fuel that will propel us ever forward.

Now, I need to ask for your help again. We have a long and challenging road ahead, and it's going to take every ounce of our energy and resources to win. _**[_**Can you make a donation today to help us keep the momentum going? subject: A massive tax hike on the American people

body:
When countries implement tariffs, large corporations almost always pass those added costs down to you

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105320340/537963746/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDllMjAxOC0wYTEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=btOV05dLWQg0hVo8qP1UFG71w67Lqk5jyS8YUdiA_Ag=) In Congress, Sharice Davids has made it her number-one priority to bring down costs and build an economy that works for everyone — not just the billionaires at the very top. **But by implementing a series of reckless tariffs, President Trump will drive up grocery costs, force Kansas businesses to close, cut off markets for farmers, and force thousands of families to drain their savings.** When countries implement widespread tariffs, large corporations almost always pass those added costs down to you, the consumer. **That means Kansans will pay an extra, hidden sales tax every single time they go to the store.** And because these tariffs are universal, it will dramatically increase the cost of nearly _everything_ you can think of, including groceries, gasoline, housing, electronics, and so much more. We can even expect cars that previously cost $30,000 to jump up to $50,000. Make no mistake: Hardworking families will bear the brunt of this devastating tax hike. Not Donald Trump. Not his billionaire friends. Not giant corporations. **That’s unacceptable.** [_**That’s why Sharice is working on bipartisan trade policies that will strengthen our economy _without_ raising costs or putting jobs at risk. Please, will you sign your name to Sharice’s petition now to urge Congress to push back against Trump’s tax hike and pass trade policies that actually support working families?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105320341/537963747/220472671?refcode=email_040625_tariffs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDllMjAxOC0wYTEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=btOV05dLWQg0hVo8qP1UFG71w67Lqk5jyS8YUdiA_Ag=&emci=6e79432d-6711-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=949e2018-0a13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22117458) | | [Sign Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105320342/537963748/-706896996?refcode=email_040625_tariffs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDllMjAxOC0wYTEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=btOV05dLWQg0hVo8qP1UFG71w67Lqk5jyS8YUdiA_Ag=&emci=6e79432d-6711-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=949e2018-0a13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22117458)

clean_body: When countries implement tariffs, large corporations almost always pass those added costs down to you = In Congress, Sharice Davids has made it her number-one priority to bring down costs and build an economy that works for everyone — not just the billionaires at the very top. But by implementing a series of reckless tariffs, President Trump will drive up grocery costs, force Kansas businesses to close, cut off markets for farmers, and force thousands of families to drain their savings. When countries implement widespread tariffs, large corporations almost always pass those added costs down to you, the consumer. That means Kansans will pay an extra, hidden sales tax every single time they go to the store. And because these tariffs are universal, it will dramatically increase the cost of nearly everything you can think of, including groceries, gasoline, housing, electronics, and so much more. We can even expect cars that previously cost $30,000 to jump up to $50,000. Make no mistake: Hardworking families will bear the brunt of this devastating tax hike. Not Donald Trump. Not his billionaire friends. Not giant corporations. That’s unacceptable. | | Thank you for using your voice and fighting back. Team Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Turn America back to Godly values
body:
Become a founding supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cdaea4951ffc4ae6a130fe87447d6c00&_e=DjSVxxkrCLafsENI_EaA9oMrYmMqs2GujjZS5gUop0RskxziJo5MJP52I1MWsOaQZbFm2OLqQO1H00xOaoSYyFJOI6Aaj6jxx1u7f05r6r8LaN2VnvobQ8x4LfXPU_3e-QuqWqZss1SNLy7Spgc3qoRu8uL8wW4yVweO9Ez4FziOslqzPzVKmItLSlY8dVgdBFay-K3q4IIajBwMaJuwMdIicsEie8EqdvP79MN_TYiyI_nZhNyuubygrU9ydnirHi7QMEubb4nfTwySRiy-zOOMgHG8aTSGNnFp75EIiQUy5CDR_NuLxClg_Tbm9VUSZvVFHJChORwNO4I8jU9Mhmt8K_YbFOqW-zv8pWcNoq0MZ1MPJmKib-snwJ3yju7HaveF01zAfh8B0kJ162IkJwWG21M0bhOLGJaBhbq67wI%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cdaea4951ffc4ae6a130fe87447d6c00&_e=DjSVxxkrCLafsENI_EaA9oMrYmMqs2GujjZS5gUop0RskxziJo5MJP52I1MWsOaQZbFm2OLqQO1H00xOaoSYyFJOI6Aaj6jxx1u7f05r6r8LaN2VnvobQ8x4LfXPU_3e-QuqWqZss1SNLy7Spgc3qoRu8uL8wW4yVweO9Ez4FziOslqzPzVKmItLSlY8dVgdBFay-K3q4IIajBwMaJuwMdIicsEie8EqdvP79MN_TYiyI_nZhNyuubygrU9ydnirvgJ4HqDpKw5peYO937Iq5qagUoRBJbYZ9ooBLNSa9GnL4CO0rfGtO_FcojmmlmrOoQEhHf86b1ApkIX4uSUAe_OrylS3USXBlQ2L7oPyZcYK77Vyxo-0NkM1dwyZV7lRziv8WnowzQdMTlWIJ_FlHYQqGhq_0RBM48HL64fZV-8%3D)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cdaea4951ffc4ae6a130fe87447d6c00&_e=DjSVxxkrCLafsENI_EaA9oMrYmMqs2GujjZS5gUop0RskxziJo5MJP52I1MWsOaQZbFm2OLqQO1H00xOaoSYyFJOI6Aaj6jxx1u7f05r6r8LaN2VnvobQ8x4LfXPU_3e-QuqWqZss1SNLy7Spgc3qoRu8uL8wW4yVweO9Ez4FziOslqzPzVKmItLSlY8dVgdBFay-K3q4IIajBwMaJuwMdIicsEie8EqdvP79MN_TYiyI_nZhNyuubygrU9ydnirruJ1Cg-P5Wp-3vLHGooqWLBc3ZkoBq5zfCjl5_uO3BiuS99jv77WGwZibHWuiGrcEhqP1XcxXtRbZpUA2qcV0HpboZKPp7pMnPULTiZVPefXZJpaxMNPdO6MZtDTvTsXu8dk7j1XEdAYX2zsqPk529MGGlNUiFIQcL1X0s8qgc0%3D) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cdaea4951ffc4ae6a130fe87447d6c00&_e=DjSVxxkrCLafsENI_EaA9oMrYmMqs2GujjZS5gUop0RskxziJo5MJP52I1MWsOaQZbFm2OLqQO1H00xOaoSYyFJOI6Aaj6jxx1u7f05r6r8LaN2VnvobQ8x4LfXPU_3e-QuqWqZss1SNLy7Spgc3qoRu8uL8wW4yVweO9Ez4FziOslqzPzVKmItLSlY8dVgdBFay-K3q4IIajBwMaJuwMdIicsEie8EqdvP79MN_TYiyI_nZhNyuubygrU9ydnirrZlKR1DldEVqzzZ54HYdoN0mflVLHXp9-x20jVXrTksHYxDbrmeGKkg6vkr2tN5NnIRnxodB8ZQHUEVOFl3rQMOFsFnIk5hRimPrfNf3Wae-SMTJUGsLyLlvE3m1ix8eEv550dGteNUYrUwj8YNuz68jOqiuhuZ7HqroX2aeDRY%3D)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cdaea4951ffc4ae6a130fe87447d6c00&_e=DjSVxxkrCLafsENI_EaA9oMrYmMqs2GujjZS5gUop0RskxziJo5MJP52I1MWsOaQZbFm2OLqQO1H00xOaoSYyFJOI6Aaj6jxx1u7f05r6r8LaN2VnvobQ8x4LfXPU_3e-QuqWqZss1SNLy7Spgc3qoRu8uL8wW4yVweO9Ez4FziOslqzPzVKmItLSlY8dVgdBFay-K3q4IIajBwMaJuwMdIicsEie8EqdvP79MN_TYiyI_nZhNyuubygrU9ydnir3LKU3cpyZBuj0TxVSg4a_WGHdWh7_f9PK73w7DuT3xUjeK9lT5FAeLU0u78DcK0q4qyKHMs97WYLoqajimvRf2tZFyOtFtvyo78LXTgM0inuUITnQDIXylzvhIt9_D_E1IcZJuy9mLUMHtXmAjOlQFeVIheSp85CRfFwYtivK8g%3D)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father

This left me more convinced than ever that when it comes to the border, there are only two kinds of Americans. 1\. Those who _are_ outraged and already demanding it be secured; and 2\. Those who _will_ be outraged and demand it be secured once they come face to face with the threat posed by the 11.5 million migrants who illegally crossed our border over the last four years – a shocking 650,000 with criminal backgrounds (including 14,944 murders and 20,061 charged with sexual assault)

clean_body: Help me and Tucker Carlson| | | Help me and Tucker Carlson today. | | From the desk of | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, I risked my life to get this footage from the border. Jumping aboard a moving freight train filled with Venezuelan migrants in the dead of night... being detained by the Mexican national guard ... and even sneaking into a secret child encampment in Texas that housed unaccompanied children. Anyone who has seen what I’ve seen and still resistsPresident Trump on securing the border, deporting criminal illegals, and designating cartels as foreign terrorist organizations is leading America down a dangerous path. That’s why I’m writing to you today with this personal request. I interviewed border patrol agents who were extremely emotional and who clearly had reached their breaking point... not long after we came across a little girl standing alone in the desert in the middle of the night completely abandoned. This left me more convinced than ever that when it comes to the border, there are only two kinds of Americans. 1\. Those who are outraged and already demanding it be secured; and 2\. Those who will be outraged and demand it be secured once they come face to face with the threat posed by the 11.5 million migrants who illegally crossed our border over the last four years – a shocking 650,000 with criminal backgrounds (including 14,944 murders and 20,061 charged with sexual assault) | | I traveled to this warzone. I saw with my own eyes. And I did all this so you wouldn’t have to. I also did this after being repeatedly struck in the face by the reality that nothing will change until the second group of people I described a moment ago wake up and stop their complacency. That’s exactly what this documentary has the power to do. Correction. That’s exactly what you have the power to do. My friend, this is why I joined forces with Tucker Carlson to promote and distribute “LINE IN THE SAND”. We must continue to investigate what is really happening at our Southern Border. Here’s the problem. It’s one we can’t overcome alone. You see, our open southern border is much more than a national security threat...it’s big business. I call it the “migrant industrial complex.” Let’s connect those dots: Your tax dollars → NGO’s masquerading as churches → Cartels → All of it under the eye (and protection) of local law enforcement | | This isn’t conjecture. It’s reality... A reality that one of OMG’s undercover journalists (alias Caesar) working with Citizen Journalism Foundation experienced as he was held at gunpoint by cartel members after he infiltrated a border encampment in the middle of the Aravaca Desert – a site being operated by an NGO (non-governmental organization) affiliated with the Unitarian Universalist Church. A reality I experienced when Pima County deputies threatened to arrest me for exposing a bus filled with illegal immigrants being brought to the Ramada Hotel. A reality that is captured and documented on film by going inside a cartel tunnel, interviewing border patrol agents, climbing aboard a moving freight train with migrants from Venezuela, and uncovering the horrors of babies getting run over and children being drugged so they could be smuggled across the border in silence. Our New President gets it. Tom Homan and Kristi Noem get it. They’ve been relentless. But you know who doesn’t report this? The legacy media in America. The actions that you take over the next 5 minutes will play a huge role in whether we have the resources to continue with the powerful citizen journalism that made “LINE IN THE SAND” possible. It’s that simple. Oh, there may be a place on the map called “ the United States.” But, whether the idea of America (and the freedom it has represented for the last 249 years) will survive? That part depends on what you do today. Because the very first freedom – the Freedom of Speech and a Free Press upon which all other freedoms rest – is being chipped away. And not little by little. But massive cracks and fissures are happening each and every day. . People familiar with our multi-part border investigation keep texting me, asking if I fear for my life. Here is my response: I’m not suicidal. But I’m also not afraid to die. At 40, I’ve lived a good life. Whether it’s complete or not is not up to me. What happens next, I don’t know. If there’s more to come here, so be it. I’ve learned the pursuit of truth requires extreme risk while operating without a safety net. Meteoric highs, extreme lows, and near-death experiences, jail and jury trials, constant travel, adventures, travails, failures, betrayals, repeated valleys, moving and climbing mountains, enduring multiple rebirths and renewals. Which leads me to the border videos I've released and the wider mission of Citizen Journalism Foundation – the mission is to discover other people whose principles are not for sale and who will do the right thing rather than talk about doing the right thing. I’m tired of seeing tens-of-thousands of people message me privately about how bad things are... and then they make excuses or do nothing. You see, the truth is the only thing the enemies of freedom hate more than one citizen journalist is an entire army of citizen journalists doing the work “the media” is supposed to do. The mission of Citizen Journalism Foundation is promoting these truths and providing this desperately needed transparency. I have to tell you, so far, this border investigation takes the prize as one of the most dangerous operations I’ve ever been involved with. Cartel members pointing guns at our undercover reporter. Sheriff’s deputies threatening jail-time. And, after our reporter escaped the Cartel encampment, I personally donned a bullet-proof vest and “press” badge to exfiltrate our reporter, who was on the point of blacking-out when we finally got him in the vehicle. I’ll tell you pointblank... The entire operation was a reality check for me and for our OMG team. And we’re not backing down. Uncovering the truth is too important. It’s worth the fight. It’s worth the sacrifice. If you agree, good. I need you to join me. That’s why I’m urging you to rush me your “LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution before you do anything else today. I need to hear from you within the next 48 hours so we can conduct even more undercover investigations, and fully execute our blueprint for training and equipping our army of Citizen Journalists. I’m counting on your help to expose the corruption on our southern border and in big government, big tech, big banks, big media, and big pharma. It won’t be easy. As I mentioned the retaliation I – and those citizen journalists working alongside me – will face is well-documented. Our vital mission cannot continue without your support. So, whether you can send $35 or more, please make your “LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution in the next 48 hours using the button below. | | With Sincere Thanks, | | James O'KeefeCEO, Citizen Journalism Foundation | | | James O'KeefeCEO, Citizen Journalism Foundation | | | Citizen Journalism Foundation is a 501(c)(3) organization, gifts to which are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. | | P.O. Box 1225Merrifield, VA 22116-1225

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: We need more leaders who understand economics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39612%2E3422442%2EWfETbt)
Dear Derek,
When we look at how our economy’s doing after Trump’s tariff announcement, it’s clear that Trump and his advisers either don’t understand economics, or they do, and are wrecking our economy anyway.
Katie is a commercial law professor who’s done extensive research on how to make our economy actually work for working people. **She was one of the first people to sound the alarm on the dangerous bank practices that led to the 2008 financial crisis.**
Democrats need skilled economic messengers who can talk with voters in a compelling way about economic issues. And when we win, we need elected officials who will govern by delivering on the right priorities to make life easier for working families.
That’s what we’ll get with Katie Porter as California’s next governor.
**[Will you chip in $5 to power this campaign, so we can elect someone with the expertise and backbone to fight for us—and win—on economic issues?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250406_1_ak?refcode=em20250406-39612&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39612_3422442_WfETbt&akid=39612%2E3422442%2EWfETbt)**
—Team Katie Porter for Governor

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250406-39612&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39612_3422442_WfETbt&akid=39612%2E3422442%2EWfETbt)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39612&t=4&akid=39612%2E3422442%2EWfETbt)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39612)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39612&t=5&akid=39612%2E3422442%2EWfETbt)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026

name: Xavier Becerra
subject: I’m running to be California’s next governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T372338db-438d-4fea-8dd6-123432ff0510/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c537179-f1e5-4962-b7bc-cedee9b55ac0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi, Peter, I’m Xavier Becerra and I’m so excited to share with you that I’m running to be California’s next governor. I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why. I’ve spent my whole career taking on Donald Trump and the GOP – and winning. When Trump attacked Californians, I sued him 122 times as Attorney General – and won. When Republicans tried to gut the Affordable Care Act, I took them to the Supreme Court – and won. When Big Pharma was ripping off Americans, I negotiated lower drug prices – and won. Now, I’m running for governor because I know what it takes to win tough fights – and deliver for working families. [If you want a fighter who will stand up to Trump and the GOP and get California back on track, I hope you’ll split a donation today between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help my campaign get off to a strong start. Every dollar we raise today will help us build the grassroots movement we need to win.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda7f17e8-25a1-4a9f-bd36-578501278402/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf3eb51a4-2faf-42b7-b280-8927c6350b7a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| My family came here with $12 to pursue the California Dream. I was born and raised by my parents in Sacramento, where they taught my siblings and me the value of hard work. Despite those humble beginnings, they were able to own a home, send the four of us kids to college or the military, and set aside enough to retire with dignity. To me, that’s the California Dream – and that’s what I’m fighting to protect. Because today, despite having the largest economy in the country, that dream of owning a home, raising a family, and retiring with dignity is all too hard for Californians to attain. That’s why I’m promising to build our state’s economy, create opportunities and lower costs for working families, and protect the California we all love. Peter, I’ve spent most of my life serving the people of California in the state legislature, Congress, as Attorney General, and then as the Secretary of Health and Human Services. After a lot of consideration and thoughtful conversations with my wife, Carolina, and our three daughters, one thing became clear: I am not done serving our state. It’s time for California to rise and build. I’m ready to lead our state at this critical moment, and I’m humbly asking you to join me. My team and I set a grassroots fundraising goal to raise $100,000 in honor of our launch, and any amount you can spare would mean so much. [Please split a donation of $10 – or anything at all – to my campaign and Blue Amp Action now to invest in my campaign for governor and our shared future as Californians.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfbc0317b-57a4-4bcc-bdec-b17cbfc97ae3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN $10 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tde8b3dd8-15c1-4653-83e3-2b2beeab09d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN $20 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbd1a7a73-76f7-4c64-a1c8-577db25b1720/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
|
---
| | | | | Thank you, from the bottom of my heart. Let’s keep fighting, Xavier Becerra [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T69dcd080-ec1a-43dd-a4eb-62b626128a6a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td4b9dfd6-3c3d-4083-9626-b0ae5b8fb552/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: NPR & PBS Protection Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Protect PBS & NPR from being defunded
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Donald Trump just unleashed a chilling all-caps Twitter rant demanding
that NPR and PBS "MUST DIE."

It followed hot on the heels of MAGA extremist Marjorie Taylor Greene
urging Speaker Mike Johnson to use the upcoming reconciliation bill to
make defunding these essential institutions the law of the land.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23998?source=email-20250406&t=1011&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ][IMG]

They're serious: our independent media is truly on the line.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23998?source=email-20250406&t=1012&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ]Sign our urgent petition now to demand that Congress protect and fully
fund NPR and PBS!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23998?source=email-20250406&t=1013&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ]ADD YOUR NAME

NPR and PBS aren’t merely broadcasters—they’re lifelines of democracy. PBS
reaches over 130 million Americans each month, providing essential
education to millions of children, unbiased news coverage, and critical
investigative reporting.

NPR serves as one of America’s most trusted news sources, reaching over 43
million listeners weekly, from small towns to bustling cities. It offers a
voice to communities often ignored by corporate-controlled media, covering
stories with depth, integrity, and independence.

Why target them now? Because Trump and Greene know exactly what's at
stake: unbiased reporting, factual accountability, and public broadcasting
free from corporate influence.

We simply can't afford to lose these crucial voices to a political
vendetta.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23998?source=email-20250406&t=1014&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ]Sign the petition today—urge Congress to stand firm and protect public
broadcasting from MAGA's extremist attacks!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23998?source=email-20250406&t=1015&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ]ADD YOUR NAME

This isn't just another political fight—it's about safeguarding the very
foundations of an informed, educated, and empowered public. It's about
defending truth itself against the wave of misinformation Trump thrives
on.

That is why Our Revolution has been working tirelessly with our partners
Free Press, ACLU, and NABET to run attention-grabbing demonstrations,
channel enormous pressure onto Congress, and activate our Citizen Action
Team across the country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23998?source=email-20250406&t=1016&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ][IMG]

We’ve stood against threats to democracy before, and we've won by
mobilizing thousands of voices just like yours. We can do it again, but
only if we act now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23998?source=email-20250406&t=1017&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ]Add your name today: Tell Speaker Johnson and Congress that we won't
let Trump silence NPR and PBS.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-20250406.obwvd8&t=1007&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20250406.6KkWtt&t=1008&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-20250406.6VHURZ&t=1009&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=email-20250406.rlqsKL&t=1010&akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=8062%2E5885482%2EOf6YBV

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: From the bottom of my heart, y’all: THANK YOU!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
|
---
Folks, it’s Jasmine. I know you’ve heard from me and my team a lot over the past few days and weeks, but I just wanted to personally reach out to thank you for all your support. Right now, I’m getting attacked on all sides from Trump, Musk, and their MAGA cronies here in Congress. They’re trying to scare me into silence and crush my voice as they orchestrate an authoritarian takeover of the federal government. **But my pledge to you and all the American people is that I will never stop fighting back and speaking up.** I couldn’t pull it off without your support, and I’m so grateful to have tenacious grassroots champions like you on my team each and every day. [**And with so much on the line right now, I’m going to continue needing your support for the weeks and months ahead. clean_body: | Folks, it’s Jasmine. I know you’ve heard from me and my team a lot over the past few days and weeks, but I just wanted to personally reach out to thank you for all your support. Right now, I’m getting attacked on all sides from Trump, Musk, and their MAGA cronies here in Congress. They’re trying to scare me into silence and crush my voice as they orchestrate an authoritarian takeover of the federal government. But my pledge to you and all the American people is that I will never stop fighting back and speaking up. I couldn’t pull it off without your support, and I’m so grateful to have tenacious grassroots champions like you on my team each and every day. = = Thank you, Jasmine = = [content goes here] Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Serve America PAC

name: Voter Action Project
subject: So much at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voters desperately need a " private right to action " to protect their rights. All that phrase means is that we, the people, can bring forward a lawsuit ourselves when we see wrongdoing in our elections.
This 8th Circuit decision strips us of that -- in a world where most legal action around voting rights comes from groups like ours and our partners, not from the U.S. Department of Justice(DOJ). And we've got at least these four years of DOJ's Civil Rights division facing attacks from a hostile presidential administration.
There's so much at risk, Team. RUSH $25 or more right now so we have the resources we need to fight rulings like this one and protect our right to vote across the country >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
AP: Federal appeals court deals a blow to Voting Rights Act, ruling that private plaintiffs can’t sue
Folks,
This ruling by the federal 8th Circuit still needs our attention, as it continues to be ignored in the media. It's one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years .
If you missed the details, the impact is pretty simple to understand: In the eight states impacted by the ruling, voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws.
With former Florida AG Pam Bondi -- a "big lie" spreading MAGA acolyte -- serving as Attorney General, do any of us really think that the DOJ is going to protect voting rights over the next four years?
Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=15&amtOpts=&recurringAm=15&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=otjUbQMYVmPbDycE-TEnc7Mn12sXZDd1_2v8XN1-bOY=&contactdata=ZX3LiiFS3RWF4l197MlkWDDJjW1+lbmMk9EEWQmUrNcgq2S9KvvpNLc6M20Y+hyGqcJ7IuLSuIHlV7KoyM/vs30z4JuJrv7jW5YfVUumRco=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25&amtOpts=&recurringAm=25&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=otjUbQMYVmPbDycE-TEnc7Mn12sXZDd1_2v8XN1-bOY=&contactdata=ZX3LiiFS3RWF4l197MlkWDDJjW1+lbmMk9EEWQmUrNcgq2S9KvvpNLc6M20Y+hyGqcJ7IuLSuIHlV7KoyM/vs30z4JuJrv7jW5YfVUumRco=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=50&amtOpts=&recurringAm=50&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=otjUbQMYVmPbDycE-TEnc7Mn12sXZDd1_2v8XN1-bOY=&contactdata=ZX3LiiFS3RWF4l197MlkWDDJjW1+lbmMk9EEWQmUrNcgq2S9KvvpNLc6M20Y+hyGqcJ7IuLSuIHlV7KoyM/vs30z4JuJrv7jW5YfVUumRco=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=100&amtOpts=&recurringAm=100&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=otjUbQMYVmPbDycE-TEnc7Mn12sXZDd1_2v8XN1-bOY=&contactdata=ZX3LiiFS3RWF4l197MlkWDDJjW1+lbmMk9EEWQmUrNcgq2S9KvvpNLc6M20Y+hyGqcJ7IuLSuIHlV7KoyM/vs30z4JuJrv7jW5YfVUumRco=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=250&amtOpts=&recurringAm=250&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=otjUbQMYVmPbDycE-TEnc7Mn12sXZDd1_2v8XN1-bOY=&contactdata=ZX3LiiFS3RWF4l197MlkWDDJjW1+lbmMk9EEWQmUrNcgq2S9KvvpNLc6M20Y+hyGqcJ7IuLSuIHlV7KoyM/vs30z4JuJrv7jW5YfVUumRco=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=ZX3LiiFS3RWF4l197MlkWDDJjW1+lbmMk9EEWQmUrNcgq2S9KvvpNLc6M20Y+hyGqcJ7IuLSuIHlV7KoyM/vs30z4JuJrv7jW5YfVUumRco=]
This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling.
We won’t sugarcoat this: This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this ruling is not overturned by a higher court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand.
Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone.
We can't do this alone. Help defend our right to vote with $25 or however much you can today and make every voice heard in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=ZX3LiiFS3RWF4l197MlkWDDJjW1+lbmMk9EEWQmUrNcgq2S9KvvpNLc6M20Y+hyGqcJ7IuLSuIHlV7KoyM/vs30z4JuJrv7jW5YfVUumRco= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=ZX3LiiFS3RWF4l197MlkWDDJjW1+lbmMk9EEWQmUrNcgq2S9KvvpNLc6M20Y+hyGqcJ7IuLSuIHlV7KoyM/vs30z4JuJrv7jW5YfVUumRco=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=ZX3LiiFS3RWF4l197MlkWDDJjW1+lbmMk9EEWQmUrNcgq2S9KvvpNLc6M20Y+hyGqcJ7IuLSuIHlV7KoyM/vs30z4JuJrv7jW5YfVUumRco=]

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=da7139f8e7&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | ** **
**CALL TO ACTION!**
** **
**HEALTH FREEDOM IGNORED
WHILE BILLIONAIRES RECEIVE
A $600M PAYOFF IN PROPOSED
OHIO BUDGET!**

---
| **Are you aware Republican Ohio House Leadership rejected every health freedom amendment put forward by Ohio's health freedom activists & agreeable sponsors, yet the $600M give-away to the billionaire Haslam family, who aren't even Ohioans, was gleefully left in the current version of the 2026-2027 Ohio State Budget?**

Enough is enough. It's time we got loud about the tone deaf, dismissive, corrupt cabal controlling the Ohio House, including Speaker Matt Huffman, who took 6-figures or more in campaign donations from the Haslams, the billionaire family who own the Cleveland Browns, shortly before they asked for the $600M deal.****[**Go HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6299a28fc5&e=5c740fa3e2) to see a news article explaining this corruption.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1fffb57c78&e=5c740fa3e2)

Meanwhile, **every single proposed health freedom amendment** to the budget bill was nixed.

It's well past the time we should have become extremely vocal with OUR elected representatives. **Here's what WE ALL NEED TO DO:**

👉👉👉1) **Call, email, and text** (if possible) these people who are on the finance committee, as well as the Speaker, and **TELL THEM** you want the **HEALTH FREEDOM AMENDMENTS** **ADDED** to the budget bill and the **$600M frivolous** use of YOUR money **TAKEN OUT**. **Do not ask them ... TELL THEM ... because remember, THEY WORK FOR YOU!

Matt Huffman, District 78, Speaker**

👉👉👉2) **Call, email, and text** (if possible) your Ohio House Member & Ohio Senator ([if you don't know who they are you can find them **HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0bde2925e0&e=5c740fa3e2)) and **ask them two very direct questions** (or tell whoever answers). Tell them you want YES or NO answers to these 2 simple questions:

**a) Do you support putting the heath freedom amendments omitted from the current version of the budget bill into the final bill?**

**b) Do you support removing the $600M Haslam money from the final version of the bill?**

Demand answers, YES or NO, not explanations or refusals to answer.

**Once you have answers, please send them to Mark Pukita** at 614-499-0599 (text) or [mark@mark4ohio.com](mailto:mark@mark4ohio.com) (email). We are going to start pressuring our elected representatives, who work for us, to go **ON THE RECORD** which is the only way we will ever get what we want. **We will publish & publicize the answers we get, as well as who ignores us, so you can keep score!**

_**THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR DOING THIS!**_

---
|
---
|
---
| | | ** **
**CALL TO ACTION!**
** **
**DON'T FORGET ABOUT ISSUE 2!**
** **
**SPREAD THE WORD!
$2.5B BOND ISSUE ON
OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT!
WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW!
WE MUST GET THE WORD OUT!**

---
| _<**We've left prior weeks' information on Issue 2 below just in case you missed it!** >_

**This issue is beatable!**
1) Turnout for the **May 6th PRIMARY ELECTION** is expected to be around 5% of registered Ohio voters. That's about 400,000 total votes.
2) The past 2 times a similar bond issue was on the ballot, the winning margin was 19.23%, let's round that up to 20%. That means 60% YES & 40% NO. Or, 240,000 YES votes & 160,000 NO votes. A 20% difference or 80,000 vote differential.
3) **FIRST** , if we can educate 10% of the potential YES voters & turn them to NO voters, the result would be 216,000 YES votes & 184,000 NO votes, a 24,000 vote swing. Across Ohio's 88 counties we'd need to persuade 273 YES voters to vote NO, **A VERY REASONABLE** thing to do.
4) **SECOND** , if we can activate 40,000 voters who typically don't vote in primary elections **and get them to vote** , that's a turnout increase of only 0.5%, or one-half of one percent! This is also **A VERY REASONABLE** thing for us to try to get done! It's only an additional 455 votes per county.
5) **WHEN** we do this, **WE WIN!** The final vote count would be 224,000 NO and 216,000 YES = 440,000 total votes = 5.5% turnout. Again, **A****VERY REASONABLE** objective!
**WHAT EACH OF US CAN DO TO SPREAD THE WORD AND MAKE THIS HAPPEN!**
Over the next week, **PLEASE** :
* Make 10 **social media posts** on the issue
* **Send texts** about the issue to 10 people
* **Send emails** about the issue to another (different) 10 people
* **Make calls** about the issue to 10 more (different) people
* Persuade 10 more (new) people to commit to go **to vote with you**
* Persuade 10 people not previously contacted **to make absentee (mail-in) ballot requests with your help**

_****__**Try to contact 50 DIFFERENT people.**_
If each of the 11,000+ subscribers to this email did this, we would easily defeat this **stealthy, unnecessary, costly** , $2.5B bond issue!
**LET'S MAKE IT HAPPEN!**

* * *

[**NEW**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0f03f696d0&e=5c740fa3e2)[**WEBPAGE FOR YOU TO BOOKMARK WITH RESOURCES TO HELP US ALL FIGHT ISSUE 2!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0f15e70e64&e=5c740fa3e2)

We [**PREVIOUSLY**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=25d7bb4483&e=5c740fa3e2) made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! **EARLY VOTING STARTS APRIL 8TH!**

**HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP!**

1) PLEASE **forward this message** to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
2) PLEASE download **[THIS GRAPHIC](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3507126766&e=5c740fa3e2) (same as below)** to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, **especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
NEW >>>> 3)****** PLEASE **refer** as many people as you can **to the new Issue 2[WEBPAGE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=88b6ebd7e7&e=5c740fa3e2)**!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3734a24a74&e=5c740fa3e2)
**(Click the image above to download!)
BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE**
It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can!
Thank you!

**EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=dd062d4b09&e=5c740fa3e2)

name: Tina for Oregon
subject: Tina is taking action to safeguard reproductive freedom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Read on to learn how Tina is protecting Oregon’s values. |
#
---
Peter — In Oregon, Governor Kotek has been clear that all Oregonians have the freedom to decide whether and when to have kids. When anti-choice extremists threatened access to the abortion medication mifepristone, Governor Kotek secured a stockpile of the drug to last Oregon through 2028. She also put in place protections for every health care provider who prescribes it, and every person who needs it. Governor Kotek isn’t backing down — she’s taking proactive steps to protect our values here in Oregon from national Republicans who are trying to control our rights and take us backward. [**Now, she needs to know the people are behind her. Add your name to support Governor Kotek’s efforts to proactively secure Oregonian’s rights from national threats to abortion care.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105322389/537971052/313546904?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250406_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjNmNmQ4Zi0xMjEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T5MPCVeiXKawCkv_jcBRQSoEEk4-x8KySNSHw3hpi1I=&emci=523f6d8f-1213-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=563f6d8f-1213-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105322390/537971053/313546904?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250406_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjNmNmQ4Zi0xMjEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T5MPCVeiXKawCkv_jcBRQSoEEk4-x8KySNSHw3hpi1I=&emci=523f6d8f-1213-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=563f6d8f-1213-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729)
---
The threats won’t stop coming. But together, we’ll continue the fight for reproductive freedom.
Thanks for doing your part,
Team Tina
| Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services. **Can you chip in any amount now to support her work?** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105322391/537971054/559856784?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250406_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjNmNmQ4Zi0xMjEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T5MPCVeiXKawCkv_jcBRQSoEEk4-x8KySNSHw3hpi1I=)

Portland, OR 97242 **[tinafororegon.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105322392/537971055/1133357015?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250406_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjNmNmQ4Zi0xMjEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T5MPCVeiXKawCkv_jcBRQSoEEk4-x8KySNSHw3hpi1I=&emci=523f6d8f-1213-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=563f6d8f-1213-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729) | [info@tinafororegon.com](mailto:info@tinafororegon.com)** | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

Can you chip in any amount now to support her work? | = Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
