name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: FBI agent ARRESTED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
While attempting to leave the country...
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6c1a5ace7f5943d0ad7ff533654e373d&_e=p5989PCM8Jt5E6yj4QdVknpnW-CJFhZ3ooowZQJd17R8bGIbevoqejidfAOiXln_jlaFDMarnzKyWFroX2ntvKsYIaM1U6rn4S9-bOm3KrUKOLviQhgAQOAVxxdreRrNB59Bc_D3kYd6Jpypaq4_yXq_uj8wlXRHLFC_LlQllV0V6rw03INhTONF5_N7Z5Fl9YqDLf-QdResoU8NzgQGjZfklEXqWaLFp78f3gCVAcoftMul_uvm17dZfdkIs3YRAB2582ovWPSNW4lVSHd6L0PJKPg7oq8bpCjmSyriXLQjWwoIv8gIMXp1NPzFx6o2c1GNIezM-miq8Qs5PTpaQB1Xz_1CkO_RPU2mIsPWe4FwuK_grRYMcfmn8raWcd-N)
---
ATTN: Fellow American,
---
The FBI agent who was targeting me was just **_ARRESTED_** as he attempted to board an international flight to leave the country!
---
_He also happens to be a friend of Robert Mueller:_
---

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6c1a5ace7f5943d0ad7ff533654e373d&_e=p5989PCM8Jt5E6yj4QdVknpnW-CJFhZ3ooowZQJd17R8bGIbevoqejidfAOiXln_jlaFDMarnzKyWFroX2ntvKsYIaM1U6rn4S9-bOm3KrUKOLviQhgAQOAVxxdreRrNB59Bc_D3kYd6Jpypaq4_yXq_uj8wlXRHLFC_LlQllV0V6rw03INhTONF5_N7Z5Fl9YqDLf-QdResoU8NzgQGjZfklEXqWaLFp78f3gCVAcocwE2GbSgUldKnj-RSo7yW0kW7SxqTfEYPo619byTRjn8Lcc4eJfaD9jTkwHDHpMn6hrjwbTaTd430XoHP1HPBlUZWulQRkzdDXJHEyrJgIx00dkay0SL_fX_QC5r_AVcXgiUbYKaIO_nj4MWPncsG)
__
---

Thanks to President Trump, the Deep State is being exposed. Guilty actors are being held to account. And justice is being served.
---
**_But we’re not safe just yet!_**
---
_As I’m sure you’ve seen on the news,_judges_ have now gone rogue and are REVOLTING. They’re trying to handcuff President Trump to stop him from demolishing the Deep State._
---
And they’d love nothing more than to see his former lawyer – yours truly – behind bars.
---
**In fact, my own fate now rests in the hands of a judge who will decide whether I live in a prison cell until I am 100 years old.**
---
And this is an important note: _President Trump CANNOT issue a pardon to save me, because I’m being tried in state court._
---
But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a **“ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,” RAIDED** my home, **ARRESTED** me, took a **MUGSHOT** of me, and forced me into **BANKRUPTCY** , the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
**_...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter._**
---
Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m __still__ FIGHTING BACK.
---
When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757** ...
---
And today, to show them that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ are also fighters who refuse to stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to WIN the trial of my life and the fight for my freedom and justice.
---

He also happens to be a friend of Robert Mueller: Thanks to President Trump, the Deep State is being exposed. Guilty actors are being held to account. And justice is being served. But we’re not safe just yet! As I’m sure you’ve seen on the news,judges have now gone rogue and are REVOLTING. They’re trying to handcuff President Trump to stop him from demolishing the Deep State. And they’d love nothing more than to see his former lawyer – yours truly – behind bars. In fact, my own fate now rests in the hands of a judge who will decide whether I live in a prison cell until I am 100 years old. And this is an important note: President Trump CANNOT issue a pardon to save me, because I’m being tried in state court. name: Chris Pappas
subject: I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
I’ll always put New Hampshire first.

| Peter, I’m Congressman Chris Pappas, and Abigail Spanberger said I could reach out with some big news:

**I’m officially running to be New Hampshire’s next U.S. Senator.** I’m going to share more about why I’m in this race, but if you’re already on board, [_**split a contribution to my campaign and Abigail Spanberger today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105322967/537972992/774733?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTA2OTY2NGEtMTUxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JDQPYjnD6kl_nLRjfEJr8QgLxi46eXASqIVkasgRRLg=)

I’m running for Senate because at this pivotal moment, our economy, our democracy, and our way of life are on the line. New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state – and one who is ready to lead on day one.

Our country is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make now will have generational impacts. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire.

[_**Peter, can I count on you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign with a $25 contribution, split between my campaign and Abigail Spanberger right now? We can’t win this race without major grassroots support.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105322968/537972993/774733?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTA2OTY2NGEtMTUxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JDQPYjnD6kl_nLRjfEJr8QgLxi46eXASqIVkasgRRLg=)

**These fights are deeply personal to me.** My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away – and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn.

I’m also openly gay and happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. **If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history** – a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality.

I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners _(my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant – seriously!)._ I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. **These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone.**

My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. Before I won my election in 2018, no one had managed to hold the seat for more than one term for more than a decade. I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. **Now I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue.**

We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead – not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight?

[_**Peter, if you’re with me, let’s make a powerful statement together and prove that we’re ready to win this race. Become a Founding Donor with a $25 donation to my campaign and Abigail Spanberger now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105322969/537972994/774733?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTA2OTY2NGEtMTUxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JDQPYjnD6kl_nLRjfEJr8QgLxi46eXASqIVkasgRRLg=)

Thank you again to Abigail Spanberger for letting me reach out today.

With gratitude,

Chris [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105322970/537972995/-1505189071?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTA2OTY2NGEtMTUxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JDQPYjnD6kl_nLRjfEJr8QgLxi46eXASqIVkasgRRLg=)

clean_body: I’ll always put New Hampshire first. | Peter, I’m Congressman Chris Pappas, and Abigail Spanberger said I could reach out with some big news: I’m officially running to be New Hampshire’s next U.S. Senator. I’m going to share more about why I’m in this race, but if you’re already on board, = I’m running for Senate because at this pivotal moment, our economy, our democracy, and our way of life are on the line. New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state – and one who is ready to lead on day one. Our country is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make now will have generational impacts. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire. = These fights are deeply personal to me. My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away – and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn. I’m also openly gay and happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history – a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality. I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners (my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant – seriously!). I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone. My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. Before I won my election in 2018, no one had managed to hold the seat for more than one term for more than a decade. I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. Now I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue. We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead – not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight? = Thank you again to Abigail Spanberger for letting me reach out today. With gratitude, Chris = * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Mark Levin Alert
subject: A dire warning on judicial tyranny
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
He called out Justice John Roberts!
| ATTN: Peter
---
Mark Levin just issued a dire warning.
---

name: Rebecca Cooke HQ
subject: This campaign is about working for working people.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105323395/537974433/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjM4NDlkZS0xNzEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=25KcEJZO6diqFQXw_5MXTdlbhBGokExAxysGEyeSWBw=&emci=e53849de-1713-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=eb3849de-1713-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5944223)
Hi Peter, This has always been a campaign by and for working people, so we’re very excited that some of Wisconsin’s strongest champions for workers are eagerly lining up behind it. **We’re proud to share that SMART -- the International Association of Sheet Metal, Air, Rail and Transportation Workers, has officially endorsed Rebecca’s campaign!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105323396/537974434/1137478713?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjM4NDlkZS0xNzEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=25KcEJZO6diqFQXw_5MXTdlbhBGokExAxysGEyeSWBw=&emci=e53849de-1713-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=eb3849de-1713-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5944223) |
### _"We know Rebecca will stand for our apprenticeship programs and the strong labor standards we’ve fought for generations to establish and be a champion for all working families in Wisconsin. We look forward to working together to give our members and their families in Western Wisconsin a partner in Congress."_
---
Rebecca isn’t just endorsed by unions, they’ve been a pivotal part of her family.
She knows what it means to work hard and have to fight for every last resource -- and she knows that working people deserve a voice in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105323397/537974435/1137478713?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjM4NDlkZS0xNzEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=25KcEJZO6diqFQXw_5MXTdlbhBGokExAxysGEyeSWBw=&emci=e53849de-1713-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=eb3849de-1713-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5944223)
That’s why we’re inviting you to join them in showing support for Rebecca. This campaign is and will always be focused on the issues and the needs of folks across WI-03 -- from Eau Claire to Platteville -- who believe Washington can and should do better for us.
[**So Peter, will you add your name and stand with Rebecca for Congress? We're hoping to build a broad coalition of local supporters who are standing with us. Please sign on to endorse us today, then let us know what sector of the local economy you represent -- whether you teach, farm, work in retail, or run a business.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105323398/537974436/1137478713?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjM4NDlkZS0xNzEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=25KcEJZO6diqFQXw_5MXTdlbhBGokExAxysGEyeSWBw=&emci=e53849de-1713-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=eb3849de-1713-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5944223)
**[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105323399/537974437/1137478713?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjM4NDlkZS0xNzEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=25KcEJZO6diqFQXw_5MXTdlbhBGokExAxysGEyeSWBw=&emci=e53849de-1713-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=eb3849de-1713-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5944223)**
---
We are proud to stand with the everyday Wisconsinite.
\-- Team Rebecca
|
---

Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader who has focused her career on building community and serving others. She was born and raised on an Eau Claire dairy farm and was appointed by Governor Tony Evers to the Wisconsin Economic Development Corporation.

We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/2elATTNrnEy9TwqM75SNRg2?unsubscribedata=Fsawo3sOaHdXcCasiaJu4BBOl2CAhTBgcFSimn62xBGeq08gj9mY4wQ7y38%2BEdxnOuhM46VpS%2BdvGbrI4WZQAT3JAQcoPoobyRGcvJii1hYi0HdS9r9lzVrZBca%2FmRQGwAiYNrOfRT82sR7tYZo0GE2AqCmChz41L9mPOv9aMSqnQkW2j2vSwDhafTlee31x5b65UbuieWyDnEEOIS8rGTeI15KIghex62%2B3Bj5XX5qtl2Xn9RRRfIcLzx8%2FEcBVp1jkNkdCNKAvYv2BPdeD98NVoadqWvbaUUBNJCLk0OZM8Ithh86ExN9t6Bx%2F2RH6Nn8r0%2BfWOkclzDWH2BPnnnZSFvLD65MiO%2FPA9Ax3X6HlJG4FbdIbRgM0sGjU6kgsXQz2cSUj0soC%2BZ2Z7Ce3SNLv3L7MkHX36bQZmW8zXVs%3D). name: Elise Stefanik
subject: The President entrusted me. Now I’m entrusting YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
Please read my heartfelt note.
| Fellow American,
---
“America first” is not just a slogan.
---
It’s an _oath_ of leadership to the American people.
---
**That’s why I had to do what’s right for America and withdraw my nomination for U.N. Ambassador to remain in the House and _protect_ our razor-thin Majority.**
---
Our country stands on the horizon of a new “Golden Age.” We cannot let the Democrats flip the House and rob us of this historic opportunity to Make America Great Again!
---
_The President _entrusted_ me to protect the House. Now, I’m entrusting YOU._
---
My Senior Advisor, Alex, gave me a special list of top donors – some of whom have been with us since Day One and helped me become the youngest woman elected to Congress in 2014.
---
When I say “top” donors, these are not _necessarily_ the biggest donors, but the loyal ones who never gave up and never lost sight of our mission to put _America_ first.
---
You were on the list, Fellow American.
---
**With the sacrifice I just made, you can be certain that I’m going ALL IN to win. And now, I need you to join me.**
---
**That’s why I’m entrusting you with a 500% match to help us level the playing field against the Left’s Soros-funded Money Machine.**
---
_So, are you with me?_
---

body:
We’re working toward a push goal of $250,000, and we only have one day left until the deadline!
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1175%2E400544%2EBnns8y)
The last few weeks have been a whirlwind here at Team Haaland HQ — and we’re not slowing down yet! 🏃🏽♀️
**FIRST Deb kicked off her campaign with a tour all over New Mexico.** The grassroots energy at each stop was _electric_ — and we couldn’t be more grateful for all the support.
**THEN we announced our big fundraising push ahead of Monday’s big reporting deadline.** And thanks to this grassroots team, we _smashed_ our initial fundraising goal.
**NOW we’re working toward a push goal of $250,000, and we only have one day left until the deadline!**
If you’re ready to elect a governor who will work every day to make life easier for our families and the future brighter for our kids, [**will you pitch in $5 before tomorrow’s deadline to help us reach our $250,000 stretch goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250406_2_firstthennow?amount=5&refcode=em20250406-1175&refcode2=1175_400544_Bnns8y&akid=1175%2E400544%2EBnns8y)

Peter, House Republicans are planning to present the SAVE Act – a bill that would add restrictions to voter registration and disenfranchise millions of eligible voters.

The vast majority of Americans don’t support new restrictions on their right to vote. But I want to know what you think before this bill is brought to the floor. Here’s what the so-called SAVE Act will do if it’s passed:
* Create additional barriers for married women who have changed their last names to prove their identity in order to get registered

* End voter registration by mail

* Require proof-of-citizenship documents that an estimated 21+ million American citizens don’t have easy access to

Since the Civil Rights Act passed 60 years ago, our work in Congress has been about making voting more accessible to American citizens and increasing participation in our democratic system. This bill would do just the opposite.

name: Leader Scalise
subject: We need to talk about Tuesday’s election…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Multiple House seats in Wisconsin are now in serious jeopardy – our Conservative Majority is barely hanging on already | |
---
| | | We need to**** talk about Tuesday's election...

First off, I want to personally welcome MAGA warriors Jimmy Patronis and Randy Fine to our House Republican ranks. They will play an essential role in passing President Trump's agenda. _**[Now I need to level with you for a moment. That's why I'm coming to you with three pressing updates:](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1d77dc9f6b5d4182b6e99e01d83f654a&_e=Q5oPQiNs-jFqxAsOhjeyY_IYuJYROTggifCMRmNYvUeJ5KXPvtfL7cU2bZcIv7_i5rbGxuKyTpKJH7N82VtYyvy7ZQmVFdHYFTugcDFm4xl9KFE4-zyO-O00FTOyEfx6B3cAergvAxwyPU5f2Okl9bOA6Tm2fKTrS6N49qaJYgihDFRuwGXqjdAAPvIe6AJ6rG8CABz3y0waGfUqQP2lvaSuVpY4kvWB8D5HW9ldGjVhNPtJG4l7bUIupksciKOgF-2N2UiZHZirdu7TfD4_MgKUJHuUFQXNPjuRqatmxCWd5hVOH17u_FlLf_cV0w42xrDGATjSFiyReKaaxpXSQgnzE8lMZU7mTNUbRMAi9CS_HOnik8MqWIhn9D6Szoi4UuIWAaq-aM9A6DTKfzoWtA%3D%3D "Now I need to level with you for a moment. That’s why I’m coming to you with three pressing updates:")**_
1. We got shellacked in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race - the Liberal outspent the Conservative candidate by DOUBLE
2. Multiple House seats in Wisconsin are now in serious jeopardy - our Conservative Majority is barely hanging on already
3. The Florida Special Elections were sobering - the Democrat in FL-06 outraised us TEN-TO-ONE

I'm not making a mountain out of a molehill here.

_President Trump 's entire legislative agenda comes to a SCREECHING HALT if this keeps happening._ We have the better ideas, we have the better candidates... but none of that matters if our message is drowned out by a wall of false and misleading Democrat attack ads.

We either rise to the occasion right now or we give up and let the Democrat Machine steamroll everything we've worked so hard for.

So that's why I'm doing something I've never done before.

I'm setting up an emergency one-million-dollar fundraising blitz between now and the end of the week. I'll need your help to get there. It's an ambitious goal but I have faith in this team. **This will help send badly needed reinforcements to the key races in Wisconsin AND fortify our defenses in other must-win races too.**

**[All I ask is that EVERYONE who recognizes the seriousness of Tuesday's elections pitches in SOMETHING!](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1d77dc9f6b5d4182b6e99e01d83f654a&_e=Q5oPQiNs-jFqxAsOhjeyY_IYuJYROTggifCMRmNYvUeJ5KXPvtfL7cU2bZcIv7_i5rbGxuKyTpKJH7N82VtYyvy7ZQmVFdHYFTugcDFm4xl9KFE4-zyO-O00FTOyEfx6B3cAergvAxwyPU5f2Okl9bOA6Tm2fKTrS6N49qaJYgihDFRuwGXqjdAAPvIe6AJ6rG8CABz3y0waGfUqQP2lvaSuVpY4kvWB8D5HW9ldGjVhNPtJG4l7bUIupksciKOgHDVHGaL4m6OFYi0NOCXSwfGPD-KbuUe3Tx1fZTs1lCKjIFWWqb1Csb4Yv5PnqPxd3ppbUmEwHqaGlFT9B7w39kXIXpCccw-fx5C0DBjYOnf3oYsnLsr0sJ9sZHDhXSx4wTsDPG2ulRUgzP8qN7KEig%3D%3D "All I ask is that EVERYONE who recognizes the seriousness of Tuesday’s elections pitches in SOMETHING!")**

name: Kerry McQuisten (Newsletter)
subject: You're invited to our event!
body:
| | | | |
# Tina Kotek has gone off the rails ...
# and you're invited to help us flip Oregon red!
---
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Thank you all for the outpouring of signups for the Oregon Conservative Caucus' new newsletter OREGON RISING. Issue #2 is scheduled for this week. My personal newsletter (the one you're reading right now) continues here as always. To sign up for the OCC newsletter, go here: [_Oregon Conservative Caucus._ ](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/kYZyM4LI77htDqFLjtVEqQ~~/AAAHURA~/bxYyfJDo7qTVAQ_swKBpgJBWkNk1pSjXxa-NpXylwKgstgBG-igGElU8RX7nmFHc_X2L2T2iBTPZNKkAURsqPZZUbPaeEJ-Amst7Oe-XOvQ0M6ZRkoNeQdkwzEsCVdc_jcJfaIKfuOV3BdnCa7Ym62htSGZ3kQVDgrC5d87L4eQqfgvSoI_mP_wKTFQeS63g)(Margaret in Newberg - I got your note in the mail, and you're signed up for both - no problem!)
Oregon is a mess. You can steal higher res versions of the above memes off my social media, so feel free. There isn't a single issue that Gov. Kotek reasons through properly. Her $140 **billion **budget is horrifying. She's fixated on repeatedly praising abortionists on social media, all the while tossing money at things like homelessness and human services. For a newer agency, it's shocking how much of our state budget OHA consumes and how many other areas it has its tentacles in. And... tossing more money at the homeless only serves to create a homeless industry in Oregon. Housing-first won't solve the problem, and never has. Tossing our tax dollars at our failed education system does nothing either. At this point, money doesn't improve performance; it only adds to administration. Did you see the proposed $2 **billion **transportation tax, tax, fee, fee, fee package? If all the Democrats show up to vote together, we can expect a 1% sales tax on vehicle purchases and another 20-cent increase in fuel tax - and more.
Our elected Republican state reps and senators have very few options left when it comes to fighting back. They can keep voting and speaking out. But we have to work back out of superminority status, and then we have to flip our state. State legislators can't "save" us, nor are they meant to. We have to do some of these things for ourselves.
Yes, it would be great to have clean voter rolls and stop Motor Voter. I'd personally love it. _But there's no possible way to be all and do all things. _That's why our nonprofit, Oregon Conservative Caucus, is focused on a _targeted _handful of things we CAN affect. In fact, we opened up ticket sales last night for our first annual event. All proceeds from those sales go toward efforts to register voters, educate, and GOTV. We’ll also start unveiling some of our policy briefs and move into advocating for and against specific issues this year. If you want to see what we've done already, just go look at the last newsletter linked below.
We are all volunteers in the OCC. There is _no grifting_. Our active membership is bigger than the ORP delegation to state central committee meetings - and yet we all get along with _no personal attacks or smear campaigns_.
We aren’t just an email list either - we’re _a real, boots-on-the-ground group_ of conservatives dedicated to flipping Oregon red.
[_You’re invited to come enjoy speakers, dinner, and see for yourselves what we’re all about._](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/kYZyM4LI77htDqFLjtVEqQ~~/AAAHURA~/bxYyfJDo7qTVAQ_swKBpgJBWkNk1pSjXxa-NpXylwKgstgBG-igGElU8RX7nmFHc_X2L2T2iBTPZNKkAURsqPZZUbPaeEJ-Amst7Oe-XOvQ0M6ZRkoNeQdkwzEsCVdc_jcJfaIKfuOV3BdnCa7Ym62htSGZ3kQVDgrC5d87L4eQqfgvSoI_mP_wKTFQeS63g)
Meanwhile, Solomon and I are working on a couple other big projects together. I'll announce one in my next newsletter and the other in a few months. We're also still busy working on some presidential-level policy, and if things go as well as I think they will, I'll have some DC trips, meetings and successes to tell you about this summer.
But right now, here's more info on our event:

clean_body: | | | | | Tina Kotek has gone off the rails ... and you're invited to help us flip Oregon red! | | | | | | | Thank you all for the outpouring of signups for the Oregon Conservative Caucus' new newsletter OREGON RISING. Issue #2 is scheduled for this week. My personal newsletter (the one you're reading right now) continues here as always. To sign up for the OCC newsletter, go here: in Newberg - I got your note in the mail, and you're signed up for both - no problem!) Oregon is a mess. You can steal higher res versions of the above memes off my social media, so feel free. There isn't a single issue that Gov. Kotek reasons through properly. Her $140 billion budget is horrifying. She's fixated on repeatedly praising abortionists on social media, all the while tossing money at things like homelessness and human services. For a newer agency, it's shocking how much of our state budget OHA consumes and how many other areas it has its tentacles in. And... tossing more money at the homeless only serves to create a homeless industry in Oregon. Housing-first won't solve the problem, and never has. Tossing our tax dollars at our failed education system does nothing either. At this point, money doesn't improve performance; it only adds to administration. Did you see the proposed $2 billion transportation tax, tax, fee, fee, fee package? If all the Democrats show up to vote together, we can expect a 1% sales tax on vehicle purchases and another 20-cent increase in fuel tax - and more. Our elected Republican state reps and senators have very few options left when it comes to fighting back. They can keep voting and speaking out. But we have to work back out of superminority status, and then we have to flip our state. State legislators can't "save" us, nor are they meant to. We have to do some of these things for ourselves. Yes, it would be great to have clean voter rolls and stop Motor Voter. I'd personally love it. But there's no possible way to be all and do all things. That's why our nonprofit, Oregon Conservative Caucus, is focused on a targeted handful of things we CAN affect. In fact, we opened up ticket sales last night for our first annual event. All proceeds from those sales go toward efforts to register voters, educate, and GOTV. We’ll also start unveiling some of our policy briefs and move into advocating for and against specific issues this year. If you want to see what we've done already, just go look at the last newsletter linked below. We are all volunteers in the OCC. There is no grifting. Our active membership is bigger than the ORP delegation to state central committee meetings - and yet we all get along with no personal attacks or smear campaigns. We aren’t just an email list either - we’re a real, boots-on-the-ground group of conservatives dedicated to flipping Oregon red. Meanwhile, Solomon and I are working on a couple other big projects together. I'll announce one in my next newsletter and the other in a few months. We're also still busy working on some presidential-level policy, and if things go as well as I think they will, I'll have some DC trips, meetings and successes to tell you about this summer. But right now, here's more info on our event: | | "LEARN ABOUT THE EVENT!" | ~ "Steve Yates" | "Ray Hacke" | Past Newsletters ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ At the ~ s ~ Again ~ ~ | | | | - | ~ | ---|---|--- | ~ "KerryMcQuisten.com" You received this email because you subscribed to our list. If a friend or family member subscribed for you and you don't wish to receive these newsletters, you can: ~~ at any time. | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. * Because here’s the truth: _Citizens United_ has [**corrupted our Democracy for 15 years! **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60467?t=5&akid=22976%2E4449941%2E-b2v5P)

* Republicans know they would never win another election without all the unlimited Dark Money _Citizens United_ allows them to spend. So they are [**dead set on blocking our efforts**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60467?t=7&akid=22976%2E4449941%2E-b2v5P) to do away with _Citizens United. _

* We launched a [**MASSIVE effort**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60467?t=8&akid=22976%2E4449941%2E-b2v5P) to help pass the Constitutional Amendment!

* If you all step up now and support our campaign to help our Democrats, [**we can crush Republicans in future elections and restore our democracy**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60467?t=9&akid=22976%2E4449941%2E-b2v5P) — a dream come true!

---
Hi, it's Vivek Ramaswamy.
---
**[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign - but first, I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/dr5CMbylkpk9WQYPVVyb5mUQzjl14MLndLZpFoljsW1YXT_n52xbjcb7wJvwCWDE-kY7o9aiPF3pwrP0ae6PCFggR_IlhKLDoboemehA3a1nCIMs7CO9Pq6crLINiv8pdtkrS9Pi06m3dpAKLSyrQ_rzHYMZNoTVoqy-RuaShZIbRH2DD5ayHJ-aQeQFW03JM5ntSOgfJ8XixsG52l2so06hu1_W7wOuH30aC9o9GC293QmF9YGOURaRsB6ji6BdUBkvYPyXcUquG6KUwSREBPHy8REqhIhwz_J964ymZ8n92zd9OsjHFgWvVu6p0hZQk7AGL24DhLKcrQT0j-wLxRmzwxhpnBbB1WEojm86Vt2u4Qkvm9R8VF7sHcOlKz53JuJ2gvoulMeNAISMpYwXC9eh1_CspdQkA3uIUI-WHFxGMPywXhMfVozcdx-szb708zmO2NiNoOc_bkCELu1qulxCiFt7qBSly89rzr29UBVROxZ50l2NWCEUxgtI291hP249KaQIX8kcgyjUDfjRoYzKgvLDl5agLzTgtJ5Ywf4m1XczUEG5cy_ehuTXsZdk1Q/6vXqu1xtWuv71UJ-UHxpy7uPV5iCFdtS/7 "In a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign – but first, I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment.")**

---
** WHY RUN NOW? **
---
President Trump winning re-election in November was not just another political victory - it was a seismic realignment for our country. He won every swing state. He improved his vote share of minorities and young voters. We won the House AND Senate. And heck, he even won the popular vote.

---
| [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/U-kzCDV_cDjR9FNd-eu68WVi8ps6NuqnfBUf47413ls_9PWJw1ihkCxN7yXVUF553bt-NGiSwcYUHMXEkXRvLB1GxT9thW-P34T1VfDgjzAoXZhGzdE0mhmCNnudGwmxHO8UWexcpMUuLbi0KCnEAanUJ2UQVhjTB-Rxdxs4IuBnJ8LDNafhJt8i3PoMzigpN9EWRQgewTRIxblyBY-2rjDp4-IdSWOv4rY4dBdPTYBB3grkAHc2dif0gEJ5fnbpyCuP_MRBGoIpGuegFdNh51Z-mMHX601bQTq5FkyHEKR9_Y7_lrKoLGDfUEt_6jHkGlumKJKN7vC7NBGgSp6Irfcs-v9LPN6ERzMCJVdFqmHrWY67a3icfo6fuJNYV3HSR_p3yns66UwLfQ8dbk2s3FEnzrTxCXj5zb91Ro6ok_3bYorSiiAQHoc5h5wcsg93elmhp2E1OHDLSDSETj3Mb27FWGZE-6Ree3HdPWZGpm1XrW88Qe9bMClWUX_S0olPSDwi5QT3bM5SQGlp7_QHXt0cUupB94DPWf1R1yGDOV2Hha8oz5w9aFQqtAMZkCufog/xh4IdnUBpaXpmjNZ9MA0GNK4t0xp-roX/7)
---
It was the honor of a lifetime to rally voters in battleground states, campaign on college campuses to turn out Gen-Z for Trump, and promote his America First vision at rally after rally.

---
| [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/8pc93ceapip7WwknZjqW2c2Gf3zV1jZmT0MIONWSPzaC4vGaDTYIsfuWm9vDrTr-g80RjMIPJXVInbTbQs1tugEYF0U7Kp1zXDgHBT39l0q-2bUYnCb-D2VsvNyxPYYemsOMFjjK2qH8z1aqMf6-bauis2sX2oQ1G12xrU9bdABwTa2R7pNvqbIhEQC0_hQvgTp1O7MLE81_PG3SjonZTezcmohJeTxfc7MhxBnWFRE486BwBgIV8VpupnzDd_95AQ1ozeOQXa0DW47g0qP4ATdnsuOkW6Q_V_dB_NRzHEyocoIbqv08W95KXO80ufsqB4pU6hOthDJEPzOBC4yFpOg8anV07QYJa1Vxwf5ohua2aJv-9ZYVTJYCZ0rl9VF-n2rIY-MCAKmvfBRjCCicj9Y3EKVUpjkQyKEmsOj4EbGg_M2CE5dZsf4EvJqEtfNLEsWYns1-1SYyuzF6C8WLadGTUPULfhN6YTIp-bn_6nCnWAdzOMGxtRV791052gYhwLt25xqFDCmKpxfz8ZVIFhHLaVf1TYQkr42ZdN6gyu2a6cQr4VDko5TbXhKoGaj3WA/1VhgjYNnILT1N8FxQUC5ouJxb4lPEZaE/7)
---
Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real, lasting change to the country we know and love. It's an opportunity to not just ticker around the edges of the Federal Government, but to upend it completely.

This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the GOLDEN AGE for America!

But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life. They're resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake - we can't afford to squander this historic opportunity. That's why President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT NOW!

---
** WHY OHIO? **
---
This one's easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State and graduated from St. Xavier - a Catholic high school in Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our two boys here. I've started multiple businesses in Ohio. I've also known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno.
---
| [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/kI9MwgtEHqtMer1vCses4mIRcB07RPLze2FugxpvfLzFq9vuvs7omO9hLMwYo3PZ7WuoZXdne75ZYunojyDiUPIGzaehGdDK5VvERgjeeZdzB3T9mg3crGrmhjBe3fuLli1G0Ie2uj9xU2JZQEo4zHy9_tv_l7tPBwHGp0b7m3rhI2Qu8C0_2nN7iazaVGqsRuR9A1LDmtON_sNEe6As_-vuq2ElwZkq_Qubo_AAGhCRhUxKER6KjfBF8av55Sjbpl3gE7jvFJVzksbvkAqDOYXRQBLrIrfHSKjtyWr0tQTyLKpv7qfiuhhbFyW2qL0sK88HTTrV0s4C9Jc83NxoQu9ZqgF5Q0pDsaivCXF0E3p_R0Anrbuasn0XnZN4ICojWMQoLoVvTnsYBA2iEWQ8t9yEIbio1LkyMnCE1A6XJRHKPoBqjeNZs8Gf-jUp8iRvB3juxnZqK_jNTFz-OB2dx2CtfPSP58uJz7LLHmzM9H2OoXGJeHo-FNyWaYrLokV6QqHD5SvPqXqEqqWlWJtA8mdtyfMjiGQjuV1C38Jkv7WavraVvMpr-jVdaTKMVBEzMg/oZ5yDJcdu6tNUs7SmMM3ZI8WTJxp2qNt/7)
---
The people here are honest, have steel in their spines, and embody the City on a Hill spirit that our country was founded upon. [As Governor, I'd be honored to represent them and the values they stand for.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/LtJHVyRdVg4YK-ASGA6QwJKvAZVEY0eV8MsJt6LfV830oygHEDcwL1fiCwHGul628-1akck1hnWXeUuurlu7ylbej7b-fGMTMNz0p_xxJnESgRM-Qi9O3nrhW-654OTpt16kLTMwytnrZdeXVqCvCCCVf42ulml5D9Mm0nr8lDfEHJVN7y7tGPINtPFkiCb7aEKrRjpamuhcr2GFVCq_M77BonM-mOLliKd6QF4o3375Rgy66gnUhw-RFUjEsyu9p2vJDFEhAI_DVWRoBnaGV3gdcZ9zU23Spib3Q7N7NsSW_8pwaEH2B-sSVDvn8VpVhdhjH9T5iZqnVitLTpW6kkzihMxYKRt0FNviG7qehZXNt5e3Pl2pjuyVtQdipTr9RpiNhPr9dobeDNVTdV96MFPBZAMV4YPWvgxPYWhZrIKXzwZdRXcKc2Q8zvZwazp5xVZHQwbaNVrdU2JSuDLhYrx-iSKGrzXYC2eMkvgResf121s/SQw6aFY85UiKGwBAuOfcYQgdekUxV_3M/7 "As Governor, I’d be honored to represent them and the values they stand for.")
---
| [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/uZXS6C6wDeeU7a93vs5GGsvGJblalb8xfdGadJGthy1eEdUuUQvb59wcrQ7CcQlYFw_HDh3z6GCa1X8eir0vBUHjH5JkAwnL1RBATdyDYTg4SnRg2Z3gA95T5JZbqeWwBwCgu3cFx2Fii0pu4PMX9oX5XgS0hIYVES3NvAMdgVxspoC99m8gpDiP_Xfi2x7aW7JHbv2pV0MGOBlDQVQ9Auo66WbI0Dn_zxivaKMZVkaE-3PALcwr0-TLpaS1iy5sBEgsN7oVM09xehgPr_VXjRLYiGgY-6mXcWmrBBz3tMNbAvfzlYHLRPR_v4dFGhvzgYScz0pP8er_fA2MHw5mO1cMVK8quK6xGMDeCZ2J5zUeOUpdADyif1guxuKTqhREZNigWGd5j0gZr3BkKIhbdBIYt2n25U5KltfbGmLXdTP2Tdooe_E5tOl_Jz_2OK3-BWYZMnacujy_FRo-OixUOz8e3Txh9U9KM1XTu_jXJx4QOu0lZQ127o7vDdzLCJhxQrjn5pTrj5SZUJCxd60huWAZUuMsy_6mwRM_ZI4eKtVVmbB68AXI_RN68AjERDT2Bw/2KgsfrVe9xCalqVu5YnJVXxgBu6Y7Uul/7)
---
** WHY GOVERNOR? **
---
Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level.

Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level.
---
| [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/1kO6TDauYadnhLvXz-ac0COaYwgQ4Zfuwhx3ivlzMKeL9SyCshpgBFvOu6RRilYGdbu0pMlPK1Za6_p9GglpGm3ErkZKQ5XgCGLxVaKVJ-I3mczWZZZDWwvDQHd9thB5iYTxdECB9wxkhpjmG1-2IXhD6RlrfoeiBhF8dlHP7hXhFGW6QlpIE4L5HG6WdSBmMwyxAmfQTSYGdbk7NssL-oej68l3wU58bPY1J7B8IrklEuHevInNY35rsqRyvVv1ifqhEUHPcEh6vOWA_RpHN4VvBM11F4TXncF-iucEL4uEKMkvKOc-Ww38Lx6ylOWEpR2nombXqoZJv1D19YuFHAr3bVw0pa4My6rmKEQ9OLqNXJJrKN8FTjr9m4W8tHm2VXUHVOEHXTXrj8OGKv57dvmFUEQ6Vl4YNFKDXsZxZUzcTgCT1yaWk_oZVZiEm1Ln7XH4gkWFfVmYt9zBeY7NsDgAqKMeRIo-NWPjCxhv2ahTiQKEkW7Ot9zxOQDsyXfhIwYszXkmxLnzNAYjppoitdPZrEie_d7faLA3uvGUhF2cSOoAMZNDQk2qQ0AaNSBGaw/Hf6o3ab-PDXGE_i9DDUy9vx5zoH1T9Co/7)
---
We saw up close and personal the failure of Democrat rule with Joe Biden in control of the Federal Government. We also see Democrat governors like Gavin Newsom and Kathy Hochul drive their states into ruin. On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the Deep State. True leadership can change everything.
---
| [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/2OjJdx-nvsyAAjdLDVH2i89E7WVC79K26V9k0YOdqsNDxpWcGeSWytmviWhtuV2CJ-ODu-WrM3lR9s3PW18jmgX_awUpNx5pl7TwUXIOEjZ8XqY9xGmoo1aODKZEG5VuIptAS6aHlPWizrBRQH7jucskogEH5at0elLSq5Q_S1N2Apzufvg0ynlenpDA3qgW9uI02VKECoJf5cQupWCy8X6wp6uR-IVUpnlhyW3mayET2wqBozSrGM5h8yEX6J8ZKBY1LseZugRIqgFye7eR9PPulBDIAsnQJJyvDtgcr-v0_cOecWebV7Lt4jLJbwe8SCnMmkM3LaTeKLUxGJNUUr4kfayPFf2F4CVjd1MWraTwxDVFjsFvmMUWTSLNSZnJ1PEaGNERwgHULaTynJtGCOnRtg-fhoP6qJW7JpdPjZcgS2JYa7l5--ZvKjw4suk-Hay03MObNi2R3LUpeDC5m_sL2K7sa7Sr-D_xwTdIr4YOuspw7pFVPtKscsYyJVxsZEY-69eJ3SmCEhfvly9bK5sjJoklvUwjvDV8na0JE5rrzK5gYvig7Fdskw5SmOGp2Q/0wKrIpvUhAFSKUjLz07tKPsl8VEyU2a-/7)

That's why I'm running for Governor in my home state of Ohio. I will partner with President Trump - just like I did on the campaign trail - at the state level to Make America Great Again. clean_body: Now’s your chance to reactivate, Peter. | | | | Peter... I'm not sure how to say this... But I think it's time for us to face the truth... Your membership has expired, and now I 'm lost. We had some great times, standing our House GOP Majority. But now, it seems like you've moved on. | | | | "Generic Button" I remember the good times when you were a crucial part of our team. Your support meant everything to us, and we were unstoppable together. But now, everything is at risk. | | | "Generic Button" Look, I'm not here to beg you to come back. But I want you to know that we're not the same without you. Our efforts are diminished, and our progress is stalled. | | | | "Generic Button" "If you're willing to try again, I'm here to give it another shot. Renew your membership, and let's see if we can rekindle what we once had. " Renewing your membership would mean the world to me, Peter, can I count on you to take this step and make a difference? | | | "Generic Button" Yours truly, Dan, Membership Services | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: Trump running for a third term?
body:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105326843/537984137/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGNiNDI5NDQtMmYxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vj_jcXbe61jL5J3ODmiui-301QCEOe6k1EksilVzB7Q=) | Peter, This is really scary... **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105326844/537984138/1143416913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGNiNDI5NDQtMmYxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vj_jcXbe61jL5J3ODmiui-301QCEOe6k1EksilVzB7Q=&emci=bb39a893-9c11-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=dcb42944-2f13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6455652)** Here’s the problem. Trump is trying to circumvent the Constitution and install himself as a dictator. It’s anti-democratic, plain and simple. [_**We need your help to speak out and push back. Please add your name to our petition to tell Donald Trump we won’t stand for this!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105326847/537984141/1143416913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGNiNDI5NDQtMmYxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vj_jcXbe61jL5J3ODmiui-301QCEOe6k1EksilVzB7Q=&emci=bb39a893-9c11-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=dcb42944-2f13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6455652) [SIGN THE PETITION »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105326848/537984142/1143416913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGNiNDI5NDQtMmYxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vj_jcXbe61jL5J3ODmiui-301QCEOe6k1EksilVzB7Q=&emci=bb39a893-9c11-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=dcb42944-2f13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6455652) \- Team Harder

name: Pat Herrity
subject: Herrity Headlines - 04/06/2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Peter,

It felt great to be back on the campaign trail this week following my heart surgery and a March that was marked by tremendous progress in our campaign.

Over the last several weeks, I've been overwhelmed by the support flowing in from across the Commonwealth - from volunteers eager to help secure victory in November, to the generosity of donors large and small, to new supporters in every corner of Virginia committing to cast their ballots for me in the Lt. Governor’s race.

With March behind us, we've finished the hard work to ensure that my name will be listed on the ballot, we have a great start on raising the resources we will need to win in November and we have made significant strides in putting in place a statewide team to get voters out beginning with the early vote in September.
---
|
---
| |
---
After a short break for heart surgery, I was energized to be back on the campaign trail this week. This race is critically important to Virginia's future. I was glad for the opportunity to address a group of fired up supporters from Prince William County this week who understand how important it is to hold our statewide elected offices this year.
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---

It was a pleasure to join the Culpeper Republican Committee at their annual Reagan dinner, and hear from Lieutenant Governor Winsome Earle-Sears on her campaign for Governor - her first public speech after officially becoming our nominee!
---
| |
---
As the daughter of Jamaican immigrants, a marine, and the first Black woman to hold statewide elected office in Virginia, Lieutenant Governor Sears’ story is a great example of the opportunities that Republicans strive to provide to Virginians and all Americans. I look forward to working with her to keep Virginia moving in a commonsense, conservative direction.
---
|
---
| |
---
I wrapped up this week at home in Fairfax at the Korean Community Service Center's 51st Annual Gala. One of the secrets to Republican success in Fairfax County involves making and building relationships with groups and organizations that share our commonsense, conservative ideals. I have been working with the Korean community in Fairfax since I was first elected, a tradition I will continue as Lt. Governor.
---
|
---
|
Over the last several weeks, the campaign has reached huge milestones on the path to winning in November.

---
| |
---
On March 17th, the first day that filing opened, our campaign submitted more than 15,000 signatures of registered voters petitioning that my name be listed on the ballot this year. Thanks to the hard work of supporters like yourself, we blew past the required number of 10,000 and were the first Republican to file signatures for Lieutenant Governor. As the first to file, we're also guaranteed to be listed first on the ballot if there's a primary election.
---
|
---
| |
---
On April 1st, we announced that the campaign has raised over a half million dollars from supporters around the Commonwealth in the first quarter of 2025. I'm truly thankful for the outpouring of support. **This is the largest first quarter fundraising total ever raised by a Republican running for the office of Lieutenant Governor**. Thank you!!!
---
|
---
| As we promised, once we got past petition signatures we will get to work on campaigning. We had door knocking and phone call events this weekend and we will be ramping up our efforts. If you haven't had a chance to sign up and get involved, [we'd love to have your help](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=7564e6966b&e=a1ea0f9c99)!

---
| [Get Involved](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=1c55745663&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Get Involved")
---
| Thank you for your continued support, and I'll see you on the campaign trail soon!

Respectfully,
---
| |
---
---
|
---
**Pat Herrity**
Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor

---
|
---
| [Make a Contribution](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=fcaf0c3c57&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Make a Contribution")
---
|
---
| If you received this email as a forward, I'd love for you sign up for Herrity Headlines to receive these updates every week, directly from my campaign:
---
| [Sign Up for Herrity's Headline](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=9cc4b39283&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Sign Up for Herrity's Headline")
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=b1164bc993&e=a1ea0f9c99)
---

---

---

Friends of Pat HerrityP.O Box 2863Springfield, VA 22152

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417&e=a1ea0f9c99&c=e9d19f1d77) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417&t=b&e=a1ea0f9c99&c=e9d19f1d77)

Raffle tickets are just $100 and support our work protecting Oregon’s natural legacy, electing pro-environment candidates to office, and holding our elected leaders accountable. Even if you’re not planning to attend the event, you can enter to win!

[**Buy Raffle Tickets!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105327169/537985389/599179923?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhZjY5MDdjLTMyMTMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rPqDS7l2Rr3SLhl0FlNjklVponjLmBf-d5s5jdQ29yM=&emci=c7162f82-1d13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7af6907c-3213-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)

| | What could be more magical than sleeping under the stars in the majestic Grand Canyon? This experience includes a 3-night stay at Clear Sky Resort Grand Canyon in a Sky Dome for 2. Enjoy stargazing with telescopes, nightly s’mores and live music! Just 20 minutes from the south entrance to Grand Canyon Park, you’ll experience epic stargazing and witness spectacular sunrises and sunsets. Enjoy a stay in a Grand Canyon Sky Dome with a queen bed, large panoramic view window, A/C, a modern private bathroom with luxurious rain shower, and wifi. It’s an authentic glamping experience offering stunningly beautiful views of the Grand Canyon. Don’t miss your chance to win this once in a lifetime experience!
---
[**Click here for all of the details and to enter!******](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105327170/537985390/599179923?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhZjY5MDdjLTMyMTMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rPqDS7l2Rr3SLhl0FlNjklVponjLmBf-d5s5jdQ29yM=&emci=c7162f82-1d13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7af6907c-3213-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)

**About OLCV’s Annual Celebration for the Environment** For over 25 years this event has brought together hundreds of OLCV supporters, colleagues, environmental advocates, sustainable business leaders, and elected officials for one unforgettable night. Featuring inspiring speakers, dinner and drinks, auction and paddle raise, and great company – all to benefit OLCV’s important work protecting our climate and environment. For more information and to purchase tickets, [click here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105327171/537985391/-1181493100?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhZjY5MDdjLTMyMTMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rPqDS7l2Rr3SLhl0FlNjklVponjLmBf-d5s5jdQ29yM=&emci=c7162f82-1d13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7af6907c-3213-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230). clean_body: Look inside for more information on how to enter to win a once in a lifetime Grand Canyon glamping experience in an eco dome for 2 guests for 3 nights.| | | "2025 Annual Celebration for the Environment Raffle: A Grand Canyon Glamping" Dear Peter, is coming up on May 2nd and we’re giving away a glamping trip in the Grand Canyon! Raffle tickets are just $100 and support our work protecting Oregon’s natural legacy, electing pro-environment candidates to office, and holding our elected leaders accountable. Even if you’re not planning to attend the event, you can enter to win! | | What could be more magical than sleeping under the stars in the majestic Grand Canyon? This experience includes a 3-night stay at Clear Sky Resort Grand Canyon in a Sky Dome for 2. Enjoy stargazing with telescopes, nightly s’mores and live music! Just 20 minutes from the south entrance to Grand Canyon Park, you’ll experience epic stargazing and witness spectacular sunrises and sunsets. Enjoy a stay in a Grand Canyon Sky Dome with a queen bed, large panoramic view window, A/C, a modern private bathroom with luxurious rain shower, and wifi. It’s an authentic glamping experience offering stunningly beautiful views of the Grand Canyon. Don’t miss your chance to win this once in a lifetime experience! About OLCV’s Annual Celebration for the Environment For over 25 years this event has brought together hundreds of OLCV supporters, colleagues, environmental advocates, sustainable business leaders, and elected officials for one unforgettable night. Featuring inspiring speakers, dinner and drinks, auction and paddle raise, and great company – all to benefit OLCV’s important work protecting our climate and environment. For more information and to purchase tickets, . For questions about the raffle or OLCV’s Annual Celebration, mailto:april@olcv.org "april@olcv.org", OLCV Development Director April Christenson. Sincerely, April Christenson (she/her) OLCV Development Director Thank you to our generous sponsors! | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Stop Religious Discrimination Against Faith-Based Charter SchoolsOklahoma actively discriminates against religion in its charter-school program. St. Isidore of Seville Catholic Virtual School wants to be part of Oklahoma’s charter-school program, and they’re just as qualified as any non-religious charter school. But because St. Isidore is religious, Oklahoma’s Attorney General sued to force the Board to cancel St. Isidore’s contract after the Board accepted its application. And the Oklahoma Supreme Court sided with the Attorney General.That’s why we’re proud to defend the Board all the way to the Supreme Court. We’ll argue Oklahoma Statewide Charter School Board v. Drummond this spring. We’re standing up to religious discrimination in Oklahoma to protect religious freedom in states across the country.And we’d love for you to join us. Give Now Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

Peter,
Governor Walz was on CNN this morning, and he made one thing abundantly clear: People across the country are rising up and asking leaders to do something.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105327759/537987151/363591793?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODVjYWVlNC0zNTEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PPEaTcpEmG-074Q2rOl3uf1W5uc8kzV5xx8PUM4vC7M=)
Americans from coast to coast are gathering at rallies to speak out against the extreme policies of Donald Trump and Elon Musk. Democrats need to answer the call.
That’s why Governor Walz is hitting the road to host town halls in communities Republicans have neglected. He’s showing up, listening, and making sure the voices of everyday Americans are heard.
**But, Peter, this critical work isn’t possible without support from people like you. **

name: Deb Haaland
subject: We still have a long way to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
_Aloha friend, this is Mazie. Please read this message from my friend Deb Haaland, who just launched her campaign for Governor of New Mexico._ Peter, it’s Deb Haaland. I’m running for Governor of New Mexico. Mazie said I could reach out to you. As a 35th-generation New Mexican, I know firsthand the struggles that New Mexicans face. I understand what it's like to be a single mother, having to decide between rent and groceries, struggling to keep a roof over your head. I’m running to make life easier for our families and the future brighter for our kids. My campaign is about lowering costs, making rent and housing affordable, strengthening our schools, and preventing crime so that you feel safe raising a family here. This is the future we all want and deserve for our beautiful state. **The solutions are there if we are fierce enough to choose them.** But we know we’ll have to build a campaign strong enough to get the future we deserve. **That’s why our campaign is working hard to raise $150,000 online before our _first_ public fundraising deadline on April 7.** If we reach our goal, we’ll have the early resources we need to reach voters across New Mexico with our message and show those trying to flip New Mexico red that the people are on our side. **[We’ve come so far since launching our campaign, but we still have a long way to go to hit our goal. I’m hoping I can count on your support. Will you split $10 between my campaign and Mazie today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105327783/537987206/-2103642439?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250406_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmRiZDlkNi0zNTEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoVmMqM60yOqTjFMraCoNWA5GWHv9Ncd_qY7jnzMxXU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mazie Hirono and Deb Haaland will go through immediately:_ | | **[CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105327784/537987207/-2103642439?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250406_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmRiZDlkNi0zNTEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoVmMqM60yOqTjFMraCoNWA5GWHv9Ncd_qY7jnzMxXU=)**

name: Schiff HQ
subject: Adam wants to hear from you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Your input will help Adam better understand the issues that matter most to you, your family, and your community.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8448%2E5257348%2E0p03Qi)
Every voice matters, Derek — including yours.
That’s why every time Adam meets with voters, he always asks how he can help deliver for them and their families.
While he wishes he could meet every member of this team in person, emails like this are the next best way to keep you updated on Adam’s work in the Senate and ensure he understands the issues that matter most to you.
**[If you have a moment, please fill out Adam’s Priorities Survey and share your thoughts. Your responses will help shape his work in Congress to make progress for families like yours.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202504-prioritiessurvey.5sK2H0&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250406_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8448%2E5257348%2E0p03Qi)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202504-prioritiessurvey.5sK2H0&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250406_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8448%2E5257348%2E0p03Qi)
---
Things are moving fast, Derek. We just wrapped up our first quarterly fundraising deadline since Adam was sworn in as a Senator, and the chaos coming out of the White House is growing by the day.
Adam has been working tirelessly to hold the current administration accountable and defend the rule of law against people like Donald Trump and Elon Musk who are chipping away at it every single day.
**But in the midst of everything happening in Washington, Adam wants to make sure that he doesn’t lose sight of what matters most — you.**
Adam refused to accept corporate PAC money while running for Senate because he wanted his campaign to be powered by everyday folks like you. And that doesn’t mean treating you as a resource for money.
**It means valuing you as a partner in all the important work he’s doing to deliver for California.**
**[Your input will help Adam better understand the issues that matter most to you, your family, and your community. So please, Derek, fill out our Priorities Survey to ensure Adam can address your top priorities.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202504-prioritiessurvey.5sK2H0&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250406_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=8448%2E5257348%2E0p03Qi)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202504-prioritiessurvey.5sK2H0&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250406_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=8448%2E5257348%2E0p03Qi)
---
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts with us!
— Team Schiff
| | [DONATE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5243?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250406_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=8448%2E5257348%2E0p03Qi)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3b1e52a6-d6e4-4a17-a79b-4ea73b5d6aaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There is a trend on X that I have noticed getting popular whenever a right-wing account brings up the obscene veneration of George Floyd in 2020. It goes something like: "Wow, conservatives are so obsessed. It was not nothing like that! Get over it!"
A recent example of this comes from **[@ IrishPatri0t responding to @ captivedreamer7](https://substack.com/redirect/849121a1-c77a-4994-9889-501b519fc924?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , a pro-MAGA account who posted, "Imagine trying to explain what George Floyd did during his life to deserve a gold plated casket and a quasi-state level funeral."
"It's been 5 years bro get a new fucking hobby," the Irishman replied. His quip gained almost 200,000 likes and was viewed over 6 million times.
"It's been 5 years man. Let it go. It's gonna be ok," was another reply to Mr. Dreamer that got 3.4 thousand likes.
[Subscribe to Julio](https://substack.com/redirect/e7274e0f-6d4d-40df-ba34-f41b03ce9c0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
A quote **[post of a Floyd meme said,](https://substack.com/redirect/911079ef-5638-428b-a621-4b05b372bab3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "White Americans obsession with George Floyd will be studied." that post got 163k likes.
It's a cycle I've seen play out more than once. And it's one that shows how the Black Lives Matter movement is far from the powerhouse it was five years ago. The BLM movement is one that I'm all too familiar with, as while a majority of people in early 2020 barely left their house, I was traveling all over the country documenting BLM riots.
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Presented By Health Science Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/8b7f925f-4614-42fc-90f7-f30a2359b933?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Elon takes his REVENGE on the FDA
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8b7f925f-4614-42fc-90f7-f30a2359b933?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,

In 2023, Biden's FDA _**rejected**_ Elon Musk's application to start human trials on his life-changing Neurolink project...

But now in 2025, the tables have turned. He and his DOGE team are now targeting waste and fraud inside the FDA and the top brass is TERRIFIED.

He'll likely gain access to everything he needs to reveal the **[FDA's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/8b7f925f-4614-42fc-90f7-f30a2359b933?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.

It involves a hushed-up alliance with Big Pharma, as well as hundreds-of-billions in profits. And DOGE is on the verge of bringing the entire house of cards crashing to the ground.

But liberals and Big Pharma won't let **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/8b7f925f-4614-42fc-90f7-f30a2359b933?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **be revealed without a fight, which is exactly why we're not waiting around...

We're exposing everything TODAY in **[this damning video](https://substack.com/redirect/8b7f925f-4614-42fc-90f7-f30a2359b933?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8b7f925f-4614-42fc-90f7-f30a2359b933?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. The FDA and Big Pharma have managed to keep **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/8b7f925f-4614-42fc-90f7-f30a2359b933?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** secret for decades... So there's no telling how long they'll allow **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/8b7f925f-4614-42fc-90f7-f30a2359b933?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to circulate openly on the internet. Watch it now while it's still available.
* * *
_**(Continued)**_
At the time, I did not fully appreciate that deciding to be one of the few reporters willing to show the true nature of BLM was extremely unpopular. After the Floyd incident in Minneapolis, Pew Research found BLM had an almost 70% approval rating. Black squares covered Instagram users' timelines. Random big-name companies put out statements to assure consumers they were not racist. Statues and murals were erected. Millions of dollars were donated to BLM causes.
It became an out-of-control monster that pressured people to support it or else you're racist, even while rioters used any excuse to rampage through the streets.
It's because of the high-intensity violence, and the low-intensity chaos that stemmed from the movement, along with the financial scandals that followed, people shook off the rose-colored glasses. When**[Pew redid the poll in 2023,](https://substack.com/redirect/ac29d434-2489-4b85-bdce-81fe668793c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** support of BLM had fallen to almost 50%.
The true nature of the BLM movement was of no surprise to me. I had spent much of that year watching and listening to protests and they all had the same "the ends justifies the means" attitude. They believed they could do anything in retaliation to anything because of what happened to the likes of George Floyd.
Many true believers of the movement knew Floyd was not someone to worship, much less worth burning down whole neighborhoods. This is why their responses to people pointing out the ridiculousness is not of extreme indignation. Their response defaults to, "Hey, let's forget what happened and move on."
Sure it might be layered under that annoying, ironic cynicism, but it's all they have. They truly can't defend how things played out in 2020, like how the more "martyrs" they tried to foist upon the public, the more insane the cases got.
[Subscribe to Julio](https://substack.com/redirect/e7274e0f-6d4d-40df-ba34-f41b03ce9c0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Jacob Blake is a prime example. If that name doesn't sound familiar, it's probably because Kyle Rittenhouse stole the spotlight a few days later (Kyle did nothing wrong.) Blake was the black man who was shot in the back seven times by a Kenosha police officer. Many people thought he was killed. It was caught on video and those few seconds was all it took to ignite a literal firestorm for that Midwest town.
What people did not know at the time was that Blake was armed with a knife, was in the process of kidnapping two children from their mother, and had actively resisted all attempts by the officers to subdue him prior to the shooting. There was also an active warrant for his arrest, something the officers found out while responding to the call made by the mother.
As if that couldn't be top, there's the lesser-known case of Walter Wallace. Philadelphia police shot and killed Wallace, a black man, in October 2020 because he ran towards officers with a knife. He refused to stop or drop the knife. It was all caught on video. But that didn't matter. Philadelphia had two nights of riots afterwards because people were conditioned at that point to lash out no matter what. That was the environment BLM repeatedly fostered.
The George Floyd/BLM chaos was truly devastating for our nation. The effects are being felt today. These days, it does not take a controversial police action to spark unrest. This past weekend, mobs of mostly black teens caused chaos in Chicago, at a mall in northern Virginia, and attacked New York City police in Queens.
No serious person wants to take credit for pushing idiotic ideas like defunding the police and DEI programs. The BLM movement did not make black people's lives better. If anything their goals have only made the quality of life worse.
This, of course, doesn't apply to the more radical factions of the far-left. There are still "people's" organizations who not only remember the BLM riots, they view them as a victory. And for 2020, it was.
If I had been a foot soldier in those battles, whether in the streets or online, I would want people to forget it too.
* * *
**Writer 's Bio:**
Julio Rosas is the national correspondent for Blaze Media. For over 6 years, he has been on the ground reporting at chaotic scenes around the United States and the world. Whenever there is unrest, Julio is there to report the true story.

clean_body: The BLM movement did not make black people's lives better. If anything their goals have only made the quality of life worse. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? The BLM movement did not make black people's lives better. If anything their goals have only made the quality of life worse. Apr 6 | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- There is a trend on X that I have noticed getting popular whenever a right-wing account brings up the obscene veneration of George Floyd in 2020. It goes something like: "Wow, conservatives are so obsessed. It was not nothing like that! Get over it!" A recent example of this comes from , a pro-MAGA account who posted, "Imagine trying to explain what George Floyd did during his life to deserve a gold plated casket and a quasi-state level funeral." "It's been 5 years bro get a new fucking hobby," the Irishman replied. His quip gained almost 200,000 likes and was viewed over 6 million times. "It's been 5 years man. Let it go. It's gonna be ok," was another reply to Mr. Dreamer that got 3.4 thousand likes. A quote "White Americans obsession with George Floyd will be studied." that post got 163k likes. It's a cycle I've seen play out more than once. And it's one that shows how the Black Lives Matter movement is far from the powerhouse it was five years ago. The BLM movement is one that I'm all too familiar with, as while a majority of people in early 2020 barely left their house, I was traveling all over the country documenting BLM riots. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below) Elon takes his REVENGE on the FDA | | ---|---|--- Dear Reader, In 2023, Biden's FDA rejected Elon Musk's application to start human trials on his life-changing Neurolink project... But now in 2025, the tables have turned. He and his DOGE team are now targeting waste and fraud inside the FDA and the top brass is TERRIFIED. He'll likely gain access to everything he needs to reveal the . It involves a hushed-up alliance with Big Pharma, as well as hundreds-of-billions in profits. And DOGE is on the verge of bringing the entire house of cards crashing to the ground. But liberals and Big Pharma won't let be revealed without a fight, which is exactly why we're not waiting around... We're exposing everything TODAY in . P.S. The FDA and Big Pharma have managed to keep secret for decades... So there's no telling how long they'll allow to circulate openly on the internet. Watch it now while it's still available. (Continued) At the time, I did not fully appreciate that deciding to be one of the few reporters willing to show the true nature of BLM was extremely unpopular. After the Floyd incident in Minneapolis, Pew Research found BLM had an almost 70% approval rating. Black squares covered Instagram users' timelines. Random big-name companies put out statements to assure consumers they were not racist. Statues and murals were erected. Millions of dollars were donated to BLM causes. It became an out-of-control monster that pressured people to support it or else you're racist, even while rioters used any excuse to rampage through the streets. It's because of the high-intensity violence, and the low-intensity chaos that stemmed from the movement, along with the financial scandals that followed, people shook off the rose-colored glasses. When support of BLM had fallen to almost 50%. The true nature of the BLM movement was of no surprise to me. I had spent much of that year watching and listening to protests and they all had the same "the ends justifies the means" attitude. They believed they could do anything in retaliation to anything because of what happened to the likes of George Floyd. Many true believers of the movement knew Floyd was not someone to worship, much less worth burning down whole neighborhoods. This is why their responses to people pointing out the ridiculousness is not of extreme indignation. Their response defaults to, "Hey, let's forget what happened and move on." Sure it might be layered under that annoying, ironic cynicism, but it's all they have. They truly can't defend how things played out in 2020, like how the more "martyrs" they tried to foist upon the public, the more insane the cases got. Jacob Blake is a prime example. If that name doesn't sound familiar, it's probably because Kyle Rittenhouse stole the spotlight a few days later (Kyle did nothing wrong.) Blake was the black man who was shot in the back seven times by a Kenosha police officer. Many people thought he was killed. It was caught on video and those few seconds was all it took to ignite a literal firestorm for that Midwest town. What people did not know at the time was that Blake was armed with a knife, was in the process of kidnapping two children from their mother, and had actively resisted all attempts by the officers to subdue him prior to the shooting. There was also an active warrant for his arrest, something the officers found out while responding to the call made by the mother. As if that couldn't be top, there's the lesser-known case of Walter Wallace. Philadelphia police shot and killed Wallace, a black man, in October 2020 because he ran towards officers with a knife. He refused to stop or drop the knife. It was all caught on video. But that didn't matter. Philadelphia had two nights of riots afterwards because people were conditioned at that point to lash out no matter what. That was the environment BLM repeatedly fostered. The George Floyd/BLM chaos was truly devastating for our nation. The effects are being felt today. These days, it does not take a controversial police action to spark unrest. This past weekend, mobs of mostly black teens caused chaos in Chicago, at a mall in northern Virginia, and attacked New York City police in Queens. No serious person wants to take credit for pushing idiotic ideas like defunding the police and DEI programs. The BLM movement did not make black people's lives better. If anything their goals have only made the quality of life worse. This, of course, doesn't apply to the more radical factions of the far-left. There are still "people's" organizations who not only remember the BLM riots, they view them as a victory. And for 2020, it was. If I had been a foot soldier in those battles, whether in the streets or online, I would want people to forget it too. Writer 's Bio: Julio Rosas is the national correspondent for Blaze Media. For over 6 years, he has been on the ground reporting at chaotic scenes around the United States and the world. Whenever there is unrest, Julio is there to report the true story. Fiery But Mostly Peaceful: The 2020 Riots and the Gaslighting of America** And subscribe to Julio's substack: | ---|--- | A guest post by| Reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media. Subscribe to my newsletter for original content as I travel the United States and beyond. You're currently a free subscriber to . name: Andie Levien (via Democrats.org)
subject: Breaking: Democrats File Lawsuit to Block Trump’s Illegal Voter Suppression Executive Order →
body:
Here’s what you need to know:
---
**_Breaking: Democratic Committees, Leaders Schumer and Jeffries File Lawsuit to Block Trump’s Illegal Voter Suppression Executive Order_** Derek, I’m Andie, the DNC’s General Counsel — which means it’s my job to oversee all legal issues related to the Party’s work. This means that in addition to helping elect Democrats up and down the ballot, I’m in charge of holding Republicans accountable to the Constitution. Trump recently signed an executive order that attempts to suppress voters, upend voter registration systems, stop states from counting eligible mail ballots, and withhold federal funding from dozens of states in the process. Democrats have one message for him: **We’ll see you in court.** The DNC, along with other Democratic committees and key Democratic leaders, has filed a lawsuit against President Trump, DOGE, and other departments within the Trump administration to block Trump’s unconstitutional order. Trump’s order not only violates multiple federal laws but also attacks the right to vote by mail and makes it harder for married women who have changed their names and military members to have their votes count. The order also allows DOGE to access sensitive personal information and makes it harder for states to run their own free and fair elections. It's anti-American, and Democrats are using every tool at our disposal — _including taking Trump to court_ — to stop this power-grab that undermines our democracy. Thank you again for your support as we fight back against Trump to protect our democracy. I’ll keep you posted. Andie Andrea Levien
General Counsel
Democratic National Committee **Your support helps us continue to build a strong Democratic Party that can protect voters, fight back against Trump’s illegal plans, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight for our democracy.** [**If this work is important to you, too, we hope you’ll consider chipping in $3 to help fund it:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250406_3133_fr&refcode2=3146_22930333_Ajl8fS&akid=3146%2E22930333%2EAjl8fS) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250406_3133_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3146_22930333_Ajl8fS&akid=3146%2E22930333%2EAjl8fS)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
