Like many Americans, I'm sure you're all too aware of the damage that has been done to our country by policies implemented in the name of "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion" or "DEI."

Race grifters and hustlers make _millions_ perpetuating DEI lies, including...

* America is a nation built on slavery, not freedom.
* All racial disparities are indisputable evidence of systemic racism--and if you question this conclusion, you must be a racist.
* Students in K-12 schools can be divided into oppressors and oppressed based on their skin color.

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Hillsdale College, where I am president, is engaged in a nationwide fight on the battlefield of education to save young Americans from this anti-American agenda.

Since our founding in 1844, we have offered "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."

To do this work well, we need a clear understanding of **what informed Americans like you think about DEI and how best to fight it.**

So please share your views by completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations.

**We remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities have rejected their founding statements and embraced radical and dangerous ideologies.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/rQ17JywLX_PnE2lpxjaP818fgUP4KXQmK0SpBUdmpkB84lI0_KC35QoU38pC3R0u-mX-nwF1fXbiTqRshO5yu9iI1NWuQR6yzjDPqTbOBu8Y1ptPLaZwc9iaJ1TkuGg6lKI5E8k5vEFuvRBBd5GnxKwN5QCFImRUHBJ6HzIPyK1iNNWMt1RJYAwFsokTyjG5xfmjEagSKaSf20Cr5XyTGosU3lujE_fldqoLk2sZu5MtqyxW1h1jb_1spv2eTzIqrHq4UHNvUDnKyBMh_Ucu3ivX6xEe1q7bzLjwBpIoIwFWW1eSEg55QvpAnEpYvVS4olGDZMsbVy7_o_JrAqMO-Ark8gaGretvP4I62bpJx1dTgqYdja8fRr7eET0WQt4mNPqPuh-LxqPpHjI6t6vGzVL1Qo3OmCmmjmm2bWOn4Ui_tOuoXGDuoQ/U3ScPFTfVBeQ9RTyxqISRPLtdYUeIf94/7)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Please fill out your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. Your answers will help us to defend excellence and merit against the tyranny of DEI. Today, DEI affects almost every aspect of American life. This endangers lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

You can take your survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few moments of your time.

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/uEa6_fbviX6VFlw6h9KiWmzkIiPXrG_d_eUY7JGfRllR-l3MAcqQo2xM40uZsSnv4dGXe5TKp-i79JlyPqtc79RYyve4_CGQztzhmcE6ZBnIekHgcXwXm0p_dJpDKYaw6HbK61JwwVtRjPAdCsPYrWWaAikoXoOf8-JF9X8yoKp97ftewdpmC1-Q2OcwP0ArsZvkOm768i40G0aqitWtLNPKdVN5Ll1hSff4IfBb1sx2kjgYSkADCMccxYy0_4OnrhuPmr8UMARFKg28lIX3pX5_0XmcdxYCWGYpYJKss-Y_1flWCJzcSklP-9I7wMqby_O8l_UHE4hGUtoUTTm85DbwvYdnd27cYQbXYAiJ5Ca1M0q69czPfQjCWYUxheh29it9QbNA986NMPuCY0LhEDhJIdqmEH-6vJm0IddEjnr47OiBiqzF2Q/hINNDuPwZ7lR5OXQ3MZKxpI8yOZTB3Cj/7)

Thank you!

body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

_Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/H470mxFolD9Jk8P70COF91168YJRO9f1gGobK-3sLO-2bVDVvrWfsB4kYbCMmrd6elpkFYmPf6VmJOC76mfzYJj_73hOkvm3Vr0AuuRHPuq891OTcpA_psiO5exV2Rktds_oY-dUcaHiwXxuuJipQL9BrAg_hocYohfXMqACKS_oPbiRuF170V3d/0kvdYOevYHUGWugs-ziQ9wkm2KQJsvK0/7)_
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/Yhfue3L8Bi_VneGirm0fMInfLPdamjAXhXLJdnke9OIgDqjChHHHwbnQRB1A8hF9o2OFMHwu_v0YHELAYX1W_CHfCPiJRSAd4nRK57ZBCif2coSxF0qOqhAiMimjbBzt1daM-bNm1-FcEap4ZqOqQ5Nca1FZ5rzBuuTquanbHtb4IzZN-BtoNjqz9wIwHrDvvlMOexabJ2CL4S8_n41HC_KhSjA9ky0wVo-afSWo6GE0zR_ys2Tsl3mMDrvvwy2gvTCbK7aVds2fMiSNTarcpY7uJaI6qJ1rbmCP3oY0mjQ2xQwdzZSnfOX9Kzpl3qWd62Zi6wwg9O2QUazOp3UX-_O_VIYzhDGGLHdy_UtQNnmmRbHOs1yUiNeDoDiAPCdv5qWvFWG7893Vjw80eJzgmkKK2uH881zmbEzjEH-FtGqZn3hHB83nZRCwspcF2mugxC2gY1UAw8rII-L39g/09XaskjigAOu9kdKq9T87dyYfQwItwGF/7) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/HB94MwkQLDoqNyuDUSFC67X9lfoLyOAWnv6mK7eCEHuNngBmQotYJ2ps1huM5tXR3RnMeA72FUaNtSjXvm3NiLQRh8kTNfoUjWyRhAAi_quC9i1lCe1jVPoMeGBEJEEA9J48_GpdaFCGJ1CYeDw55DiIBYm-bXf0tfgyaCpjrMcXx4i9H-Y_EqPXkolX8npmbck9nyXRe1if7pGiCC_rJNE4jzmWiicgsHgIiE7tHQIQejZtNjCdIQdh_wv74_UiNd_RnLZV99WfIW4iFegf_b5IqGXejzmOFV5359Hd0U6BU8mfmq7BBM9vxr38sObAQrYJ0bTSSNumZklFkN9G47w4YkQY5lbHdP1Dwk4wLGVH-D05rCR0Hrk97DDNh65xU09zXTzDSiitwt9c8kLu-YjicyK94sHknqkeRtXNq6NGtedWM64quFtILZ81aWcsJBZYOXSKT_KMSeDv8A/sxlb_EOY4tZVouk6EnkpOV3YfgLj4ifs/7) Before you complete it, I want you to consider the incredible turnaround we've experienced in our country, especially when you consider what we've seen in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in America...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**But despite the turnaround, we must keep up the fight and make sure that these sorts of violations of religious liberty never happen again.** **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. You can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/ifzj_OswgAcFK2xwFlitzZ8-Ce6srxApowzgQ__5_6KC-Xh8zPSkErdyQdd3Ap7ly_4qxPhWWoldL0ukgKLBLp3VQQEb9-jKgXZwVO1WMCOgJ1w70ti1iwlYZ4tBIqcldUvZOlrEtbymrZSWxJu3U-oIq0Ka9NEueI_qelnLB0psWlJII-BrQlxHe13kyIeR03baqW8deOo7bSJXI_3D_4GY5HeMQGRB3QUwF4i27VfMNBdxqbkkRUltiOmq-5JSmrPzhCmjJZgU3uyx6OSA6L-MQULSw3B2AnVVc598iN-gpGYv6TVr493aGLEsSu7AKUy-ExBoH9J0fO0L6GLmOMFJofFJ7leU29fZnBhTtFQZCPjaj-wI5kiF-j1TGCVW4Nxmpnc5iCODnmuAUGhU7dUCyuOfjno1ZM2cFD8-5-f6LhcTZCQ6cITsXL6QQXs8hWpTutSS_91y91QTHg/RAuebLpMME6VceYrBrbquKUU_hrJGQSX/7) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Revive Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
****

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.7 million homes and businesses ten times per year.
****

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics.
****

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

Now that we have a rare opportunity to take our country back, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. We remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/RYbfZ5TXxcf_fdu7DkCdQHWjbNVHy48LqHVMiWH52JLaec4sPZsmMgNieLxATcd8FyzX2v7iRopMJI6puhsuuw7_jzspnc9k-cpje3_qFguJqwJLNSAsWT6sSiuQvzRMJbZToILx6iUJ71y23NfAKXO9gJI31ehOKRP8xZXMUNs0qVgMmAG_bAfb--PU0WjYU_IBBmURHG6vwE3PKhF6OqJcBKvENck19YVeKEheal4w0yl7XJ2euCAMd5KLjafBuUwu0Pz92vMZiUuZQhm6VjF1-bPJgAS2OwArZLE0WcEL1gxIoCh9nRhAiSJUIgSmUizZhcpE4bpwKqqyIjHN9sy0LJraw7Z-zDqRPHt3AJZvVbNPd_rFJfbcrBcm_AIlCYX2e-JL0jFNke-SLpgsC_z5t7jmKTbxWekx2MHSdado4mQWqdfOTiIC8B4vBmf3GZ36-VEtgM4MZR1wpw/Q95FC8sPdEiS3l9Ec4g6ZyKmZM0RxPoS/7) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. [Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/H470mxFolD9Jk8P70COF91168YJRO9f1gGobK-3sLO-2bVDVvrWfsB4kYbCMmrd6elpkFYmPf6VmJOC76mfzYJj_73hOkvm3Vr0AuuRHPuq891OTcpA_psiO5exV2Rktds_oY-dUcaHiwXxuuJipQL9BrAg_hocYohfXMqACKS_oPbiRuF170V3d/0kvdYOevYHUGWugs-ziQ9wkm2KQJsvK0/7).

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Just looked at the receipt and…wtf
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Trump’s tariffs are here, and guess who’s paying? |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105328817/537990341/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjA1NzE1YS0zYjEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l7Bbva8z0QMEvUxy4C6pNbtc0aqkTx3tK6GBGGjHbGA=&emci=5205715a-3b13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=5b05715a-3b13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7878003)
Hey guys, I just got back from the grocery store. And looking at my receipt? Yeah, _that_ was a jump scare. Eggs? Up. Milk? Up. Literally everything? Way _way_ up. **_That’s Trumpflation for you._** Now that Trump’s new tariffs have been in place for a few days, we’re already seeing the fallout. Prices on everyday goods are climbing — and experts warn they’ll keep going up. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: on the Senate floor until the wee hours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2267%2E135344%2EG-2e_R)

Greetings! I wanted to update you on something that is unique to the U.S. Senate: it’s called “vote-a-rama”.
A Vote-a-Rama is a wonky, procedural event that allows senators from both parties to propose an unlimited number of amendments to budget-related bills. In the environment we find ourselves in, it can take a pretty long time.
Friday night into Saturday morning, we were on the Senate floor until about 2:30 AM, offering amendments to President Trump’s budget plans.
That plan calls for adding nearly $6 trillion to the deficit - mostly as tax cuts for the highest earners in the country.
The instructions task each Senate and House committee to slash their budgets and come back with a bill that includes a minimum of $1.5 trillion in cuts to federal spending to pay for some of it.
You can already see where they’re going: to get to the numbers they need, the math simply won’t work without taking big cuts out of heath care, the VA, and a ton of other places so important to average Michiganders. Senate Democrats introduced amendments to fight against DOGE cuts at the Social Security Administration, and to protect Medicaid and Americans’ healthcare.
The Republicans voted down every single one — even the ones that called their bluff and said essentially ‘no part of this plan shall result in a loss of healthcare for Americans.’ They wouldn’t vote for it because they understand the math as well.
No one is surprised. Republicans in Washington are doing President Trump’s bidding and are afraid – truly fearful – to stand up to him.
But I want you to know that I’ll be fighting back, exposing the attempts to use ‘magic math’ to hide their cuts, and voting against these harmful budget proposals that go after your healthcare, Social Security, and our national security – no matter the hour of the day or night.
Elissa Slotkin
* * *

👋🏻 **Wait, before you click away!** 🇺🇸
United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests.
What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread.
But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 - so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator.
[**Make a recurring contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-apr25.XPV_iG&refcode=em250406r&t=2&akid=2267%2E135344%2EG-2e_R)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your recurring contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $10 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3243?c0=ebs-em-apr25.N7VaJm&refcode=em250406r&t=3&akid=2267%2E135344%2EG-2e_R)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-apr25.XPV_iG&refcode=em250406r&t=4&akid=2267%2E135344%2EG-2e_R)**
---
****

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=2267%2E135344%2EG-2e_R).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=2267%2E135344%2EG-2e_R)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

Solicitations made by Elissa Slotkin are limited by Federal law. As a Federal candidates and officeholder she is soliciting only donations of up to $3300 per election from individuals and up to $5000 per election from multi-candidate political committees. She are not soliciting donations in any amount from corporations, labororganizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks.
